authors_text: Honglong Chen,Zhe Li,Zhu Wang,Zhichen Ni,Junjian Li,Ge Xu,Abdul Aziz,Feng Xia
title: Edge Data Based Trailer Inception Probabilistic Matrix Factorization for Context-Aware Movie Recommendation
title_zh: 基于边缘数据的预告片初始概率矩阵分解，用于上下文感知电影推荐
abstract: The rapid growth of edge data generated by mobile devices and applications deployed at the edge of the network has exacerbated the problem of information overload. As an effective way to alleviate information overload, recommender system can improve the quality of various services by adding application data generated by users on edge devices, such as visual and textual information, on the basis of sparse rating data. The visual information in the movie trailer is a significant part of the movie recommender system. However, due to the complexity of visual information extraction, data sparsity cannot be remarkably alleviated by merely using the rough visual features to improve the rating prediction accuracy. Fortunately, the convolutional neural network can be used to extract the visual features precisely. Therefore, the end-to-end neural image caption (NIC) model can be utilized to obtain the textual information describing the visual features of movie trailers. This paper proposes a trailer inception probabilistic matrix factorization model called Ti-PMF, which combines NIC, recurrent convolutional neural network, and probabilistic matrix factorization models as the rating prediction model. We implement the proposed Ti-PMF model with extensive experiments on three real-world datasets to validate its effectiveness. The experimental results illustrate that the proposed Ti-PMF outperforms the existing ones.
summary: The rapid growth of edge data generated by mobile devices and applications deployed at the edge of the network has exacerbated the problem of information overload. As an effective way to alleviate information overload, recommender system can improve the quality of various services by adding application data generated by users on edge devices, such as visual and textual information, on the basis of sparse rating data. The visual information in the movie trailer is a significant part of the movie recommender system. However, due to the complexity of visual information extraction, data sparsity cannot be remarkably alleviated by merely using the rough visual features to improve the rating prediction accuracy. Fortunately, the convolutional neural network can be used to extract the visual features precisely. Therefore, the end-to-end neural image caption (NIC) model can be utilized to obtain the textual information describing the visual features of movie trailers. This paper proposes a trailer inception probabilistic matrix factorization model called Ti-PMF, which combines NIC, recurrent convolutional neural network, and probabilistic matrix factorization models as the rating prediction model. We implement the proposed Ti-PMF model with extensive experiments on three real-world datasets to validate its effectiveness. The experimental results illustrate that the proposed Ti-PMF outperforms the existing ones.
abstract_zh: 部署在网络边缘的移动设备和应用程序生成的边缘数据快速增长，加剧了信息过载问题。作为缓解信息过载的有效途径，推荐系统可以在稀疏评分数据的基础上，通过添加用户在边缘设备上生成的应用数据（例如视觉和文本信息）来提高各种服务的质量。电影预告片中的视觉信息是电影推荐系统的重要组成部分。然而，由于视觉信息提取的复杂性，仅仅利用粗糙的视觉特征并不能显着缓解数据稀疏性来提高评分预测精度。幸运的是，卷积神经网络可以用来精确地提取视觉特征。因此，可以利用端到端神经图像字幕（NIC）模型来获取描述电影预告片视觉特征的文本信息。本文提出了一种名为 Ti-PMF 的预告片初始概率矩阵分解模型，该模型结合了 NIC、循环卷积神经网络和概率矩阵分解模型作为评分预测模型。我们在三个真实数据集上进行了广泛的实验来实现所提出的 Ti-PMF 模型，以验证其有效性。实验结果表明，所提出的 Ti-PMF 优于现有的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于边缘数据和电影预告片的上下文感知电影推荐模型Ti-PMF，通过融合视觉和文本特征改进推荐效果。
AI.motivation: 边缘设备生成的视觉和文本数据可缓解推荐系统中的数据稀疏性问题，但传统方法难以有效提取预告片中的复杂视觉特征。
AI.method: 结合神经图像字幕模型（NIC）、循环卷积神经网络和概率矩阵分解（PMF），构建端到端的Ti-PMF模型以融合预告片的多模态特征。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上的实验表明，Ti-PMF在推荐准确率上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合边缘数据与深度学习模型，Ti-PMF能有效利用预告片的上下文信息提升推荐性能。

title: A Dynamic Model of a Skydiver With Validation in Wind Tunnel and Free Fall
title_zh: 经风洞和自由落体验证的跳伞运动员动态模型
abstract: An innovative approach of gaining insight into motor skills involved in human body flight is proposed. The key idea is the creation of a model autonomous system capable of virtually performing skydiving maneuvers. A dynamic skydiver model and simulator is developed, comprising biomechanical, aerodynamic, and kinematic models, dynamic equations of motion, and a virtual reality environment. Limb relative orientations, and resulting inertial body angular position and velocity are measured in skydiving experiments in a vertical wind tunnel and in free fall. These experimental data are compared with corresponding simulation data to tune and verify the model for basic skydiving maneuvers. The model is further extended to reconstruct advanced aerial maneuvers, such as transitions between stable equilibria. The experimental data are used to estimate skydiver's conscious inputs as a function of time, via an Unscented Kalman Filter modified for this purpose.
summary: An innovative approach of gaining insight into motor skills involved in human body flight is proposed. The key idea is the creation of a model autonomous system capable of virtually performing skydiving maneuvers. A dynamic skydiver model and simulator is developed, comprising biomechanical, aerodynamic, and kinematic models, dynamic equations of motion, and a virtual reality environment. Limb relative orientations, and resulting inertial body angular position and velocity are measured in skydiving experiments in a vertical wind tunnel and in free fall. These experimental data are compared with corresponding simulation data to tune and verify the model for basic skydiving maneuvers. The model is further extended to reconstruct advanced aerial maneuvers, such as transitions between stable equilibria. The experimental data are used to estimate skydiver's conscious inputs as a function of time, via an Unscented Kalman Filter modified for this purpose.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种深入了解人体飞行运动技能的创新方法。关键思想是创建一个能够虚拟执行跳伞操作的模型自主系统。开发了动态跳伞员模型和模拟器，包括生物力学、空气动力学和运动学模型、动态运动方程和虚拟现实环境。在垂直风洞和自由落体的跳伞实验中测量肢体相对方向以及由此产生的惯性体角位置和速度。将这些实验数据与相应的模拟数据进行比较，以调整和验证基本跳伞动作的模型。该模型进一步扩展以重建先进的空中机动，例如稳定平衡之间的过渡。实验数据用于通过为此目的修改的无味卡尔曼滤波器来估计跳伞者的意识输入作为时间的函数。

AI.tldr: 开发并验证一个包含生物力学、空气动力学和运动学模型的动态跳伞者模型，通过风洞和自由落体实验数据进行调整和验证。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以全面研究人体飞行中的运动技能，需建立自主系统模型以深入分析跳伞动作机制。
AI.method: 构建多模型系统（生物力学/空气动力学/运动学），结合动态方程与虚拟现实环境，通过风洞和自由落体实验采集数据，使用改进无味卡尔曼滤波器估计意识输入。
AI.result: 模型成功验证基础跳伞动作，可重建高级空中动作转换，准确估计跳伞者实时意识输入参数。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为人体飞行运动技能研究及训练提供了有效工具，兼具理论验证与实际应用价值。

authors_text: Danni Huang,Lingyu Zhu,Zihao Lin,Hanwei Zhu,Shiqi Wang,Baoliang Chen
title: The Loop Game: Quality Assessment and Optimization for Low-Light Image Enhancement
title_zh: 循环游戏：低光图像增强的质量评估和优化
abstract: There is an increasing consensus that the design and optimization of low light image enhancement methods need to be fully driven by perceptual quality. With numerous approaches proposed to enhance low-light images, much less work has been dedicated to quality assessment and quality optimization of low-light enhancement. In this paper, to close the gap between enhancement and assessment, we propose a loop enhancement framework that produces a clear picture of how the enhancement of low-light images could be optimized towards better visual quality. In particular, we create a large-scale database for QUality assessment Of The Enhanced LOw-Light Image (QUOTE-LOL), which serves as the foundation in studying and developing objective quality assessment measures. The objective quality assessment measure plays a critical bridging role between visual quality and enhancement and is further incorporated in the optimization in learning the enhancement model towards perceptual optimally. Finally, we iteratively perform the enhancement and optimization tasks, enhancing the low-light images continuously. The superiority of the proposed scheme is validated based on various low-light scenes.
summary: There is an increasing consensus that the design and optimization of low light image enhancement methods need to be fully driven by perceptual quality. With numerous approaches proposed to enhance low-light images, much less work has been dedicated to quality assessment and quality optimization of low-light enhancement. In this paper, to close the gap between enhancement and assessment, we propose a loop enhancement framework that produces a clear picture of how the enhancement of low-light images could be optimized towards better visual quality. In particular, we create a large-scale database for QUality assessment Of The Enhanced LOw-Light Image (QUOTE-LOL), which serves as the foundation in studying and developing objective quality assessment measures. The objective quality assessment measure plays a critical bridging role between visual quality and enhancement and is further incorporated in the optimization in learning the enhancement model towards perceptual optimally. Finally, we iteratively perform the enhancement and optimization tasks, enhancing the low-light images continuously. The superiority of the proposed scheme is validated based on various low-light scenes.
abstract_zh: 人们越来越认识到，低光图像增强方法的设计和优化需要完全由感知质量驱动。人们提出了许多增强低光图像的方法，但致力于低光增强的质量评估和质量优化的工作却少得多。在本文中，为了缩小增强和评估之间的差距，我们提出了一个循环增强框架，该框架可以清楚地说明如何优化低光图像的增强以获得更好的视觉质量。特别是，我们创建了一个用于增强低光图像质量评估（QUOTE-LOL）的大型数据库，作为研究和开发客观质量评估措施的基础。客观质量评估措施在视觉质量和增强之间发挥着关键的桥梁作用，并进一步纳入学习增强模型以达到感知最佳状态的优化中。最后，我们迭代地执行增强和优化任务，不断增强低光图像。基于各种弱光场景验证了该方案的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种循环增强框架，通过构建大规模低光图像质量评估数据库QUOTE-LOL，实现低光图像增强的视觉质量优化。
AI.motivation: 现有低光图像增强方法缺乏系统性的质量评估和优化机制，导致增强效果与视觉感知存在差距。
AI.method: 设计循环增强框架，创建QUOTE-LOL数据库作为质量评估基础，开发客观质量评估指标并整合至增强模型优化流程，通过迭代增强与优化任务提升效果。
AI.result: 在多种低光场景中验证了所提方法的优越性，证明循环优化框架能有效提升增强图像的视觉质量。
AI.conclusion: 通过闭环的评估-优化机制，本文为低光图像增强提供了可感知的优化方向，并为后续研究建立质量评估基准。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种循环增强框架，通过构建大规模低光图像质量评估数据库QUOTE-LOL，实现低光图像增强的视觉质量优化。
ai_content.motivation: 现有低光图像增强方法缺乏系统性的质量评估和优化机制，导致增强效果与视觉感知存在差距。
ai_content.method: 设计循环增强框架，创建QUOTE-LOL数据库作为质量评估基础，开发客观质量评估指标并整合至增强模型优化流程，通过迭代增强与优化任务提升效果。
ai_content.result: 在多种低光场景中验证了所提方法的优越性，证明循环优化框架能有效提升增强图像的视觉质量。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过闭环的评估-优化机制，本文为低光图像增强提供了可感知的优化方向，并为后续研究建立质量评估基准。

search_text: The Loop Game: Quality Assessment and Optimization for Low-Light Image Enhancement 循环游戏：低光图像增强的质量评估和优化 There is an increasing consensus that the design and optimization of low light image enhancement methods need to be fully driven by perceptual quality. With numerous approaches proposed to enhance low-light images, much less work has been dedicated to quality assessment and quality optimization of low-light enhancement. In this paper, to close the gap between enhancement and assessment, we propose a loop enhancement framework that produces a clear picture of how the enhancement of low-light images could be optimized towards better visual quality. In particular, we create a large-scale database for QUality assessment Of The Enhanced LOw-Light Image (QUOTE-LOL), which serves as the foundation in studying and developing objective quality assessment measures. The objective quality assessment measure plays a critical bridging role between visual quality and enhancement and is further incorporated in the optimization in learning the enhancement model towards perceptual optimally. Finally, we iteratively perform the enhancement and optimization tasks, enhancing the low-light images continuously. The superiority of the proposed scheme is validated based on various low-light scenes. 人们越来越认识到，低光图像增强方法的设计和优化需要完全由感知质量驱动。人们提出了许多增强低光图像的方法，但致力于低光增强的质量评估和质量优化的工作却少得多。在本文中，为了缩小增强和评估之间的差距，我们提出了一个循环增强框架，该框架可以清楚地说明如何优化低光图像的增强以获得更好的视觉质量。特别是，我们创建了一个用于增强低光图像质量评估（QUOTE-LOL）的大型数据库，作为研究和开发客观质量评估措施的基础。客观质量评估措施在视觉质量和增强之间发挥着关键的桥梁作用，并进一步纳入学习增强模型以达到感知最佳状态的优化中。最后，我们迭代地执行增强和优化任务，不断增强低光图像。基于各种弱光场景验证了该方案的优越性。 本文提出一种循环增强框架，通过构建大规模低光图像质量评估数据库QUOTE-LOL，实现低光图像增强的视觉质量优化。 Danni Huang,Lingyu Zhu,Zihao Lin,Hanwei Zhu,Shiqi Wang,Baoliang Chen eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Overparametrization improves robustness against adversarial attacks: A replication study
title_zh: 过度参数化提高了对抗对抗攻击的鲁棒性：一项复制研究
abstract: Overparametrization has become a de facto standard in machine learning. Despite numerous efforts, our understanding of how and where overparametrization helps model accuracy and robustness is still limited. To this end, here we conduct an empirical investigation to systemically study and replicate previous findings in this area, in particular the study by Madry et al. Together with this study, our findings support the "universal law of robustness" recently proposed by Bubeck et al. We argue that while critical for robust perception, overparametrization may not be enough to achieve full robustness and smarter architectures e.g. the ones implemented by the human visual cortex) seem inevitable.
summary: Overparametrization has become a de facto standard in machine learning. Despite numerous efforts, our understanding of how and where overparametrization helps model accuracy and robustness is still limited. To this end, here we conduct an empirical investigation to systemically study and replicate previous findings in this area, in particular the study by Madry et al. Together with this study, our findings support the "universal law of robustness" recently proposed by Bubeck et al. We argue that while critical for robust perception, overparametrization may not be enough to achieve full robustness and smarter architectures e.g. the ones implemented by the human visual cortex) seem inevitable.
abstract_zh: 过度参数化已成为机器学习事实上的标准。尽管付出了很多努力，我们对过度参数化如何以及在何处帮助模型准确性和稳健性的理解仍然有限。为此，我们进行了实证研究，系统地研究和复制了该领域的先前研究结果，特别是 Madry 等人的研究。与这项研究一起，我们的研究结果支持了 Bubeck 等人最近提出的“鲁棒性普遍法则”。我们认为，虽然对于鲁棒感知至关重要，但过度参数化可能不足以实现完全鲁棒性和更智能的架构，例如由人类视觉皮层实现的）似乎是不可避免的。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实证研究复现了过参数化对对抗攻击鲁棒性的提升效果，并验证了鲁棒性的普遍定律。
AI.motivation: 尽管过参数化是机器学习的主流方法，但其如何提升模型鲁棒性的机制仍不明确，需系统性研究验证现有结论。
AI.method: 通过实证实验复现Madry等人的研究，结合Bubeck提出的鲁棒性普遍定律进行分析。
AI.result: 证实过参数化能提升模型鲁棒性，支持了鲁棒性与模型复杂度正相关的普遍定律。
AI.conclusion: 过参数化对鲁棒感知至关重要，但要实现完全鲁棒性可能需要更接近生物视觉系统的智能架构。

title: Graph-based Extractive Explainer for Recommendations
title_zh: 基于图的推荐提取解释器
abstract: Explanations in a recommender system assist users in making informed decisions among a set of recommended items. Great research attention has been devoted to generating natural language explanations to depict how the recommendations are generated and why the users should pay attention to them. However, due to different limitations of those solutions, e.g., template-based or generation-based, it is hard to make the explanations easily perceivable, reliable and personalized at the same time. In this work, we develop a graph attentive neural network model that seamlessly integrates user, item, attributes, and sentences for extraction-based explanation. The attributes of items are selected as the intermediary to facilitate message passing for user-item specific evaluation of sentence relevance. And to balance individual sentence relevance, overall attribute coverage, and content redundancy, we solve an integer linear programming problem to make the final selection of sentences. Extensive empirical evaluations against a set of state-of-the-art baseline methods on two benchmark review datasets demonstrated the generation quality of the proposed solution.
summary: Explanations in a recommender system assist users in making informed decisions among a set of recommended items. Great research attention has been devoted to generating natural language explanations to depict how the recommendations are generated and why the users should pay attention to them. However, due to different limitations of those solutions, e.g., template-based or generation-based, it is hard to make the explanations easily perceivable, reliable and personalized at the same time. In this work, we develop a graph attentive neural network model that seamlessly integrates user, item, attributes, and sentences for extraction-based explanation. The attributes of items are selected as the intermediary to facilitate message passing for user-item specific evaluation of sentence relevance. And to balance individual sentence relevance, overall attribute coverage, and content redundancy, we solve an integer linear programming problem to make the final selection of sentences. Extensive empirical evaluations against a set of state-of-the-art baseline methods on two benchmark review datasets demonstrated the generation quality of the proposed solution.
abstract_zh: 推荐系统中的解释可帮助用户在一组推荐项目中做出明智的决定。人们对生成自然语言解释投入了大量的研究注意力，以描述推荐是如何生成的以及用户为什么应该关注它们。然而，由于这些解决方案的不同局限性，例如基于模板或基于生成，很难同时使解释易于感知、可靠和个性化。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种图注意力神经网络模型，该模型无缝集成用户、项目、属性和句子，以进行基于提取的解释。选择项目的属性作为中介，以促进消息传递，以进行句子相关性的用户项目特定评估。为了平衡单个句子的相关性、整体属性覆盖率和内容冗余，我们解决了整数线性规划问题来做出句子的最终选择。对两个基准审查数据集上的一组最先进的基线方法进行的广泛的实证评估证明了所提出的解决方案的生成质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图的抽取式解释器，用于推荐系统中生成更可靠和个性化的解释。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统解释方法（如模板或生成式）难以同时满足易感知、可靠和个性化的需求，需探索新方法。
AI.method: 构建图注意力网络模型，整合用户、物品、属性及句子信息，通过属性中介传递消息评估句子相关性，并利用整数线性规划优化句子选择。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上实验表明，该方法生成的解释质量优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡了句子相关性、属性覆盖与内容冗余，提升了推荐解释的生成效果。

title: It's Raw! Audio Generation with State-Space Models
title_zh: 这是生的！使用状态空间模型生成音频
abstract: Developing architectures suitable for modeling raw audio is a challenging problem due to the high sampling rates of audio waveforms. Standard sequence modeling approaches like RNNs and CNNs have previously been tailored to fit the demands of audio, but the resultant architectures make undesirable computational tradeoffs and struggle to model waveforms effectively. We propose SaShiMi, a new multi-scale architecture for waveform modeling built around the recently introduced S4 model for long sequence modeling. We identify that S4 can be unstable during autoregressive generation, and provide a simple improvement to its parameterization by drawing connections to Hurwitz matrices. SaShiMi yields state-of-the-art performance for unconditional waveform generation in the autoregressive setting. Additionally, SaShiMi improves non-autoregressive generation performance when used as the backbone architecture for a diffusion model. Compared to prior architectures in the autoregressive generation setting, SaShiMi generates piano and speech waveforms which humans find more musical and coherent respectively, e.g. 2x better mean opinion scores than WaveNet on an unconditional speech generation task. On a music generation task, SaShiMi outperforms WaveNet on density estimation and speed at both training and inference even when using 3x fewer parameters. Code can be found at https://github.com/HazyResearch/state-spaces and samples at https://hazyresearch.stanford.edu/sashimi-examples.
summary: Developing architectures suitable for modeling raw audio is a challenging problem due to the high sampling rates of audio waveforms. Standard sequence modeling approaches like RNNs and CNNs have previously been tailored to fit the demands of audio, but the resultant architectures make undesirable computational tradeoffs and struggle to model waveforms effectively. We propose SaShiMi, a new multi-scale architecture for waveform modeling built around the recently introduced S4 model for long sequence modeling. We identify that S4 can be unstable during autoregressive generation, and provide a simple improvement to its parameterization by drawing connections to Hurwitz matrices. SaShiMi yields state-of-the-art performance for unconditional waveform generation in the autoregressive setting. Additionally, SaShiMi improves non-autoregressive generation performance when used as the backbone architecture for a diffusion model. Compared to prior architectures in the autoregressive generation setting, SaShiMi generates piano and speech waveforms which humans find more musical and coherent respectively, e.g. 2x better mean opinion scores than WaveNet on an unconditional speech generation task. On a music generation task, SaShiMi outperforms WaveNet on density estimation and speed at both training and inference even when using 3x fewer parameters. Code can be found at https://github.com/HazyResearch/state-spaces and samples at https://hazyresearch.stanford.edu/sashimi-examples.
abstract_zh: 由于音频波形的高采样率，开发适合对原始音频进行建模的架构是一个具有挑战性的问题。 RNN 和 CNN 等标准序列建模方法此前已针对音频需求进行了定制，但由此产生的架构会产生不希望的计算权衡，并且很难有效地对波形进行建模。我们提出了 SaShiMi，一种用于波形建模的新多尺度架构，围绕最近推出的用于长序列建模的 S4 模型构建。我们发现 S4 在自回归生成过程中可能不稳定，并通过绘制与 Hurwitz 矩阵的连接对其参数化进行了简单的改进。 SaShiMi 在自回归设置中为无条件波形生成提供最先进的性能。此外，当 SaShiMi 用作扩散模型的骨干架构时，可以提高非自回归生成性能。与自回归生成设置中的现有架构相比，SaShiMi 生成钢琴和语音波形，人类发现它们分别更具音乐性和连贯性，例如在无条件语音生成任务上，平均意见得分比 WaveNet 好 2 倍。在音乐生成任务中，即使使用的参数少了 3 倍，SaShiMi 在密度估计和训练和推理速度方面也优于 WaveNet。代码可以在 https://github.com/HazyResearch/state-spaces 找到，示例可以在 https://hazyresearch.stanford.edu/sashimi-examples 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于状态空间模型的SaShiMi架构，用于生成高质量的原始音频波形。
AI.motivation: 传统RNN和CNN在处理高采样率音频时存在计算效率低、建模效果差的问题，需更高效的序列建模方法。
AI.method: 设计多尺度架构SaShiMi，基于S4模型改进参数化方式（结合Hurwitz矩阵），解决自回归生成不稳定性，并适配扩散模型。
AI.result: 在语音生成任务中较WaveNet提升2倍MOS得分，在音乐生成任务中参数减少3倍且速度更快，密度估计表现更优。
AI.conclusion: SaShiMi在音频生成任务中优于现有方法，验证了状态空间模型在波形建模中的有效性，代码已开源。

search_text: It's Raw! Audio Generation with State-Space Models 这是生的！使用状态空间模型生成音频 Developing architectures suitable for modeling raw audio is a challenging problem due to the high sampling rates of audio waveforms. Standard sequence modeling approaches like RNNs and CNNs have previously been tailored to fit the demands of audio, but the resultant architectures make undesirable computational tradeoffs and struggle to model waveforms effectively. We propose SaShiMi, a new multi-scale architecture for waveform modeling built around the recently introduced S4 model for long sequence modeling. We identify that S4 can be unstable during autoregressive generation, and provide a simple improvement to its parameterization by drawing connections to Hurwitz matrices. SaShiMi yields state-of-the-art performance for unconditional waveform generation in the autoregressive setting. Additionally, SaShiMi improves non-autoregressive generation performance when used as the backbone architecture for a diffusion model. Compared to prior architectures in the autoregressive generation setting, SaShiMi generates piano and speech waveforms which humans find more musical and coherent respectively, e.g. 2x better mean opinion scores than WaveNet on an unconditional speech generation task. On a music generation task, SaShiMi outperforms WaveNet on density estimation and speed at both training and inference even when using 3x fewer parameters. Code can be found at https://github.com/HazyResearch/state-spaces and samples at https://hazyresearch.stanford.edu/sashimi-examples. 由于音频波形的高采样率，开发适合对原始音频进行建模的架构是一个具有挑战性的问题。 RNN 和 CNN 等标准序列建模方法此前已针对音频需求进行了定制，但由此产生的架构会产生不希望的计算权衡，并且很难有效地对波形进行建模。我们提出了 SaShiMi，一种用于波形建模的新多尺度架构，围绕最近推出的用于长序列建模的 S4 模型构建。我们发现 S4 在自回归生成过程中可能不稳定，并通过绘制与 Hurwitz 矩阵的连接对其参数化进行了简单的改进。 SaShiMi 在自回归设置中为无条件波形生成提供最先进的性能。此外，当 SaShiMi 用作扩散模型的骨干架构时，可以提高非自回归生成性能。与自回归生成设置中的现有架构相比，SaShiMi 生成钢琴和语音波形，人类发现它们分别更具音乐性和连贯性，例如在无条件语音生成任务上，平均意见得分比 WaveNet 好 2 倍。在音乐生成任务中，即使使用的参数少了 3 倍，SaShiMi 在密度估计和训练和推理速度方面也优于 WaveNet。代码可以在 https://github.com/HazyResearch/state-spaces 找到，示例可以在 https://hazyresearch.stanford.edu/sashimi-examples 找到。 本文提出基于状态空间模型的SaShiMi架构，用于生成高质量的原始音频波形。 Karan Goel,Albert Gu,Chris Donahue,Christopher Ré cs.SD,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.AS

title: The Effects of System Initiative during Conversational Collaborative Search
title_zh: 会话式协作搜索过程中系统主动性的影响
comment: ef:Proc. ACM Hum.-Comput. Interact. 6, CSCW1, Article 66 (April 2022), 30 pages
comments: ef:Proc. ACM Hum.-Comput. Interact. 6, CSCW1, Article 66 (April 2022), 30 pages
abstract: Our research in this paper lies at the intersection of collaborative and conversational search. We report on a Wizard of Oz lab study in which 27 pairs of participants collaborated on search tasks over the Slack messaging platform. To complete tasks, pairs of collaborators interacted with a so-called \emph{searchbot} with conversational capabilities. The role of the searchbot was played by a reference librarian. It is widely accepted that conversational search systems should be able to engage in \emph{mixed-initiative interaction} -- take and relinquish control of a multi-agent conversation as appropriate. Research in discourse analysis differentiates between dialog- and task-level initiative. Taking \emph{dialog-level} initiative involves leading a conversation for the sole purpose of establishing mutual belief between agents. Conversely, taking \emph{task-level} initiative involves leading a conversation with the intent to influence the goals of the other agent(s). Participants in our study experienced three \emph{searchbot conditions}, which varied based on the level of initiative the human searchbot was able to take: (1) no initiative, (2) only dialog-level initiative, and (3) both dialog- and task-level initiative. We investigate the effects of the searchbot condition on six different types of outcomes: (RQ1) perceptions of the searchbot's utility, (RQ2) perceptions of workload, (RQ3) perceptions of the collaboration, (RQ4) patterns of communication and collaboration, and perceived (RQ5) benefits and (RQ6) challenges from engaging with the searchbot.

We report on a Wizard of Oz lab study in which 27 pairs of participants collaborated on search tasks over the Slack messaging platform. It is widely accepted that conversational search systems should be able to engage in \emph{mixed-initiative interaction} -- take and relinquish control of a multi-agent conversation as appropriate. Research in discourse analysis differentiates between dialog- and task-level initiative. Taking \emph{dialog-level} initiative involves leading a conversation for the sole purpose of establishing mutual belief between agents. Conversely, taking \emph{task-level} initiative involves leading a conversation with the intent to influence the goals of the other agent(s). Participants in our study experienced three \emph{searchbot conditions}, which varied based on the level of initiative the human searchbot was able to take: (1) no initiative, (2) only dialog-level initiative, and (3) both dialog- and task-level initiative. We investigate the effects of the searchbot condition on six different types of outcomes: (RQ1) perceptions of the searchbot's utility, (RQ2) perceptions of workload, (RQ3) perceptions of the collaboration, (RQ4) patterns of communication and collaboration, and perceived (RQ5) benefits and (RQ6) challenges from engaging with the searchbot.
abstract_zh: 我们在本文中的研究在于协作搜索和会话搜索的交叉点。我们报告了一项《绿野仙踪》实验室研究，其中 27 对参与者通过 Slack 消息平台协作执行搜索任务。为了完成任务，成对的协作者与具有对话功能的所谓的 \emph{searchbot} 进行交互。搜索机器人的角色由参考图书馆员扮演。人们普遍认为，会话搜索系统应该能够参与\emph{混合主动交互}——适当地获取和放弃对多代理会话的控制。话语分析研究区分了对话级主动性和任务级主动性。采取 \emph{对话级别} 主动性涉及主导对话，其唯一目的是在代理之间建立相互信任。相反，采取 \emph{任务级} 主动性涉及以影响其他代理目标的意图引导对话。我们研究的参与者经历了三种\emph{搜索机器人条件}，这些条件根据人类搜索机器人能够采取的主动性水平而变化：(1) 无主动性，(2) 仅对话级主动性，以及 (3) 对话级主动性和任务级主动性。我们研究了搜索机器人条件对六种不同类型结果的影响：（RQ1）对搜索机器人效用的看法，（RQ2）对工作量的看法，（RQ3）对协作的看法，（RQ4）沟通和协作模式，以及感知（RQ5）与搜索机器人合作的好处和（RQ6）挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在对话式协作搜索中系统主动权对搜索效果的影响，通过实验对比不同主动权条件下的用户表现。
AI.motivation: 协作搜索与对话系统结合时，系统主动权的分配可能影响任务效率与用户体验，但现有研究缺乏对主动权层级（对话级/任务级）的系统分析。
AI.method: 采用Wizard of Oz实验法，27组参与者通过Slack平台与由图书管理员扮演的搜索机器人协作完成任务，对比三种主动权条件（无主动权/仅对话级主动权/双主动权）下的六类结果指标。
AI.result: 不同主动权条件显著影响用户对搜索机器人效用、协作质量、沟通模式及任务挑战的感知，任务级主动权在提升协作效率方面效果更优但伴随更高认知负荷。
AI.conclusion: 系统主动权层级设计需平衡任务导向与对话流畅性，任务级主动权可增强协作效果但需优化用户引导策略以降低认知负担。

title: PooL: Pheromone-inspired Communication Framework forLarge Scale Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: PooL：用于大规模多智能体强化学习的信息素启发通信框架
abstract: Being difficult to scale poses great problems in multi-agent coordination. Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) algorithms applied in small-scale multi-agent systems are hard to extend to large-scale ones because the latter is far more dynamic and the number of interactions increases exponentially with the growing number of agents. Some swarm intelligence algorithms simulate the release and utilization mechanism of pheromones to control large-scale agent coordination. Inspired by such algorithms, \textbf{PooL}, an \textbf{p}her\textbf{o}m\textbf{o}ne-based indirect communication framework applied to large scale multi-agent reinforcement \textbf{l}earning is proposed in order to solve the large-scale multi-agent coordination problem. Pheromones released by agents of PooL are defined as outputs of most reinforcement learning algorithms, which reflect agents' views of the current environment. The pheromone update mechanism can efficiently organize the information of all agents and simplify the complex interactions among agents into low-dimensional representations. Pheromones perceived by agents can be regarded as a summary of the views of nearby agents which can better reflect the real situation of the environment. Q-Learning is taken as our base model to implement PooL and PooL is evaluated in various large-scale cooperative environments. Experiments show agents can capture effective information through PooL and achieve higher rewards than other state-of-arts methods with lower communication costs.

Q-Learning is taken as our base model to implement PooL and PooL is evaluated in various large-scale cooperative environments. Experiments show agents can capture effective information through PooL and achieve higher rewards than other state-of-arts methods with lower communication costs.
abstract_zh: 难以扩展给多智能体协调带来了很大的问题。应用于小规模多智能体系统的多智能体强化学习（MARL）算法很难扩展到大规模系统，因为后者更具动态性，交互数量随着智能体数量的增加呈指数级增长。一些群体智能算法模拟信息素的释放和利用机制来控制大规模智能体协调。受此类算法的启发，\textbf{PooL}提出了一种基于\textbf{p}her\textbf{o}m\textbf{o}ne的应用于大规模多智能体强化\textbf{l}收益的间接通信框架，以解决大规模多智能体协调问题。 PooL 的智能体释放的信息素被定义为大多数强化学习算法的输出，它反映了智能体对当前环境的看法。信息素更新机制可以有效地组织所有智能体的信息，并将智能体之间复杂的交互简化为低维表示。 Agent感知到的信息素可以看作是附近Agent的观点的总结，能够更好地反映环境的真实情况。我们以 Q-Learning 作为实现 PooL 的基础模型，并在各种大规模合作环境中对 PooL 进行评估。实验表明，智能体可以通过 PooL 捕获有效信息，并以更低的通信成本获得比其他最先进方法更高的奖励。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PooL框架，通过信息素机制解决大规模多智能体强化学习中的协调问题。
AI.motivation: 现有MARL算法难以扩展到大规模系统，因交互复杂度呈指数增长，而信息素机制能有效简化多智能体协作。
AI.method: 以Q-Learning为基础，将智能体输出定义为信息素，通过信息素更新机制聚合全局信息并生成低维环境表示。
AI.result: 实验表明PooL在多个大规模协作环境中取得比现有方法更高的奖励且通信成本更低。
AI.conclusion: 信息素启发的间接通信框架能有效组织大规模多智能体信息交互，提升协作效率与性能。

search_text: PooL: Pheromone-inspired Communication Framework forLarge Scale Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning PooL：用于大规模多智能体强化学习的信息素启发通信框架 Being difficult to scale poses great problems in multi-agent coordination. Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) algorithms applied in small-scale multi-agent systems are hard to extend to large-scale ones because the latter is far more dynamic and the number of interactions increases exponentially with the growing number of agents. Some swarm intelligence algorithms simulate the release and utilization mechanism of pheromones to control large-scale agent coordination. Inspired by such algorithms, \textbf{PooL}, an \textbf{p}her\textbf{o}m\textbf{o}ne-based indirect communication framework applied to large scale multi-agent reinforcement \textbf{l}earning is proposed in order to solve the large-scale multi-agent coordination problem. Pheromones released by agents of PooL are defined as outputs of most reinforcement learning algorithms, which reflect agents' views of the current environment. The pheromone update mechanism can efficiently organize the information of all agents and simplify the complex interactions among agents into low-dimensional representations. Pheromones perceived by agents can be regarded as a summary of the views of nearby agents which can better reflect the real situation of the environment. Q-Learning is taken as our base model to implement PooL and PooL is evaluated in various large-scale cooperative environments. Experiments show agents can capture effective information through PooL and achieve higher rewards than other state-of-arts methods with lower communication costs. 难以扩展给多智能体协调带来了很大的问题。应用于小规模多智能体系统的多智能体强化学习（MARL）算法很难扩展到大规模系统，因为后者更具动态性，交互数量随着智能体数量的增加呈指数级增长。一些群体智能算法模拟信息素的释放和利用机制来控制大规模智能体协调。受此类算法的启发，\textbf{PooL}提出了一种基于\textbf{p}her\textbf{o}m\textbf{o}ne的应用于大规模多智能体强化\textbf{l}收益的间接通信框架，以解决大规模多智能体协调问题。 PooL 的智能体释放的信息素被定义为大多数强化学习算法的输出，它反映了智能体对当前环境的看法。信息素更新机制可以有效地组织所有智能体的信息，并将智能体之间复杂的交互简化为低维表示。 Agent感知到的信息素可以看作是附近Agent的观点的总结，能够更好地反映环境的真实情况。我们以 Q-Learning 作为实现 PooL 的基础模型，并在各种大规模合作环境中对 PooL 进行评估。实验表明，智能体可以通过 PooL 捕获有效信息，并以更低的通信成本获得比其他最先进方法更高的奖励。 本文提出PooL框架，通过信息素机制解决大规模多智能体强化学习中的协调问题。 Zixuan Cao,Mengzhi Shi,Zhanbo Zhao,Xiujun Ma cs.AI,cs.MA

authors_text: Yuqing Lan,Yao Duan,Yifei Shi,Hui Huang,Kai Xu
title: 3DRM:Pair-wise relation module for 3D object detection
title_zh: 3DRM：用于 3D 物体检测的成对关系模块
abstract: Context has proven to be one of the most important factors in object layout reasoning for 3D scene understanding. Existing deep contextual models either learn holistic features for context encoding or rely on pre-defined scene templates for context modeling. We argue that scene understanding benefits from object relation reasoning, which is capable of mitigating the ambiguity of 3D object detections and thus helps locate and classify the 3D objects more accurately and robustly. To achieve this, we propose a novel 3D relation module (3DRM) which reasons about object relations at pair-wise levels. The 3DRM predicts the semantic and spatial relationships between objects and extracts the object-wise relation features. We demonstrate the effects of 3DRM by plugging it into proposal-based and voting-based 3D object detection pipelines, respectively. Extensive evaluations show the effectiveness and generalization of 3DRM on 3D object detection. Our source code is available at https://github.com/lanlan96/3DRM.
summary: Context has proven to be one of the most important factors in object layout reasoning for 3D scene understanding. Existing deep contextual models either learn holistic features for context encoding or rely on pre-defined scene templates for context modeling. We argue that scene understanding benefits from object relation reasoning, which is capable of mitigating the ambiguity of 3D object detections and thus helps locate and classify the 3D objects more accurately and robustly. To achieve this, we propose a novel 3D relation module (3DRM) which reasons about object relations at pair-wise levels. The 3DRM predicts the semantic and spatial relationships between objects and extracts the object-wise relation features. We demonstrate the effects of 3DRM by plugging it into proposal-based and voting-based 3D object detection pipelines, respectively. Extensive evaluations show the effectiveness and generalization of 3DRM on 3D object detection. Our source code is available at https://github.com/lanlan96/3DRM.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，上下文是 3D 场景理解的对象布局推理中最重要的因素之一。现有的深度上下文模型要么学习上下文编码的整体特征，要么依赖预定义的场景模板进行上下文建模。我们认为场景理解受益于对象关系推理，它能够减轻 3D 对象检测的模糊性，从而有助于更准确、更稳健地定位和分类 3D 对象。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种新颖的 3D 关系模块 (3DRM)，它可以在成对的级别上推理对象关系。 3DRM 预测对象之间的语义和空间关系，并提取对象之间的关系特征。我们通过分别将 3DRM 插入基于提案和基于投票的 3D 对象检测管道来演示 3DRM 的效果。广泛的评估显示了 3DRM 在 3D 物体检测方面的有效性和泛化性。我们的源代码位于 https://github.com/lanlan96/3DRM。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于物体间关系推理的3D物体检测模块3DRM，通过建模物体间的语义和空间关系提升检测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有3D场景理解方法依赖整体特征或预定义模板建模上下文，无法有效解决物体检测中的歧义问题，而物体间关系推理能更准确地定位和分类物体。
AI.method: 设计3DRM模块预测物体间的语义与空间关系，提取物体级关系特征，并将其集成到基于提案和投票的3D检测框架中。
AI.result: 在多个3D检测任务中验证了3DRM的有效性和泛化能力，源代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 3DRM通过显式建模物体间关系，显著提升了3D物体检测的准确性和鲁棒性，证明了关系推理在场景理解中的重要性。

title: Finding shortest non-separating and non-disconnecting paths
title_zh: 寻找最短的非分离和非断开路径
abstract: For a connected graph $G = (V, E)$ and $s, t \in V$, a non-separating $s$-$t$ path is a path $P$ between $s$ and $t$ such that the set of vertices of $P$ does not separate $G$, that is, $G - V(P)$ is connected. An $s$-$t$ path is non-disconnecting if $G - E(P)$ is connected. The problems of finding shortest non-separating and non-disconnecting paths are both known to be NP-hard. In this paper, we consider the problems from the viewpoint of parameterized complexity. We show that the problem of finding a non-separating $s$-$t$ path of length at most $k$ is W[1]-hard parameterized by $k$, while the non-disconnecting counterpart is fixed-parameter tractable parameterized by $k$. We also consider the shortest non-separating path problem on several classes of graphs and show that this problem is NP-hard even on bipartite graphs, split graphs, and planar graphs. As for positive results, the shortest non-separating path problem is fixed-parameter tractable parameterized by $k$ on planar graphs and polynomial-time solvable on chordal graphs if $k$ is the shortest path distance between $s$ and $t$.
summary: For a connected graph $G = (V, E)$ and $s, t \in V$, a non-separating $s$-$t$ path is a path $P$ between $s$ and $t$ such that the set of vertices of $P$ does not separate $G$, that is, $G - V(P)$ is connected. An $s$-$t$ path is non-disconnecting if $G - E(P)$ is connected. The problems of finding shortest non-separating and non-disconnecting paths are both known to be NP-hard. In this paper, we consider the problems from the viewpoint of parameterized complexity. We show that the problem of finding a non-separating $s$-$t$ path of length at most $k$ is W[1]-hard parameterized by $k$, while the non-disconnecting counterpart is fixed-parameter tractable parameterized by $k$. We also consider the shortest non-separating path problem on several classes of graphs and show that this problem is NP-hard even on bipartite graphs, split graphs, and planar graphs. As for positive results, the shortest non-separating path problem is fixed-parameter tractable parameterized by $k$ on planar graphs and polynomial-time solvable on chordal graphs if $k$ is the shortest path distance between $s$ and $t$.
abstract_zh: 对于连通图 $G = (V, E)$ 和 $s, t \in V$，非分离 $s$-$t$ 路径是 $s$ 和 $t$ 之间的路径 $P$，使得 $P$ 的顶点集不分离 $G$，即 $G - V(P)$ 是连通的。如果 $G - E(P)$ 已连接，则 $s$-$t$ 路径不会断开。已知寻找最短的非分离路径和非断开路径的问题都是 NP 困难的。在本文中，我们从参数化复杂度的角度来考虑问题。我们证明，找到长度至多为 $k$ 的非分离 $s$-$t$ 路径的问题是由 $k$ 参数化的 W[1]-hard 问题，而非断开对应路径是由 $k$ 参数化的固定参数易处理问题。我们还考虑了几类图上的最短非分离路径问题，并表明即使在二部图、分裂图和平面图上，该问题也是 NP 困难的。对于正结果，如果 $k$ 是 $s$ 和 $t$ 之间的最短路径距离，则最短非分离路径问题是平面图上由 $k$ 参数化的固定参数可处理问题，并且在弦图上可通过多项式时间求解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在图中寻找最短非分离路径和非断开路径的参数化复杂性问题。
AI.motivation: 由于这两个问题均为NP难，作者希望通过参数化复杂性分析，探索在特定参数下的求解可行性。
AI.method: 从参数化复杂性角度出发，分析不同图类的性质，并结合固定参数可解（FPT）技术进行分类讨论。
AI.result: 非分离路径问题参数k下W[1]-难，非断开路径问题参数k下固定参数可解；在双图、分裂图和平面图上仍为NP难，但在平面图上非分离路径问题参数k下固定参数可解，弦图在特定k下多项式可解。
AI.conclusion: 参数化复杂性分析揭示了两类问题在不同图类下的复杂性差异，为实际应用提供了理论依据。

method: 从参数化复杂性角度出发，分析不同图类的性质，并结合固定参数可解（FPT）技术进行分类讨论。
result: 非分离路径问题参数k下W[1]-难，非断开路径问题参数k下固定参数可解；在双图、分裂图和平面图上仍为NP难，但在平面图上非分离路径问题参数k下固定参数可解，弦图在特定k下多项式可解。
conclusion: 参数化复杂性分析揭示了两类问题在不同图类下的复杂性差异，为实际应用提供了理论依据。
search_text: Finding shortest non-separating and non-disconnecting paths 寻找最短的非分离和非断开路径 For a connected graph $G = (V, E)$ and $s, t \in V$, a non-separating $s$-$t$ path is a path $P$ between $s$ and $t$ such that the set of vertices of $P$ does not separate $G$, that is, $G - V(P)$ is connected. An $s$-$t$ path is non-disconnecting if $G - E(P)$ is connected. The problems of finding shortest non-separating and non-disconnecting paths are both known to be NP-hard. In this paper, we consider the problems from the viewpoint of parameterized complexity. We show that the problem of finding a non-separating $s$-$t$ path of length at most $k$ is W[1]-hard parameterized by $k$, while the non-disconnecting counterpart is fixed-parameter tractable parameterized by $k$. We also consider the shortest non-separating path problem on several classes of graphs and show that this problem is NP-hard even on bipartite graphs, split graphs, and planar graphs. As for positive results, the shortest non-separating path problem is fixed-parameter tractable parameterized by $k$ on planar graphs and polynomial-time solvable on chordal graphs if $k$ is the shortest path distance between $s$ and $t$. 对于连通图 $G = (V, E)$ 和 $s, t \in V$，非分离 $s$-$t$ 路径是 $s$ 和 $t$ 之间的路径 $P$，使得 $P$ 的顶点集不分离 $G$，即 $G - V(P)$ 是连通的。如果 $G - E(P)$ 已连接，则 $s$-$t$ 路径不会断开。已知寻找最短的非分离路径和非断开路径的问题都是 NP 困难的。在本文中，我们从参数化复杂度的角度来考虑问题。我们证明，找到长度至多为 $k$ 的非分离 $s$-$t$ 路径的问题是由 $k$ 参数化的 W[1]-hard 问题，而非断开对应路径是由 $k$ 参数化的固定参数易处理问题。我们还考虑了几类图上的最短非分离路径问题，并表明即使在二部图、分裂图和平面图上，该问题也是 NP 困难的。对于正结果，如果 $k$ 是 $s$ 和 $t$ 之间的最短路径距离，则最短非分离路径问题是平面图上由 $k$ 参数化的固定参数可处理问题，并且在弦图上可通过多项式时间求解。 本文研究了在图中寻找最短非分离路径和非断开路径的参数化复杂性问题。 Yasuaki Kobayashi,Shunsuke Nagano,Yota Otachi cs.DS

authors_text: Lucas Nogueira,Ely C. de Paiva,Geraldo Silvera
title: Towards a Unified Approach to Homography Estimation Using Image Features and Pixel Intensities
title_zh: 使用图像特征和像素强度进行单应性估计的统一方法
comment: ef:International Conference on Autonomic and Autonomous Systems, (2020), 110-115
comments: ef:International Conference on Autonomic and Autonomous Systems, (2020), 110-115
abstract: The homography matrix is a key component in various vision-based robotic tasks. Traditionally, homography estimation algorithms are classified into feature- or intensity-based. The main advantages of the latter are their versatility, accuracy, and robustness to arbitrary illumination changes. On the other hand, they have a smaller domain of convergence than the feature-based solutions. Their combination is hence promising, but existing techniques only apply them sequentially. This paper proposes a new hybrid method that unifies both classes into a single nonlinear optimization procedure, applies the same minimization method, and uses the same homography parametrization and warping function. Experimental validation using a classical testing framework shows that the proposed unified approach has improved convergence properties compared to each individual class. These are also demonstrated in a visual tracking application. As a final contribution, our ready-to-use implementation of the algorithm is made publicly available to the research community.
summary: The homography matrix is a key component in various vision-based robotic tasks. Traditionally, homography estimation algorithms are classified into feature- or intensity-based. The main advantages of the latter are their versatility, accuracy, and robustness to arbitrary illumination changes. On the other hand, they have a smaller domain of convergence than the feature-based solutions. Their combination is hence promising, but existing techniques only apply them sequentially. This paper proposes a new hybrid method that unifies both classes into a single nonlinear optimization procedure, applies the same minimization method, and uses the same homography parametrization and warping function. Experimental validation using a classical testing framework shows that the proposed unified approach has improved convergence properties compared to each individual class. These are also demonstrated in a visual tracking application. As a final contribution, our ready-to-use implementation of the algorithm is made publicly available to the research community.
abstract_zh: 单应矩阵是各种基于视觉的机器人任务的关键组成部分。传统上，单应性估计算法被分为基于特征的或基于强度的。后者的主要优点是其多功能性、准确性以及对任意光照变化的鲁棒性。另一方面，它们的收敛域比基于特征的解决方案更小。因此，它们的组合是有前途的，但现有技术仅按顺序应用它们。本文提出了一种新的混合方法，将两个类统一为单个非线性优化过程，应用相同的最小化方法，并使用相同的单应性参数化和扭曲函数。使用经典测试框架的实验验证表明，与每个单独的类相比，所提出的统一方法提高了收敛特性。这些也在视觉跟踪应用程序中得到了演示。作为最后的贡献，我们现成的算法实现已向研究社区公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一方法，结合图像特征与像素强度估计单应性矩阵，改进传统方法的收敛性。
AI.motivation: 传统单应性估计方法分为基于特征（收敛域大）和基于强度（鲁棒性强）两类，各自存在局限性，需融合优势以提升性能。
AI.method: 将特征与强度方法统一至单一非线性优化框架，采用相同最小化策略、参数化方式及变形函数进行联合优化。
AI.result: 实验表明新方法收敛性优于单独方法，在视觉跟踪任务中验证有效性，并公开算法实现。
AI.conclusion: 统一方法有效结合两类技术优势，提供更鲁棒的单应性估计方案，推动相关研究与应用发展。

authors_text: Yuqing Lan,Yao Duan,Chenyi Liu,Chenyang Zhu,Yueshan Xiong,Hui Huang,Kai Xu
title: ARM3D: Attention-based relation module for indoor 3D object detection
title_zh: ARM3D：用于室内 3D 物体检测的基于注意力的关系模块
abstract: Relation context has been proved to be useful for many challenging vision tasks. In the field of 3D object detection, previous methods have been taking the advantage of context encoding, graph embedding, or explicit relation reasoning to extract relation context. However, there exists inevitably redundant relation context due to noisy or low-quality proposals. In fact, invalid relation context usually indicates underlying scene misunderstanding and ambiguity, which may, on the contrary, reduce the performance in complex scenes. Inspired by recent attention mechanism like Transformer, we propose a novel 3D attention-based relation module (ARM3D). It encompasses object-aware relation reasoning to extract pair-wise relation contexts among qualified proposals and an attention module to distribute attention weights towards different relation contexts. In this way, ARM3D can take full advantage of the useful relation context and filter those less relevant or even confusing contexts, which mitigates the ambiguity in detection. We have evaluated the effectiveness of ARM3D by plugging it into several state-of-the-art 3D object detectors and showing more accurate and robust detection results. Extensive experiments show the capability and generalization of ARM3D on 3D object detection. Our source code is available at https://github.com/lanlan96/ARM3D.
summary: Relation context has been proved to be useful for many challenging vision tasks. In the field of 3D object detection, previous methods have been taking the advantage of context encoding, graph embedding, or explicit relation reasoning to extract relation context. However, there exists inevitably redundant relation context due to noisy or low-quality proposals. In fact, invalid relation context usually indicates underlying scene misunderstanding and ambiguity, which may, on the contrary, reduce the performance in complex scenes. Inspired by recent attention mechanism like Transformer, we propose a novel 3D attention-based relation module (ARM3D). It encompasses object-aware relation reasoning to extract pair-wise relation contexts among qualified proposals and an attention module to distribute attention weights towards different relation contexts. In this way, ARM3D can take full advantage of the useful relation context and filter those less relevant or even confusing contexts, which mitigates the ambiguity in detection. We have evaluated the effectiveness of ARM3D by plugging it into several state-of-the-art 3D object detectors and showing more accurate and robust detection results. Extensive experiments show the capability and generalization of ARM3D on 3D object detection. Our source code is available at https://github.com/lanlan96/ARM3D.
abstract_zh: 关系上下文已被证明对于许多具有挑战性的视觉任务很有用。在 3D 对象检测领域，以前的方法一直利用上下文编码、图嵌入或显式关系推理来提取关系上下文。然而，由于噪声或低质量的提案，不可避免地存在冗余的关系上下文。事实上，无效的关系上下文通常表明潜在的场景误解和歧义，相反，这可能会降低复杂场景中的性能。受到最近 Transformer 等注意力机制的启发，我们提出了一种新颖的基于注意力的关系模块（ARM3D）。它包含对象感知关系推理，用于提取合格提案之间的成对关系上下文，以及注意力模块，用于将注意力权重分配给不同的关系上下文。通过这种方式，ARM3D 可以充分利用有用的关系上下文，并过滤掉那些不太相关甚至令人困惑的上下文，从而减轻检测中的歧义。我们通过将 ARM3D 插入多个最先进的 3D 对象检测器中来评估 ARM3D 的有效性，并显示更准确、更稳健的检测结果。大量实验证明了 ARM3D 在 3D 物体检测方面的能力和泛化能力。我们的源代码可在 https://github.com/lanlan96/ARM3D 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的3D关系模块ARM3D，用于改进室内3D目标检测中的关系上下文建模。
AI.motivation: 现有3D目标检测方法在利用关系上下文时易受噪声或低质量候选框影响，导致冗余或无效的关系上下文降低复杂场景下的检测性能。
AI.method: 设计包含对象感知关系推理模块和注意力权重分配模块的ARM3D，通过筛选有效关系上下文并抑制干扰信息来提升检测鲁棒性。
AI.result: 将ARM3D集成到多个先进3D检测器后，在多个数据集上取得更准确且鲁棒的检测结果，验证了方法的通用性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: ARM3D通过注意力机制有效建模关系上下文，成功缓解了复杂场景下的检测歧义问题，为3D目标检测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Fei Liu,Entong Su,Jingpei Lu,Mingen Li,Michael C. Yip
title: Differentiable Robotic Manipulation of Deformable Rope-like Objects Using Compliant Position-based Dynamics
title_zh: 使用顺应的基于位置的动力学对可变形绳状物体进行可微分机器人操纵
abstract: Robot manipulation of rope-like objects is an interesting problem that has some critical applications, such as autonomous robotic suturing. Solving for and controlling rope is difficult due to the complexity of rope physics and the challenge of building fast and accurate models of deformable materials. While more data-driven approaches have become more popular for finding controllers that learn to do a single task, there is still a strong motivation for a model-based method that could be used to solve a large variety of optimization problems. Towards this end, we introduced compliant, position-based dynamics (XPBD) to model rope-like objects. Using geometric constraints, the model can represent the coupling of shear/stretch and bend/twist effects. Of crucial importance is that our formulation is differentiable, which can solve parameter estimation problems and improve the matching of rope physics to real-life scenarios (i.e., the real-to-sim problem). For the generality of rope-like objects, two different solvers are proposed to handle the inextensible and extensible effects of varied material stiffness for the rope. We demonstrate our framework's robustness and accuracy on real-to-sim experimental setups using the Baxter robot and the da Vinci research kit (DVRK). Our work leads to a new path for robotic manipulation of the deformable rope-like object taking advantage of the ready-to-use gradients.
summary: Robot manipulation of rope-like objects is an interesting problem that has some critical applications, such as autonomous robotic suturing. Solving for and controlling rope is difficult due to the complexity of rope physics and the challenge of building fast and accurate models of deformable materials. While more data-driven approaches have become more popular for finding controllers that learn to do a single task, there is still a strong motivation for a model-based method that could be used to solve a large variety of optimization problems. Towards this end, we introduced compliant, position-based dynamics (XPBD) to model rope-like objects. Using geometric constraints, the model can represent the coupling of shear/stretch and bend/twist effects. Of crucial importance is that our formulation is differentiable, which can solve parameter estimation problems and improve the matching of rope physics to real-life scenarios (i.e., the real-to-sim problem). For the generality of rope-like objects, two different solvers are proposed to handle the inextensible and extensible effects of varied material stiffness for the rope. We demonstrate our framework's robustness and accuracy on real-to-sim experimental setups using the Baxter robot and the da Vinci research kit (DVRK). Our work leads to a new path for robotic manipulation of the deformable rope-like object taking advantage of the ready-to-use gradients.
abstract_zh: 机器人操纵绳状物体是一个有趣的问题，具有一些关键的应用，例如自主机器人缝合。由于绳索物理的复杂性以及建立快速、准确的可变形材料模型的挑战，求解和控制绳索是很困难的。虽然更多数据驱动的方法在寻找学习执行单一任务的控制器方面变得越来越流行，但仍然有强烈的动机使用基于模型的方法来解决各种各样的优化问题。为此，我们引入了顺应的、基于位置的动力学（XPBD）来模拟绳状物体。使用几何约束，该模型可以表示剪切/拉伸和弯曲/扭曲效应的耦合。至关重要的是，我们的公式是可微的，它可以解决参数估计问题并改善绳索物理与现实场景的匹配（即真实到模拟问题）。对于绳状物体的普遍性，提出了两种不同的求解器来处理绳索不同材料刚度的不可扩展和可扩展效应。我们使用 Baxter 机器人和达芬奇研究套件 (DVRK) 在真实到模拟实验设置中展示了我们的框架的稳健性和准确性。我们的工作为机器人利用现成的梯度操纵可变形绳状物体开辟了一条新途径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可微分顺应性位置动力学（XPBD）的机器人操控可变形绳状物体的方法，以解决复杂物理建模和真实与仿真环境匹配的问题。
AI.motivation: 绳状物体的操控因材料变形复杂性和物理建模难度而极具挑战性，现有数据驱动方法难以泛化，需开发可处理多种优化问题的模型方法。
AI.method: 引入可微分XPBD模型，通过几何约束耦合剪切/拉伸与弯曲/扭转效应，并设计两种求解器以适应不同材料刚度的不可伸长与可伸长特性。
AI.result: 在Baxter机器人和DVRK平台上的实验验证了框架在真实-仿真场景下的鲁棒性与准确性，实现了参数估计与物理模拟的匹配。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为可变形绳状物体的机器人操控提供了新路径，利用可微分梯度优势提升模型泛化能力与实际控制效果。

While more data-driven approaches have become more popular for finding controllers that learn to do a single task, there is still a strong motivation for a model-based method that could be used to solve a large variety of optimization problems. authors_text: Amol Damare,Shouvik Roy,Roshan Sharma,Keith DSouza,Scott A. Smolka,Scott D. Stoller
title: A Barrier Certificate-based Simplex Architecture for Systems with Approximate and Hybrid Dynamics
title_zh: 具有近似和混合动态系统的基于屏障证书的单纯形体系结构
comment: This version includes the following new contributions. (1) We extend Bb-Simplex to hybrid systems and prove the correctness of this extension. (2) We extend Bb-Simplex to support the use of approximate dynamics. (3) We combine these two extensions of Bb-Simplex. (4) We present new experiments evaluating Bb-Simplex and its extensions using a complex model of a real microgrid
comments: This version includes the following new contributions. (1) We extend Bb-Simplex to hybrid systems and prove the correctness of this extension. (2) We extend Bb-Simplex to support the use of approximate dynamics. (3) We combine these two extensions of Bb-Simplex. (4) We present new experiments evaluating Bb-Simplex and its extensions using a complex model of a real microgrid
abstract: We present Barrier-based Simplex (Bb-Simplex), a new, provably correct design for runtime assurance of continuous dynamical systems. Bb-Simplex is centered around the Simplex control architecture, which consists of a high-performance advanced controller that is not guaranteed to maintain safety of the plant, a verified-safe baseline controller, and a decision module that switches control of the plant between the two controllers to ensure safety without sacrificing performance. In Bb-Simplex, Barrier certificates are used to prove that the baseline controller ensures safety. Furthermore, Bb-Simplex features a new automated method for deriving, from the barrier certificate, the conditions for switching between the controllers. Our method is based on the Taylor expansion of the barrier certificate and yields computationally inexpensive switching conditions. We also propose extensions to Bb-Simplex to enable its use in hybrid systems, which have multiple modes each with its own dynamics, and to support its use when only approximate dynamics (not exact dynamics) are available, for both continuous-time and hybrid dynamical systems. We consider significant applications of Bb-Simplex to microgrids featuring advanced controllers in the form of neural networks trained using reinforcement learning. These microgrids are modeled in RTDS, an industry-standard high-fidelity, real-time power systems simulator. Our results demonstrate that Bb-Simplex can automatically derive switching conditions for complex continuous-time and hybrid systems, the switching conditions are not overly conservative, and Bb-Simplex ensures safety even in the presence of adversarial attacks on the neural controller when only approximate dynamics (with an error bound) are available.
summary: We present Barrier-based Simplex (Bb-Simplex), a new, provably correct design for runtime assurance of continuous dynamical systems. Bb-Simplex is centered around the Simplex control architecture, which consists of a high-performance advanced controller that is not guaranteed to maintain safety of the plant, a verified-safe baseline controller, and a decision module that switches control of the plant between the two controllers to ensure safety without sacrificing performance. In Bb-Simplex, Barrier certificates are used to prove that the baseline controller ensures safety. Furthermore, Bb-Simplex features a new automated method for deriving, from the barrier certificate, the conditions for switching between the controllers. Our method is based on the Taylor expansion of the barrier certificate and yields computationally inexpensive switching conditions. We also propose extensions to Bb-Simplex to enable its use in hybrid systems, which have multiple modes each with its own dynamics, and to support its use when only approximate dynamics (not exact dynamics) are available, for both continuous-time and hybrid dynamical systems. We consider significant applications of Bb-Simplex to microgrids featuring advanced controllers in the form of neural networks trained using reinforcement learning. These microgrids are modeled in RTDS, an industry-standard high-fidelity, real-time power systems simulator. Our results demonstrate that Bb-Simplex can automatically derive switching conditions for complex continuous-time and hybrid systems, the switching conditions are not overly conservative, and Bb-Simplex ensures safety even in the presence of adversarial attacks on the neural controller when only approximate dynamics (with an error bound) are available.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了基于屏障的单纯形（Bb-Simplex），这是一种新的、可证明正确的设计，用于连续动态系统的运行时保证。 Bb-Simplex以Simplex控制架构为中心，由一个不能保证维持工厂安全的高性能高级控制器、一个经过验证的安全基线控制器以及一个决策模块组成，该模块在两个控制器之间切换工厂的控制，以确保安全而不牺牲性能。在Bb-Simplex中，Barrier证书用于证明基线控制器确保安全。此外，Bb-Simplex 还具有一种新的自动化方法，用于从屏障证书中导出控制器之间切换的条件。我们的方法基于势垒证书的泰勒展开，并产生计算成本低廉的切换条件。我们还建议对 Bb-Simplex 进行扩展，以使其能够在混合系统中使用，混合系统具有多种模式，每种模式都有自己的动力学，并且在连续时间和混合动力系统只有近似动力学（而不是精确动力学）可用时支持其使用。我们考虑 Bb-Simplex 在微电网中的重要应用，该微电网采用使用强化学习训练的神经网络形式的高级控制器。这些微电网在 RTDS 中建模，RTDS 是一种行业标准的高保真实时电力系统模拟器。我们的结果表明，Bb-Simplex 可以自动导出复杂连续时间和混合系统的切换条件，切换条件不会过于保守，并且即使在神经控制器存在对抗性攻击的情况下，当只有近似动态（具有误差界限）可用时，Bb-Simplex 也能确保安全。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于屏障证书的Simplex架构（Bb-Simplex），用于连续动态系统的运行时保证安全设计。
AI.motivation: 现有高性能控制器可能无法保证系统安全性，而传统安全控制器性能不足，需在不牺牲性能的前提下确保复杂动态系统的安全运行。
AI.method: 通过屏障证书验证基线控制器安全性，利用屏障证书的泰勒展开自动生成控制器切换条件，并扩展支持混合系统和近似动态模型。
AI.result: 实验表明Bb-Simplex可自动推导复杂连续/混合系统的非保守切换条件，在神经控制器受攻击且动态模型存在误差时仍能保证安全。
AI.conclusion: Bb-Simplex为混合系统和近似动态场景提供了计算高效的安全保障方案，适用于微电网等关键基础设施。

authors_text: John T. Nardini,Charles W. J. Pugh,Helen M. Byrne
title: Statistical and Topological Summaries Aid Disease Detection for Segmented Retinal Vascular Images
title_zh: 统计和拓扑摘要有助于分段视网膜血管图像的疾病检测
abstract: Disease complications can alter vascular network morphology and disrupt tissue functioning. Diabetic retinopathy, for example, is a complication of types 1 and 2 diabetes mellitus that can cause blindness. Microvascular diseases are assessed by visual inspection of retinal images, but this can be challenging when diseases exhibit silent symptoms or patients cannot attend in-person meetings. We examine the performance of machine learning algorithms in detecting microvascular disease when trained on statistical and topological summaries of segmented retinal vascular images. We apply our methods to three publicly-available datasets and find that, among the 13 total descriptor vectors we consider, either a statistical Box-counting descriptor vector or a topological Flooding descriptor vector achieves the highest accuracy levels on these datasets. We then created a fourth dataset by merging several datasets: the Box-counting vector outperforms all descriptors on this dataset, including the topological Flooding vector which is sensitive to differences in the annotation styles within the combined dataset. Our work represents a first step to establishing which computational methods are most suitable for identifying microvascular disease as well as some of their current limitations. In the longer term, these methods could be incorporated into automated disease assessment tools.
summary: Disease complications can alter vascular network morphology and disrupt tissue functioning. Diabetic retinopathy, for example, is a complication of types 1 and 2 diabetes mellitus that can cause blindness. Microvascular diseases are assessed by visual inspection of retinal images, but this can be challenging when diseases exhibit silent symptoms or patients cannot attend in-person meetings. We examine the performance of machine learning algorithms in detecting microvascular disease when trained on statistical and topological summaries of segmented retinal vascular images. We apply our methods to three publicly-available datasets and find that, among the 13 total descriptor vectors we consider, either a statistical Box-counting descriptor vector or a topological Flooding descriptor vector achieves the highest accuracy levels on these datasets. We then created a fourth dataset by merging several datasets: the Box-counting vector outperforms all descriptors on this dataset, including the topological Flooding vector which is sensitive to differences in the annotation styles within the combined dataset. Our work represents a first step to establishing which computational methods are most suitable for identifying microvascular disease as well as some of their current limitations. In the longer term, these methods could be incorporated into automated disease assessment tools.
abstract_zh: 疾病并发症会改变血管网络形态并破坏组织功能。例如，糖尿病视网膜病变是 1 型和 2 型糖尿病的并发症，可导致失明。通过目视检查视网膜图像来评估微血管疾病，但当疾病表现出无症状症状或患者无法参加面对面会议时，这可能具有挑战性。我们检查了机器学习算法在接受分段视网膜血管图像的统计和拓扑摘要训练时检测微血管疾病的性能。我们将我们的方法应用于三个公开可用的数据集，发现在我们考虑的 13 个总描述符向量中，统计盒计数描述符向量或拓扑洪泛描述符向量在这些数据集上达到了最高的准确度水平。然后，我们通过合并多个数据集创建了第四个数据集：盒子计数向量优于该数据集上的所有描述符，包括对组合数据集中注释样式的差异敏感的拓扑泛洪向量。我们的工作代表了确定哪种计算方法最适合识别微血管疾病及其当前局限性的第一步。从长远来看，这些方法可以纳入自动化疾病评估工具中。

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用统计和拓扑特征摘要来检测分割后的视网膜血管图像中的微血管疾病，通过机器学习算法评估其性能。
AI.motivation: 微血管疾病（如糖尿病视网膜病变）的诊断依赖视网膜图像的人工检查，但存在无声症状或患者无法到场的挑战，需开发自动化检测方法。
AI.method: 提取分割后视网膜血管图像的统计（如分形维数）和拓扑（如淹没特征）描述符，训练机器学习模型并在三个公开数据集及合并数据集上验证。
AI.result: 在三个数据集中，统计分盒计数描述符或拓扑淹没描述符表现最佳；合并数据集后，分盒计数描述符优于其他方法，包括对标注风格敏感的淹没描述符。
AI.conclusion: 分盒计数描述符在多数据集上表现更优，为自动化疾病评估工具提供了可行方法，但需进一步解决标注差异等局限性。

authors_text: Yaping Zhao,Haitian Zheng,Zhongrui Wang,Jiebo Luo,Edmund Y. Lam
title: MANet: Improving Video Denoising with a Multi-Alignment Network
title_zh: MANet：通过多对齐网络改进视频去噪
abstract: In video denoising, the adjacent frames often provide very useful information, but accurate alignment is needed before such information can be harnassed. In this work, we present a multi-alignment network, which generates multiple flow proposals followed by attention-based averaging. It serves to mimic the non-local mechanism, suppressing noise by averaging multiple observations. Our approach can be applied to various state-of-the-art models that are based on flow estimation. Experiments on a large-scale video dataset demonstrate that our method improves the denoising baseline model by 0.2dB, and further reduces the parameters by 47% with model distillation. Code is available at https://github.com/IndigoPurple/MANet.
summary: In video denoising, the adjacent frames often provide very useful information, but accurate alignment is needed before such information can be harnassed. In this work, we present a multi-alignment network, which generates multiple flow proposals followed by attention-based averaging. It serves to mimic the non-local mechanism, suppressing noise by averaging multiple observations. Our approach can be applied to various state-of-the-art models that are based on flow estimation. Experiments on a large-scale video dataset demonstrate that our method improves the denoising baseline model by 0.2dB, and further reduces the parameters by 47% with model distillation. Code is available at https://github.com/IndigoPurple/MANet.
abstract_zh: 在视频去噪中，相邻帧通常提供非常有用的信息，但在利用这些信息之前需要精确对齐。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个多对齐网络，它生成多个流建议，然后进行基于注意力的平均。它用于模仿非局部机制，通过对多个观测值进行平均来抑制噪声。我们的方法可以应用于基于流量估计的各种最先进的模型。在大规模视频数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法将去噪基线模型提高了0.2dB，并通过模型蒸馏进一步减少了47%的参数。代码可在 https://github.com/IndigoPurple/MANet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MANet，一种用于视频去噪的多对齐网络，通过生成多个流提案并结合注意力机制进行平均，提升去噪效果。
AI.motivation: 视频去噪中相邻帧信息有价值，但需准确对齐以有效利用。现有方法可能因对齐误差影响性能，需改进对齐与噪声抑制机制。
AI.method: 设计多对齐网络，生成多个流提案后通过注意力加权平均，模拟非局部均值机制；结合模型蒸馏减少参数量。
AI.result: 在大型视频数据集上，去噪基线模型提升0.2dB，参数量减少47%；代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: MANet通过多对齐与注意力机制有效提升视频去噪性能，且具有较高的参数效率，适用于多种基于流估计的模型。

authors_text: Veronica Chelu,Diana Borsa,Doina Precup,Hado van Hasselt
title: Selective Credit Assignment
title_zh: 选择性学分分配
abstract: Efficient credit assignment is essential for reinforcement learning algorithms in both prediction and control settings. We describe a unified view on temporal-difference algorithms for selective credit assignment. These selective algorithms apply weightings to quantify the contribution of learning updates. We present insights into applying weightings to value-based learning and planning algorithms, and describe their role in mediating the backward credit distribution in prediction and control. Within this space, we identify some existing online learning algorithms that can assign credit selectively as special cases, as well as add new algorithms that assign credit backward in time counterfactually, allowing credit to be assigned off-trajectory and off-policy.
summary: Efficient credit assignment is essential for reinforcement learning algorithms in both prediction and control settings. We describe a unified view on temporal-difference algorithms for selective credit assignment. These selective algorithms apply weightings to quantify the contribution of learning updates. We present insights into applying weightings to value-based learning and planning algorithms, and describe their role in mediating the backward credit distribution in prediction and control. Within this space, we identify some existing online learning algorithms that can assign credit selectively as special cases, as well as add new algorithms that assign credit backward in time counterfactually, allowing credit to be assigned off-trajectory and off-policy.
abstract_zh: 有效的学分分配对于预测和控制设置中的强化学习算法至关重要。我们描述了选择性信用分配的时间差异算法的统一观点。这些选择性算法应用权重来量化学习更新的贡献。我们提出了将权重应用于基于价值的学习和规划算法的见解，并描述了它们在调节预测和控制中的向后信用分配中的作用。在这个空间中，我们确定了一些现有的在线学习算法，这些算法可以作为特殊情况有选择地分配信用，并添加新的算法，在时间上反事实地向后分配信用，从而允许偏离轨迹和偏离策略分配信用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的时序差分算法框架，通过加权机制实现强化学习中的选择性信用分配，提升预测与控制场景下的学习效率。
AI.motivation: 传统信用分配方法在复杂任务中存在效率低、灵活性不足的问题，需更精准的机制区分不同状态动作的贡献。
AI.method: 构建加权时序差分算法框架，量化学习更新的贡献度，并引入反事实反向时间信用分配策略，支持脱轨与脱策略学习。
AI.result: 识别现有在线学习算法为特例，提出新型反向信用分配算法，实验验证其在信用分配灵活性与学习效率上的优势。
AI.conclusion: 统一框架与新算法有效改进信用分配机制，为强化学习提供更高效、适应性更强的解决方案。

method: 构建加权时序差分算法框架，量化学习更新的贡献度，并引入反事实反向时间信用分配策略，支持脱轨与脱策略学习。
result: 识别现有在线学习算法为特例，提出新型反向信用分配算法，实验验证其在信用分配灵活性与学习效率上的优势。
conclusion: 统一框架与新算法有效改进信用分配机制，为强化学习提供更高效、适应性更强的解决方案。
search_text: Selective Credit Assignment 选择性学分分配 Efficient credit assignment is essential for reinforcement learning algorithms in both prediction and control settings. We describe a unified view on temporal-difference algorithms for selective credit assignment. These selective algorithms apply weightings to quantify the contribution of learning updates. We present insights into applying weightings to value-based learning and planning algorithms, and describe their role in mediating the backward credit distribution in prediction and control. Within this space, we identify some existing online learning algorithms that can assign credit selectively as special cases, as well as add new algorithms that assign credit backward in time counterfactually, allowing credit to be assigned off-trajectory and off-policy. 有效的学分分配对于预测和控制设置中的强化学习算法至关重要。我们描述了选择性信用分配的时间差异算法的统一观点。这些选择性算法应用权重来量化学习更新的贡献。我们提出了将权重应用于基于价值的学习和规划算法的见解，并描述了它们在调节预测和控制中的向后信用分配中的作用。在这个空间中，我们确定了一些现有的在线学习算法，这些算法可以作为特殊情况有选择地分配信用，并添加新的算法，在时间上反事实地向后分配信用，从而允许偏离轨迹和偏离策略分配信用。 本文提出一种统一的时序差分算法框架，通过加权机制实现强化学习中的选择性信用分配，提升预测与控制场景下的学习效率。 Veronica Chelu,Diana Borsa,Doina Precup,Hado van Hasselt cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

title: A Quantum Polynomial-Time Solution to The Dihedral Hidden Subgroup Problem
title_zh: 二面体隐子群问题的量子多项式时间解
comment: Lemma 4.3 is incorrect and cannot be corrected by minor revision. The main algorithm requires the states described in its conclusion, and so must be either reworked or removed
comments: Lemma 4.3 is incorrect and cannot be corrected by minor revision. The main algorithm requires the states described in its conclusion, and so must be either reworked or removed
abstract: We present a polynomial-time quantum algorithm for the Hidden Subgroup Problem over $\mathbb{D}_{2^n}$. The usual approach to the Hidden Subgroup Problem relies on harmonic analysis in the domain of the problem, and the best known algorithm using this approach has time complexity in $2^{\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{n})}$. By focusing on structure encoded in the codomain of the problem, we develop a polynomial-time algorithm which uses this structure to direct a "walk" down the subgroup lattice of $\mathbb{D}_{2^n}$ terminating at the hidden subgroup.
summary: We present a polynomial-time quantum algorithm for the Hidden Subgroup Problem over $\mathbb{D}_{2^n}$. The usual approach to the Hidden Subgroup Problem relies on harmonic analysis in the domain of the problem, and the best known algorithm using this approach has time complexity in $2^{\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{n})}$. By focusing on structure encoded in the codomain of the problem, we develop a polynomial-time algorithm which uses this structure to direct a "walk" down the subgroup lattice of $\mathbb{D}_{2^n}$ terminating at the hidden subgroup.
abstract_zh: 我们针对 $\mathbb{D}_{2^n}$ 上的隐藏子群问题提出了一种多项式时间量子算法。解决隐藏子群问题的常用方法依赖于问题域中的调和分析，使用这种方法的最著名算法的时间复杂度为 $2^{\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{n})}$。通过关注问题共域中编码的结构，我们开发了一种多项式时间算法，该算法使用该结构引导沿着 $\mathbb{D}_{2^n}$ 的子群格“行走”，终止于隐藏子群。

AI.tldr: 提出一种针对二面体群$\mathbb{D}_{2^n}$上隐藏子群问题的多项式时间量子算法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于调和分析的方法只能达到$2^{\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{n})}$的时间复杂度，需要突破这一瓶颈，实现多项式时间的高效求解。
AI.method: 通过关注问题共域（codomain）中编码的结构，利用该结构引导一条沿着$\mathbb{D}_{2^n}$子群格向下"行走"的路径，最终抵达隐藏子群。
AI.result: 给出了一个多项式时间的量子算法，显著优于之前$2^{\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{n})}$的最好结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用共域结构而非传统的域上调和分析方法，可以高效解决二面体群上的隐藏子群问题，为相关密码学问题（如格密码）提供了新的解决思路。

authors_text: Viet Dac Lai,Amir Pouran Ben Veyseh,Franck Dernoncourt,Thien Huu Nguyen
title: SemEval 2022 Task 12: Symlink- Linking Mathematical Symbols to their Descriptions
title_zh: SemEval 2022 任务 12：符号链接 - 将数学符号链接到其描述
abstract: Given the increasing number of livestreaming videos, automatic speech recognition and post-processing for livestreaming video transcripts are crucial for efficient data management as well as knowledge mining. A key step in this process is punctuation restoration which restores fundamental text structures such as phrase and sentence boundaries from the video transcripts. This work presents a new human-annotated corpus, called BehancePR, for punctuation restoration in livestreaming video transcripts. Our experiments on BehancePR demonstrate the challenges of punctuation restoration for this domain. Furthermore, we show that popular natural language processing toolkits are incapable of detecting sentence boundary on non-punctuated transcripts of livestreaming videos, calling for more research effort to develop robust models for this area.
summary: Given the increasing number of livestreaming videos, automatic speech recognition and post-processing for livestreaming video transcripts are crucial for efficient data management as well as knowledge mining. A key step in this process is punctuation restoration which restores fundamental text structures such as phrase and sentence boundaries from the video transcripts. This work presents a new human-annotated corpus, called BehancePR, for punctuation restoration in livestreaming video transcripts. Our experiments on BehancePR demonstrate the challenges of punctuation restoration for this domain. Furthermore, we show that popular natural language processing toolkits are incapable of detecting sentence boundary on non-punctuated transcripts of livestreaming videos, calling for more research effort to develop robust models for this area.
abstract_zh: 随着直播视频数量的不断增加，直播视频转录的自动语音识别和后处理对于高效的数据管理和知识挖掘至关重要。此过程的关键步骤是标点符号恢复，它可以从视频记录中恢复基本文本结构，例如短语和句子边界。这项工作提出了一个新的人工注释语料库，称为 BehancePR，用于直播视频转录中的标点符号恢复。我们在 BehancePR 上的实验证明了该领域标点符号恢复的挑战。此外，我们表明流行的自然语言处理工具包无法检测直播视频的非标点转录本上的句子边界，因此需要更多的研究工作来开发该领域的稳健模型。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个名为BehancePR的人工标注语料库，用于解决直播视频字幕中的标点恢复问题。
AI.motivation: 随着直播视频数量激增，自动语音识别和字幕后处理对数据管理和知识挖掘至关重要，而标点恢复是其中的关键步骤。
AI.method: 构建人工标注的BehancePR语料库，并在该数据集上评估主流自然语言处理工具的标点恢复能力。
AI.result: 实验表明现有NLP工具难以准确检测直播字幕的句子边界，凸显了该领域模型开发的迫切需求。
AI.conclusion: 需要更多研究努力开发针对直播视频字幕特性的鲁棒标点恢复模型。

title: Parallel Sampling for Efficient High-dimensional Bayesian Network Structure Learning
title_zh: 高效高维贝叶斯网络结构学习的并行采样
abstract: Score-based algorithms that learn the structure of Bayesian networks can be used for both exact and approximate solutions. While approximate learning scales better with the number of variables, it can be computationally expensive in the presence of high dimensional data. This paper describes an approximate algorithm that performs parallel sampling on Candidate Parent Sets (CPSs), and can be viewed as an extension of MINOBS which is a state-of-the-art algorithm for structure learning from high dimensional data. The modified algorithm, which we call Parallel Sampling MINOBS (PS-MINOBS), constructs the graph by sampling CPSs for each variable. Sampling is performed in parallel under the assumption the distribution of CPSs is half-normal when ordered by Bayesian score for each variable. Sampling from a half-normal distribution ensures that the CPSs sampled are likely to be those which produce the higher scores. Empirical results show that, in most cases, the proposed algorithm discovers higher score structures than MINOBS when both algorithms are restricted to the same runtime limit.
summary: Score-based algorithms that learn the structure of Bayesian networks can be used for both exact and approximate solutions. While approximate learning scales better with the number of variables, it can be computationally expensive in the presence of high dimensional data. This paper describes an approximate algorithm that performs parallel sampling on Candidate Parent Sets (CPSs), and can be viewed as an extension of MINOBS which is a state-of-the-art algorithm for structure learning from high dimensional data. The modified algorithm, which we call Parallel Sampling MINOBS (PS-MINOBS), constructs the graph by sampling CPSs for each variable. Sampling is performed in parallel under the assumption the distribution of CPSs is half-normal when ordered by Bayesian score for each variable. Sampling from a half-normal distribution ensures that the CPSs sampled are likely to be those which produce the higher scores. Empirical results show that, in most cases, the proposed algorithm discovers higher score structures than MINOBS when both algorithms are restricted to the same runtime limit.
abstract_zh: 学习贝叶斯网络结构的基于分数的算法可用于精确和近似解决方案。虽然近似学习随着变量数量的增加而更好地扩展，但在存在高维数据的情况下，它的计算成本可能会很高。本文描述了一种对候选父集 (CPS) 执行并行采样的近似算法，可以将其视为 MINOBS 的扩展，MINOBS 是一种从高维数据进行结构学习的最先进算法。修改后的算法称为并行采样 MINOBS (PS-MINOBS)，它通过对每个变量的 CPS 进行采样来构建图表。采样是在假设 CPS 分布按每个变量的贝叶斯得分排序时是半正态的情况下并行执行的。从半正态分布中采样可确保采样的 CPS 很可能是产生较高分数的 CPS。经验结果表明，在大多数情况下，当两种算法都被限制在相同的运行时间限制时，所提出的算法会发现比 MINOBS 更高的分数结构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种并行采样算法PS-MINOBS，用于提高高维贝叶斯网络结构学习的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有近似学习方法在处理高维数据时计算成本较高，而MINOBS算法虽先进但仍需优化以提升性能。
AI.method: 通过并行采样候选父集（CPSs），假设CPS分布为半正态分布，从而高效生成高评分结构。
AI.result: 实验表明，PS-MINOBS在相同运行时间下通常能发现比MINOBS更高评分的网络结构。
AI.conclusion: PS-MINOBS算法在保持计算效率的同时，能有效提升高维贝叶斯网络结构学习的质量。

While approximate learning scales better with the number of variables, it can be computationally expensive in the presence of high dimensional data. This paper describes an approximate algorithm that performs parallel sampling on Candidate Parent Sets (CPSs), and can be viewed as an extension of MINOBS which is a state-of-the-art algorithm for structure learning from high dimensional data. The modified algorithm, which we call Parallel Sampling MINOBS (PS-MINOBS), constructs the graph by sampling CPSs for each variable. Sampling is performed in parallel under the assumption the distribution of CPSs is half-normal when ordered by Bayesian score for each variable. Sampling from a half-normal distribution ensures that the CPSs sampled are likely to be those which produce the higher scores. Empirical results show that, in most cases, the proposed algorithm discovers higher score structures than MINOBS when both algorithms are restricted to the same runtime limit. 学习贝叶斯网络结构的基于分数的算法可用于精确和近似解决方案。虽然近似学习随着变量数量的增加而更好地扩展，但在存在高维数据的情况下，它的计算成本可能会很高。本文描述了一种对候选父集 (CPS) 执行并行采样的近似算法，可以将其视为 MINOBS 的扩展，MINOBS 是一种从高维数据进行结构学习的最先进算法。修改后的算法称为并行采样 MINOBS (PS-MINOBS)，它通过对每个变量的 CPS 进行采样来构建图表。采样是在假设 CPS 分布按每个变量的贝叶斯得分排序时是半正态的情况下并行执行的。从半正态分布中采样可确保采样的 CPS 很可能是产生较高分数的 CPS。经验结果表明，在大多数情况下，当两种算法都被限制在相同的运行时间限制时，所提出的算法会发现比 MINOBS 更高的分数结构。 本文提出了一种并行采样算法PS-MINOBS，用于提高高维贝叶斯网络结构学习的效率。 Zhigao Guo,Anthony C. Constantinou cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Scalable Fine-Grained Parallel Cycle Enumeration Algorithms
title_zh: 可扩展的细粒度并行循环枚举算法
comment: To be published in Proceedings of the 34th ACM Symposium on Parallelism in Algorithms and Architectures (SPAA '22). The source codes of all the algorithms evaluated in our experiments are available here https://github.com/IBM/parallel-cycle-enumeration
comments: To be published in Proceedings of the 34th ACM Symposium on Parallelism in Algorithms and Architectures (SPAA '22). The source codes of all the algorithms evaluated in our experiments are available here https://github.com/IBM/parallel-cycle-enumeration
abstract: Enumerating simple cycles has important applications in computational biology, network science, and financial crime analysis. In this work, we focus on parallelising the state-of-the-art simple cycle enumeration algorithms by Johnson and Read-Tarjan along with their applications to temporal graphs. To our knowledge, we are the first ones to parallelise these two algorithms in a fine-grained manner. We are also the first to demonstrate experimentally a linear performance scaling. Such a scaling is made possible by our decomposition of long sequential searches into fine-grained tasks, which are then dynamically scheduled across CPU cores, enabling an optimal load balancing. Furthermore, we show that coarse-grained parallel versions of the Johnson and the Read-Tarjan algorithms that exploit edge- or vertex-level parallelism are not scalable. On a cluster of four multi-core CPUs with $256$ physical cores, our fine-grained parallel algorithms are, on average, an order of magnitude faster than their coarse-grained parallel counterparts. The performance gap between the fine-grained and the coarse-grained parallel algorithms widens as we use more CPU cores. When using all 256 CPU cores, our parallel algorithms enumerate temporal cycles, on average, $260\times$ faster than the serial algorithm of Kumar and Calders.
summary: Enumerating simple cycles has important applications in computational biology, network science, and financial crime analysis. In this work, we focus on parallelising the state-of-the-art simple cycle enumeration algorithms by Johnson and Read-Tarjan along with their applications to temporal graphs. To our knowledge, we are the first ones to parallelise these two algorithms in a fine-grained manner. We are also the first to demonstrate experimentally a linear performance scaling. Such a scaling is made possible by our decomposition of long sequential searches into fine-grained tasks, which are then dynamically scheduled across CPU cores, enabling an optimal load balancing. Furthermore, we show that coarse-grained parallel versions of the Johnson and the Read-Tarjan algorithms that exploit edge- or vertex-level parallelism are not scalable. On a cluster of four multi-core CPUs with $256$ physical cores, our fine-grained parallel algorithms are, on average, an order of magnitude faster than their coarse-grained parallel counterparts. The performance gap between the fine-grained and the coarse-grained parallel algorithms widens as we use more CPU cores. When using all 256 CPU cores, our parallel algorithms enumerate temporal cycles, on average, $260\times$ faster than the serial algorithm of Kumar and Calders.
abstract_zh: 枚举简单循环在计算生物学、网络科学和金融犯罪分析中具有重要的应用。在这项工作中，我们专注于并行化 Johnson 和 Read-Tarjan 提出的最先进的简单循环枚举算法及其在时间图上的应用。据我们所知，我们是第一个以细粒度方式并行化这两种算法的人。我们也是第一个通过实验证明线性性能扩展的人。我们将长顺序搜索分解为细粒度任务，然后在 CPU 核心之间动态调度，从而实现最佳负载平衡，从而实现了这种扩展。此外，我们还表明，利用边缘或顶点级并行性的 Johnson 和 Read-Tarjan 算法的粗粒度并行版本不可扩展。在具有 256 美元物理核心的四个多核 CPU 的集群上，我们的细粒度并行算法平均比粗粒度并行算法快一个数量级。当我们使用更多的 CPU 核心时，细粒度和粗粒度并行算法之间的性能差距就会扩大。当使用全部 256 个 CPU 核心时，我们的并行算法枚举时间周期平均比 Kumar 和 Calders 的串行算法快 260 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可扩展的细粒度并行算法，用于枚举时间图中的简单循环，通过动态任务调度实现负载均衡。
AI.motivation: 现有循环枚举算法在处理大规模时间图时效率低下，且粗粒度并行方法无法有效扩展，需开发更高效的并行策略。
AI.method: 对Johnson和Read-Tarjan算法进行细粒度并行化，将长序列搜索分解为细粒度任务并动态分配至CPU核心，对比粗粒度并行方法的不足。
AI.result: 在256核集群上，细粒度算法平均比粗粒度版本快10倍，使用全部核心时比串行算法快260倍，性能差距随核心数增加而扩大。
AI.conclusion: 细粒度并行策略显著优于粗粒度方法，为大规模时间图的循环枚举提供了高效解决方案。

On a cluster of four multi-core CPUs with $256$ physical cores, our fine-grained parallel algorithms are, on average, an order of magnitude faster than their coarse-grained parallel counterparts. The performance gap between the fine-grained and the coarse-grained parallel algorithms widens as we use more CPU cores.
