title: Simple Genetic Operators are Universal Approximators of Probability Distributions (and other Advantages of Expressive Encodings)
title_zh: 简单遗传算子是概率分布的通用逼近器（以及表达编码的其他优点）
comment: Received a best paper award at GECCO 2022; 10 pages, with 5 page appendix
comments: Received a best paper award at GECCO 2022; 10 pages, with 5 page appendix
abstract: This paper characterizes the inherent power of evolutionary algorithms. This power depends on the computational properties of the genetic encoding. With some encodings, two parents recombined with a simple crossover operator can sample from an arbitrary distribution of child phenotypes. Such encodings are termed \emph{expressive encodings} in this paper. Universal function approximators, including popular evolutionary substrates of genetic programming and neural networks, can be used to construct expressive encodings. Remarkably, this approach need not be applied only to domains where the phenotype is a function: Expressivity can be achieved even when optimizing static structures, such as binary vectors. Such simpler settings make it possible to characterize expressive encodings theoretically: Across a variety of test problems, expressive encodings are shown to achieve up to super-exponential convergence speed-ups over the standard direct encoding. The conclusion is that, across evolutionary computation areas as diverse as genetic programming, neuroevolution, genetic algorithms, and theory, expressive encodings can be a key to understanding and realizing the full power of evolution.
summary: This paper characterizes the inherent power of evolutionary algorithms. This power depends on the computational properties of the genetic encoding. With some encodings, two parents recombined with a simple crossover operator can sample from an arbitrary distribution of child phenotypes. Such encodings are termed \emph{expressive encodings} in this paper. Universal function approximators, including popular evolutionary substrates of genetic programming and neural networks, can be used to construct expressive encodings. Remarkably, this approach need not be applied only to domains where the phenotype is a function: Expressivity can be achieved even when optimizing static structures, such as binary vectors. Such simpler settings make it possible to characterize expressive encodings theoretically: Across a variety of test problems, expressive encodings are shown to achieve up to super-exponential convergence speed-ups over the standard direct encoding. The conclusion is that, across evolutionary computation areas as diverse as genetic programming, neuroevolution, genetic algorithms, and theory, expressive encodings can be a key to understanding and realizing the full power of evolution.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了进化算法的内在力量。这种能力取决于遗传编码的计算特性。通过某些编码，两个亲本通过简单的交叉算子重新组合，可以从子代表型的任意分布中进行采样。这种编码在本文中被称为\emph{表达编码}。通用函数逼近器，包括流行的遗传编程和神经网络的进化基础，可用于构建表达编码。值得注意的是，这种方法不需要仅应用于表型是函数的领域：即使在优化静态结构（例如二元向量）时也可以实现表达能力。这种更简单的设置使得从理论上表征表达性编码成为可能：在各种测试问题中，表达性编码被证明可以比标准直接编码实现超指数收敛加速。结论是，在遗传编程、神经进化、遗传算法和理论等不同的进化计算领域，表达编码可能是理解和实现进化全部力量的关键。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了表达性编码在进化算法中的强大能力，证明其能作为概率分布的通用逼近器，并在多个领域展示其优势。
AI.motivation: 传统编码在进化计算中存在表达能力不足的问题，限制了算法效率，需要更高效的编码方式来提升性能。
AI.method: 通过构建表达性编码，利用通用函数逼近器（如遗传编程和神经网络），结合理论分析与实验验证其效果。
AI.result: 实验显示，表达性编码在多种问题上比标准直接编码快数倍，甚至实现超指数级收敛加速。
AI.conclusion: 表达性编码是遗传编程、神经进化等领域的关键，能充分发挥进化的潜力。

title: Reward Modeling for Mitigating Toxicity in Transformer-based Language Models
title_zh: 用于减轻基于 Transformer 的语言模型中的毒性的奖励建模
abstract: Transformer-based language models are able to generate fluent text and be efficiently adapted across various natural language generation tasks. However, language models that are pretrained on large unlabeled web text corpora have been shown to suffer from degenerating toxic content and social bias behaviors, consequently hindering their safe deployment. Various detoxification methods were proposed to mitigate the language model's toxicity; however, these methods struggled to detoxify language models when conditioned on prompts that contain specific social identities related to gender, race, or religion. In this study, we propose Reinforce-Detoxify; A reinforcement learning-based method for mitigating toxicity in language models. We address the challenge of safety in language models and propose a new reward model that is able to detect toxic content and mitigate unintended bias towards social identities in toxicity prediction. The experiments demonstrate that the Reinforce-Detoxify method for language model detoxification outperforms existing detoxification approaches in automatic evaluation metrics, indicating the ability of our approach in language model detoxification and less prone to unintended bias toward social identities in generated content.
summary: Transformer-based language models are able to generate fluent text and be efficiently adapted across various natural language generation tasks. However, language models that are pretrained on large unlabeled web text corpora have been shown to suffer from degenerating toxic content and social bias behaviors, consequently hindering their safe deployment. Various detoxification methods were proposed to mitigate the language model's toxicity; however, these methods struggled to detoxify language models when conditioned on prompts that contain specific social identities related to gender, race, or religion. In this study, we propose Reinforce-Detoxify; A reinforcement learning-based method for mitigating toxicity in language models. We address the challenge of safety in language models and propose a new reward model that is able to detect toxic content and mitigate unintended bias towards social identities in toxicity prediction. The experiments demonstrate that the Reinforce-Detoxify method for language model detoxification outperforms existing detoxification approaches in automatic evaluation metrics, indicating the ability of our approach in language model detoxification and less prone to unintended bias toward social identities in generated content.
abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的语言模型能够生成流畅的文本，并有效地适应各种自然语言生成任务。然而，在大型未标记网络文本语料库上预训练的语言模型已被证明会受到有毒内容和社会偏见行为的影响，从而阻碍了它们的安全部署。提出了各种解毒方法来减轻语言模型的毒性；然而，当这些方法以包含与性别、种族或宗教相关的特定社会身份的提示为条件时，很难消除语言模型的毒害。在这项研究中，我们提出强化排毒；一种基于强化学习的方法，用于减轻语言模型中的毒性。我们解决了语言模型中的安全性挑战，并提出了一种新的奖励模型，该模型能够检测有毒内容并减轻毒性预测中对社会身份的意外偏见。实验表明，用于语言模型解毒的 Reinforce-Detoxify 方法在自动评估指标方面优于现有的解毒方法，表明我们的方法在语言模型解毒方面的能力，并且不太容易对生成的内容中的社会身份产生意外偏见。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的奖励模型方法Reinforce-Detoxify，用于减轻Transformer语言模型生成内容中的毒性及社会偏见。
AI.motivation: 现有去毒性方法难以处理包含性别、种族或宗教等社会身份的提示，导致模型生成内容仍存在潜在偏见和有害信息。
AI.method: 设计强化学习框架与新型奖励模型，通过检测毒性内容并优化生成策略，降低模型对社会身份相关偏见的敏感性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在自动评估指标上优于现有技术，且生成内容更少出现针对社会身份的无意偏见。
AI.conclusion: Reinforce-Detoxify能有效提升语言模型安全性，在毒性缓解和偏见控制方面具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Reward Modeling for Mitigating Toxicity in Transformer-based Language Models 用于减轻基于 Transformer 的语言模型中的毒性的奖励建模 Transformer-based language models are able to generate fluent text and be efficiently adapted across various natural language generation tasks. However, language models that are pretrained on large unlabeled web text corpora have been shown to suffer from degenerating toxic content and social bias behaviors, consequently hindering their safe deployment. Various detoxification methods were proposed to mitigate the language model's toxicity; however, these methods struggled to detoxify language models when conditioned on prompts that contain specific social identities related to gender, race, or religion. In this study, we propose Reinforce-Detoxify; A reinforcement learning-based method for mitigating toxicity in language models. We address the challenge of safety in language models and propose a new reward model that is able to detect toxic content and mitigate unintended bias towards social identities in toxicity prediction. The experiments demonstrate that the Reinforce-Detoxify method for language model detoxification outperforms existing detoxification approaches in automatic evaluation metrics, indicating the ability of our approach in language model detoxification and less prone to unintended bias toward social identities in generated content. 基于 Transformer 的语言模型能够生成流畅的文本，并有效地适应各种自然语言生成任务。然而，在大型未标记网络文本语料库上预训练的语言模型已被证明会受到有毒内容和社会偏见行为的影响，从而阻碍了它们的安全部署。提出了各种解毒方法来减轻语言模型的毒性；然而，当这些方法以包含与性别、种族或宗教相关的特定社会身份的提示为条件时，很难消除语言模型的毒害。在这项研究中，我们提出强化排毒；一种基于强化学习的方法，用于减轻语言模型中的毒性。我们解决了语言模型中的安全性挑战，并提出了一种新的奖励模型，该模型能够检测有毒内容并减轻毒性预测中对社会身份的意外偏见。实验表明，用于语言模型解毒的 Reinforce-Detoxify 方法在自动评估指标方面优于现有的解毒方法，表明我们的方法在语言模型解毒方面的能力，并且不太容易对生成的内容中的社会身份产生意外偏见。 本文提出一种基于强化学习的奖励模型方法Reinforce-Detoxify，用于减轻Transformer语言模型生成内容中的毒性及社会偏见。 Farshid Faal,Ketra Schmitt,Jia Yuan Yu cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Detection of Stealthy Adversaries for Networked Unmanned Aerial Vehicles*
title_zh: 网络无人机隐形对手的检测*
comment: to appear at the 2022 Int'l Conference on Unmanned Aircraft Systems (ICUAS)
comments: to appear at the 2022 Int'l Conference on Unmanned Aircraft Systems (ICUAS)
abstract: A network of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) provides distributed coverage, reconfigurability, and maneuverability in performing complex cooperative tasks. However, it relies on wireless communications that can be susceptible to cyber adversaries and intrusions, disrupting the entire network's operation. This paper develops model-based centralized and decentralized observer techniques for detecting a class of stealthy intrusions, namely zero-dynamics and covert attacks, on networked UAVs in formation control settings. The centralized observer that runs in a control center leverages switching in the UAVs' communication topology for attack detection, and the decentralized observers, implemented onboard each UAV in the network, use the model of networked UAVs and locally available measurements. Experimental results are provided to show the effectiveness of the proposed detection schemes in different case studies.
summary: A network of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) provides distributed coverage, reconfigurability, and maneuverability in performing complex cooperative tasks. However, it relies on wireless communications that can be susceptible to cyber adversaries and intrusions, disrupting the entire network's operation. This paper develops model-based centralized and decentralized observer techniques for detecting a class of stealthy intrusions, namely zero-dynamics and covert attacks, on networked UAVs in formation control settings. The centralized observer that runs in a control center leverages switching in the UAVs' communication topology for attack detection, and the decentralized observers, implemented onboard each UAV in the network, use the model of networked UAVs and locally available measurements. Experimental results are provided to show the effectiveness of the proposed detection schemes in different case studies.
abstract_zh: 无人机 (UAV) 网络在执行复杂的协作任务时提供分布式覆盖、可重构性和机动性。然而，它依赖于无线通信，容易受到网络对手和入侵的影响，从而扰乱整个网络的运行。本文开发了基于模型的集中式和分散式观察器技术，用于检测编队控制设置中网络无人机的一类隐形入侵，即零动态和隐蔽攻击。在控制中心运行的集中式观察器利用无人机通信拓扑的切换来进行攻击检测，而在网络中的每个无人机上实现的分散式观察器则使用联网无人机模型和本地可用的测量。实验结果证明了所提出的检测方案在不同案例研究中的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发集中式和分布式观测器技术，以检测网络化无人机中的隐蔽攻击，如零动态攻击和隐蔽攻击，确保编队控制下的网络安全。
AI.motivation: 无人机网络依赖无线通信，易受网络攻击，隐蔽攻击如零动态攻击和隐蔽攻击可能破坏网络运行，需有效检测方法。
AI.method: 提出基于模型的集中式和分布式观测器技术：集中式利用通信拓扑切换检测攻击，分布式使用本地测量和网络化无人机模型进行检测。
AI.result: 实验结果验证了所提检测方法在不同案例中的有效性，能够有效识别隐蔽攻击。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法有效检测隐蔽攻击，提升网络化无人机在编队控制中的安全性。

title: MSSNet: Multi-Scale-Stage Network for Single Image Deblurring
title_zh: MSSNet：用于单图像去模糊的多尺度阶段网络
abstract: Most of traditional single image deblurring methods before deep learning adopt a coarse-to-fine scheme that estimates a sharp image at a coarse scale and progressively refines it at finer scales. While this scheme has also been adopted to several deep learning-based approaches, recently a number of single-scale approaches have been introduced showing superior performance to previous coarse-to-fine approaches both in quality and computation time. In this paper, we revisit the coarse-to-fine scheme, and analyze defects of previous coarse-to-fine approaches that degrade their performance. Based on the analysis, we propose Multi-Scale-Stage Network (MSSNet), a novel deep learning-based approach to single image deblurring that adopts our remedies to the defects. Specifically, MSSNet adopts three novel technical components: stage configuration reflecting blur scales, an inter-scale information propagation scheme, and a pixel-shuffle-based multi-scale scheme. Our experiments show that MSSNet achieves the state-of-the-art performance in terms of quality, network size, and computation time.
summary: Most of traditional single image deblurring methods before deep learning adopt a coarse-to-fine scheme that estimates a sharp image at a coarse scale and progressively refines it at finer scales. While this scheme has also been adopted to several deep learning-based approaches, recently a number of single-scale approaches have been introduced showing superior performance to previous coarse-to-fine approaches both in quality and computation time. In this paper, we revisit the coarse-to-fine scheme, and analyze defects of previous coarse-to-fine approaches that degrade their performance. Based on the analysis, we propose Multi-Scale-Stage Network (MSSNet), a novel deep learning-based approach to single image deblurring that adopts our remedies to the defects. Specifically, MSSNet adopts three novel technical components: stage configuration reflecting blur scales, an inter-scale information propagation scheme, and a pixel-shuffle-based multi-scale scheme. Our experiments show that MSSNet achieves the state-of-the-art performance in terms of quality, network size, and computation time.
abstract_zh: 深度学习之前的大多数传统单图像去模糊方法都采用从粗到细的方案，在粗尺度上估计清晰的图像，并在更精细的尺度上逐步细化它。虽然该方案也已被应用于几种基于深度学习的方法，但最近引入了许多单尺度方法，显示出在质量和计算时间方面优于以前的从粗到细的方法的性能。在本文中，我们重新审视从粗到细的方案，并分析了先前从粗到细的方法降低其性能的缺陷。基于分析，我们提出了多尺度阶段网络（MSSNet），这是一种基于深度学习的新颖的单图像去模糊方法，采用了我们对缺陷的补救措施。具体来说，MSSNet采用了三个新颖的技术组件：反映模糊尺度的阶段配置、跨尺度信息传播方案和基于像素洗牌的多尺度方案。我们的实验表明，MSSNet 在质量、网络规模和计算时间方面实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种多尺度阶段网络（MSSNet），用于单图像去模糊，通过改进传统粗到细方案的缺陷以提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统粗到细方法存在性能缺陷，而单尺度方法虽有优势但可能不足，因此需改进传统方案以提升质量和效率。
AI.method: 采用多尺度阶段配置、跨尺度信息传播机制及像素洗牌多尺度结构，优化传统粗到细流程。
AI.result: 实验表明，MSSNet在图像质量、网络规模及计算效率方面均达到当时最优水平。
AI.conclusion: MSSNet通过优化传统粗到细方案的缺陷，有效提升了单图像去模糊的质量与效率，成为当时最先进的方法。

In this paper, we revisit the coarse-to-fine scheme, and analyze defects of previous coarse-to-fine approaches that degrade their performance. Based on the analysis, we propose Multi-Scale-Stage Network (MSSNet), a novel deep learning-based approach to single image deblurring that adopts our remedies to the defects. Specifically, MSSNet adopts three novel technical components: stage configuration reflecting blur scales, an inter-scale information propagation scheme, and a pixel-shuffle-based multi-scale scheme. Our experiments show that MSSNet achieves the state-of-the-art performance in terms of quality, network size, and computation time. 深度学习之前的大多数传统单图像去模糊方法都采用从粗到细的方案，在粗尺度上估计清晰的图像，并在更精细的尺度上逐步细化它。虽然该方案也已被应用于几种基于深度学习的方法，但最近引入了许多单尺度方法，显示出在质量和计算时间方面优于以前的从粗到细的方法的性能。在本文中，我们重新审视从粗到细的方案，并分析了先前从粗到细的方法降低其性能的缺陷。基于分析，我们提出了多尺度阶段网络（MSSNet），这是一种基于深度学习的新颖的单图像去模糊方法，采用了我们对缺陷的补救措施。具体来说，MSSNet采用了三个新颖的技术组件：反映模糊尺度的阶段配置、跨尺度信息传播方案和基于像素洗牌的多尺度方案。我们的实验表明，MSSNet 在质量、网络规模和计算时间方面实现了最先进的性能。 提出一种多尺度阶段网络（MSSNet），用于单图像去模糊，通过改进传统粗到细方案的缺陷以提升性能。 Kiyeon Kim,Seungyong Lee,Sunghyun Cho cs.CV

authors_text: Jiapeng Zhu,Yujun Shen,Yinghao Xu,Deli Zhao,Qifeng Chen
title: Region-Based Semantic Factorization in GANs
title_zh: GAN 中基于区域的语义分解
abstract: Despite the rapid advancement of semantic discovery in the latent space of Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), existing approaches either are limited to finding global attributes or rely on a number of segmentation masks to identify local attributes. In this work, we present a highly efficient algorithm to factorize the latent semantics learned by GANs concerning an arbitrary image region. Concretely, we revisit the task of local manipulation with pre-trained GANs and formulate region-based semantic discovery as a dual optimization problem. Through an appropriately defined generalized Rayleigh quotient, we manage to solve such a problem without any annotations or training. Experimental results on various state-of-the-art GAN models demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, as well as its superiority over prior arts regarding precise control, region robustness, speed of implementation, and simplicity of use.
summary: Despite the rapid advancement of semantic discovery in the latent space of Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), existing approaches either are limited to finding global attributes or rely on a number of segmentation masks to identify local attributes. In this work, we present a highly efficient algorithm to factorize the latent semantics learned by GANs concerning an arbitrary image region. Concretely, we revisit the task of local manipulation with pre-trained GANs and formulate region-based semantic discovery as a dual optimization problem. Through an appropriately defined generalized Rayleigh quotient, we manage to solve such a problem without any annotations or training. Experimental results on various state-of-the-art GAN models demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, as well as its superiority over prior arts regarding precise control, region robustness, speed of implementation, and simplicity of use.
abstract_zh: 尽管生成对抗网络（GAN）潜在空间中的语义发现取得了快速进展，但现有方法要么仅限于寻找全局属性，要么依赖于许多分割掩码来识别局部属性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种高效的算法来分解 GAN 学习到的关于任意图像区域的潜在语义。具体来说，我们重新审视使​​用预训练 GAN 进行局部操作的任务，并将基于区域的语义发现表述为对偶优化问题。通过适当定义的广义瑞利商，我们能够在没有任何注释或训练的情况下解决这样的问题。各种最先进的 GAN 模型的实验结果证明了我们的方法的有效性，以及它在精确控制、区域鲁棒性、实施速度和使用简单性方面优于现有技术的优势。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需标注和训练的高效算法，用于在GAN的潜在空间中进行基于区域的语义分解。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在GAN潜在空间语义发现中受限于全局属性或依赖多个分割掩码，缺乏对局部属性的高效精准控制。
AI.method: 将局部语义发现建模为双优化问题，通过广义Rayleigh商求解，无需标注和训练即可实现任意区域的语义分解。
AI.result: 在多种先进GAN模型上验证有效，优于现有方法在控制精度、区域鲁棒性、实现速度和易用性方面。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为GAN潜在空间语义分解提供了高效且精准的解决方案，推动了局部属性操控的发展。

authors_text: Scott C. Lowe,Louise P. McGarry,Jessica Douglas,Jason Newport,Sageev Oore,Christopher Whidden,Daniel J. Hasselman
title: Echofilter: A Deep Learning Segmentation Model Improves the Automation, Standardization, and Timeliness for Post-Processing Echosounder Data in Tidal Energy Streams
title_zh: Echofilter：深度学习分割模型提高了潮汐能流中回声测深仪数据后处理的自动化、标准化和及时性
abstract: Understanding the abundance and distribution of fish in tidal energy streams is important to assess risks presented by introducing tidal energy devices to the habitat. However tidal current flows suitable for tidal energy are often highly turbulent, complicating the interpretation of echosounder data. The portion of the water column contaminated by returns from entrained air must be excluded from data used for biological analyses. Application of a single conventional algorithm to identify the depth-of-penetration of entrained air is insufficient for a boundary that is discontinuous, depth-dynamic, porous, and varies with tidal flow speed. Using a case study at a tidal energy demonstration site in the Bay of Fundy, we describe the development and application of a deep machine learning model with a U-Net based architecture. Our model, Echofilter, was highly responsive to the dynamic range of turbulence conditions and sensitive to the fine-scale nuances in the boundary position, producing an entrained-air boundary line with an average error of 0.33m on mobile downfacing and 0.5-1.0m on stationary upfacing data, less than half that of existing algorithmic solutions. The model's overall annotations had a high level of agreement with the human segmentation, with an intersection-over-union score of 99% for mobile downfacing recordings and 92-95% for stationary upfacing recordings. This resulted in a 50% reduction in the time required for manual edits when compared to the time required to manually edit the line placement produced by the currently available algorithms. Because of the improved initial automated placement, the implementation of the models permits an increase in the standardization and repeatability of line placement.
summary: Understanding the abundance and distribution of fish in tidal energy streams is important to assess risks presented by introducing tidal energy devices to the habitat. However tidal current flows suitable for tidal energy are often highly turbulent, complicating the interpretation of echosounder data. The portion of the water column contaminated by returns from entrained air must be excluded from data used for biological analyses. Application of a single conventional algorithm to identify the depth-of-penetration of entrained air is insufficient for a boundary that is discontinuous, depth-dynamic, porous, and varies with tidal flow speed. Using a case study at a tidal energy demonstration site in the Bay of Fundy, we describe the development and application of a deep machine learning model with a U-Net based architecture. Our model, Echofilter, was highly responsive to the dynamic range of turbulence conditions and sensitive to the fine-scale nuances in the boundary position, producing an entrained-air boundary line with an average error of 0.33m on mobile downfacing and 0.5-1.0m on stationary upfacing data, less than half that of existing algorithmic solutions. The model's overall annotations had a high level of agreement with the human segmentation, with an intersection-over-union score of 99% for mobile downfacing recordings and 92-95% for stationary upfacing recordings. This resulted in a 50% reduction in the time required for manual edits when compared to the time required to manually edit the line placement produced by the currently available algorithms. Because of the improved initial automated placement, the implementation of the models permits an increase in the standardization and repeatability of line placement.
abstract_zh: 了解潮汐能流中鱼类的丰度和分布对于评估将潮汐能装置引入栖息地所带来的风险非常重要。然而，适合潮汐能的潮汐流通常是高度湍流的，这使得回声测深仪数据的解释变得复杂。被夹带空气回流污染的水柱部分必须从用于生物分析的数据中排除。对于不连续、深度动态、多孔且随潮汐流速度变化的边界，应用单一传统算法来识别夹带空气的渗透深度是不够的。通过芬迪湾潮汐能示范场的案例研究，我们描述了基于 U-Net 架构的深度机器学习模型的开发和应用。我们的模型 Echofilter 对湍流条件的动态范围具有高度响应性，并且对边界位置的精细尺度细微差别非常敏感，产生的夹带空气边界线在移动朝下数据上的平均误差为 0.33m，在静止朝上数据上的平均误差为 0.5-1.0m，不到现有算法解决方案的一半。该模型的整体注释与人类分割具有很高的一致性，移动朝下录音的交集分数为 99%，固定朝上录音的交集分数为 92-95%。与手动编辑当前可用算法生成的线布局所需的时间相比，这使得手动编辑所需的时间减少了 50%。由于初始自动放置的改进，模型的实施可以提高线路放置的标准化和可重复性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的分割模型Echofilter，用于改进潮汐能源流中回声测深仪数据的自动化、标准化和及时性后处理。
AI.motivation: 潮汐能区域的湍流环境导致传统算法难以准确识别气泡干扰边界，影响鱼类分布分析的准确性与效率，亟需更高效的自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 基于U-Net架构开发深度学习模型Echofilter，利用加拿大芬迪湾潮汐能示范站点的实测数据进行训练与验证，通过动态捕捉湍流条件下的气泡边界特征实现自动化分割。
AI.result: 模型在移动下向数据中气泡边界定位误差为0.33米，在固定上向数据中误差为0.5-1.0米，较现有算法误差降低50%；与人工标注的交并比（IoU）达99%（移动下向）和92-95%（固定上向），手动校正时间减少50%。
AI.conclusion: Echofilter通过深度学习显著提升了气泡边界分割的精度与效率，为潮汐能区域生态风险评估提供了更标准化、自动化的数据处理工具。

title: Navigating Conceptual Space; A new take on Artificial General Intelligence
title_zh: 导航概念空间；通用人工智能的新视角
comment: Featured in the conference of Artificial General Intelligence 2021. Part of the Lecture Notes in Computer Science book series (LNCS, volume 13154) and Lecture Notes in Artificial Intelligence book sub series (LNAI, volume 13154)
comments: Featured in the conference of Artificial General Intelligence 2021. Part of the Lecture Notes in Computer Science book series (LNCS, volume 13154) and Lecture Notes in Artificial Intelligence book sub series (LNAI, volume 13154)
abstract: Edward C. Tolman found reinforcement learning unsatisfactory for explaining intelligence and proposed a clear distinction between learning and behavior. Tolman's ideas on latent learning and cognitive maps eventually led to what is now known as conceptual space, a geometric representation where concepts and ideas can form points or shapes.Active navigation between ideas - reasoning - can be expressed directly as purposive navigation in conceptual space. Assimilating the theory of conceptual space from modern neuroscience, we propose autonomous navigation as a valid approach for emulated cognition. However, achieving autonomous navigation in high-dimensional Euclidean spaces is not trivial in technology. In this work, we explore whether neoRL navigation is up for the task; adopting Kaelbling's concerns for efficient robot navigation, we test whether the neoRL approach is general across navigational modalities, compositional across considerations of experience, and effective when learning in multiple Euclidean dimensions. We find neoRL learning to be more resemblant of biological learning than of RL in AI, and propose neoRL navigation of conceptual space as a plausible new path toward emulated cognition.
summary: Edward C. Tolman found reinforcement learning unsatisfactory for explaining intelligence and proposed a clear distinction between learning and behavior. Tolman's ideas on latent learning and cognitive maps eventually led to what is now known as conceptual space, a geometric representation where concepts and ideas can form points or shapes.Active navigation between ideas - reasoning - can be expressed directly as purposive navigation in conceptual space. Assimilating the theory of conceptual space from modern neuroscience, we propose autonomous navigation as a valid approach for emulated cognition. However, achieving autonomous navigation in high-dimensional Euclidean spaces is not trivial in technology. In this work, we explore whether neoRL navigation is up for the task; adopting Kaelbling's concerns for efficient robot navigation, we test whether the neoRL approach is general across navigational modalities, compositional across considerations of experience, and effective when learning in multiple Euclidean dimensions. We find neoRL learning to be more resemblant of biological learning than of RL in AI, and propose neoRL navigation of conceptual space as a plausible new path toward emulated cognition.
abstract_zh: 爱德华·C·托尔曼 (Edward C. Tolman) 发现强化学习在解释智力方面不能令人满意，并提出学习和行为之间的明确区别。托尔曼关于潜在学习和认知图的想法最终导致了现在所谓的概念空间，这是一种几何表示，概念和想法可以在其中形成点或形状。想法之间的主动导航（推理）可以直接表达为概念空间中的有目的导航。吸收现代神经科学中的概念空间理论，我们提出自主导航作为模拟认知的有效方法。然而，在高维欧几里得空间中实现自主导航在技术上并非易事。在这项工作中，我们探索 NeoRL 导航是否适合这项任务；采用 Kaelbling 对高效机器人导航的关注，我们测试 NeoRL 方法是否在导航模式中具有通用性，在考虑经验的情况下具有组合性，以及在多个欧几里德维度学习时是否有效。我们发现 NeoRL 学习比人工智能中的 RL 更类似于生物学习，并提出概念空间的 NeoRL 导航作为通向模拟认知的一条可行的新路径。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了通过neoRL方法在概念空间中实现自主导航，以推进人工通用智能（AGI）的模拟认知研究。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习难以解释智能的本质，而托尔曼的认知地图理论启发了概念空间的几何表示，需寻找更接近生物学习机制的导航方法。
AI.method: 基于神经科学中的概念空间理论，采用改进的neoRL框架，测试其在多维欧几里得空间中的导航效率、跨模态适应性及经验组合能力。
AI.result: 发现neoRL学习机制更接近生物学习模式，且在概念空间导航中表现出跨模态通用性和多维学习有效性。
AI.conclusion: neoRL导航概念空间为模拟认知提供了新的可行路径，可能推动人工通用智能的发展。

title: Multi-task Safe Reinforcement Learning for Navigating Intersections in Dense Traffic
title_zh: 用于在密集交通中导航十字路口的多任务安全强化学习
abstract: Multi-task intersection navigation including the unprotected turning left, turning right, and going straight in dense traffic is still a challenging task for autonomous driving. For the human driver, the negotiation skill with other interactive vehicles is the key to guarantee safety and efficiency. However, it is hard to balance the safety and efficiency of the autonomous vehicle for multi-task intersection navigation. In this paper, we formulate a multi-task safe reinforcement learning with social attention to improve the safety and efficiency when interacting with other traffic participants. Specifically, the social attention module is used to focus on the states of negotiation vehicles. In addition, a safety layer is added to the multi-task reinforcement learning framework to guarantee safe negotiation. We compare the experiments in the simulator SUMO with abundant traffic flows and CARLA with high-fidelity vehicle models, which both show that the proposed algorithm can improve safety with consistent traffic efficiency for multi-task intersection navigation.
summary: Multi-task intersection navigation including the unprotected turning left, turning right, and going straight in dense traffic is still a challenging task for autonomous driving. For the human driver, the negotiation skill with other interactive vehicles is the key to guarantee safety and efficiency. However, it is hard to balance the safety and efficiency of the autonomous vehicle for multi-task intersection navigation. In this paper, we formulate a multi-task safe reinforcement learning with social attention to improve the safety and efficiency when interacting with other traffic participants. Specifically, the social attention module is used to focus on the states of negotiation vehicles. In addition, a safety layer is added to the multi-task reinforcement learning framework to guarantee safe negotiation. We compare the experiments in the simulator SUMO with abundant traffic flows and CARLA with high-fidelity vehicle models, which both show that the proposed algorithm can improve safety with consistent traffic efficiency for multi-task intersection navigation.
abstract_zh: 密集交通中的无保护​​左转、右转、直行等多任务路口导航​​对于自动驾驶来说仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。对于人类驾驶员来说，与其他交互车辆的谈判技巧是保证安全和效率的关键。然而，自动驾驶车辆进行多任务路口导航​​的安全性和效率很难平衡。在本文中，我们制定了一种具有社会关注的多任务安全强化学习，以提高与其他交通参与者互动时的安全性和效率。具体来说，社会注意力模块用于关注谈判工具的状态。此外，在多任务强化学习框架中添加了安全层，以保证安全协商。我们比较了交通流量丰富的模拟器 SUMO 和高保真车辆模型的 CARLA 中的实验，结果都表明，所提出的算法可以提高多任务交叉路口导航的安全性并保持一致的交通效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务安全强化学习方法，通过社交注意力模块和安全层提升自动驾驶车辆在密集交通中交叉路口的导航安全性和效率。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在密集交通中执行多任务（如左转、右转、直行）时，难以平衡安全性和效率，需借鉴人类驾驶员的交互协商技能。
AI.method: 设计社交注意力模块聚焦交互车辆状态，并在多任务强化学习框架中引入安全层，确保协商过程的安全性。
AI.result: 在SUMO和CARLA仿真平台实验表明，该算法在提升安全性的同时保持交通效率，优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过社交注意力与安全层结合，有效解决了多任务交叉路口导航的安全效率矛盾，具有实际应用价值。

For the human driver, the negotiation skill with other interactive vehicles is the key to guarantee safety and efficiency. In this paper, we formulate a multi-task safe reinforcement learning with social attention to improve the safety and efficiency when interacting with other traffic participants. Specifically, the social attention module is used to focus on the states of negotiation vehicles. In addition, a safety layer is added to the multi-task reinforcement learning framework to guarantee safe negotiation. authors_text: Wei Liu,Rui Jiang,Cheng Chen,Tao Lu,Zixiang Xiong
title: Deep Single Image Deraining using An Asymetric Cycle Generative and Adversarial Framework
title_zh: 使用不对称循环生成和对抗框架进行深度单图像去雨
abstract: In reality, rain and fog are often present at the same time, which can greatly reduce the clarity and quality of the scene image. However, most unsupervised single image deraining methods mainly focus on rain streak removal by disregarding the fog, which leads to low-quality deraining performance. In addition, the samples are rather homogeneous generated by these methods and lack diversity, resulting in poor results in the face of complex rain scenes. To address the above issues, we propose a novel Asymetric Cycle Generative and Adversarial framework (ACGF) for single image deraining that trains on both synthetic and real rainy images while simultaneously capturing both rain streaks and fog features. ACGF consists of a Rain-fog2Clean (R2C) transformation block and a Clean2Rain-fog (C2R) transformation block. The former consists of parallel rain removal path and rain-fog feature extraction path by the rain and derain-fog network and the attention rain-fog feature extraction network (ARFE) , while the latter only contains a synthetic rain transformation path. In rain-fog feature extraction path, to better characterize the rain-fog fusion feature, we employ an ARFE to exploit the self-similarity of global and local rain-fog information by learning the spatial feature correlations. Moreover, to improve the translational capacity of C2R and the diversity of models, we design a rain-fog feature decoupling and reorganization network (RFDR) by embedding a rainy image degradation model and a mixed discriminator to preserve richer texture details in synthetic rain conversion path. Extensive experiments on benchmark rain-fog and rain datasets show that ACGF outperforms state-of-the-art deraining methods. We also conduct defogging performance evaluation experiments to further demonstrate the effectiveness of ACGF.
summary: In reality, rain and fog are often present at the same time, which can greatly reduce the clarity and quality of the scene image. However, most unsupervised single image deraining methods mainly focus on rain streak removal by disregarding the fog, which leads to low-quality deraining performance. In addition, the samples are rather homogeneous generated by these methods and lack diversity, resulting in poor results in the face of complex rain scenes. To address the above issues, we propose a novel Asymetric Cycle Generative and Adversarial framework (ACGF) for single image deraining that trains on both synthetic and real rainy images while simultaneously capturing both rain streaks and fog features. ACGF consists of a Rain-fog2Clean (R2C) transformation block and a Clean2Rain-fog (C2R) transformation block. The former consists of parallel rain removal path and rain-fog feature extraction path by the rain and derain-fog network and the attention rain-fog feature extraction network (ARFE) , while the latter only contains a synthetic rain transformation path. In rain-fog feature extraction path, to better characterize the rain-fog fusion feature, we employ an ARFE to exploit the self-similarity of global and local rain-fog information by learning the spatial feature correlations. Moreover, to improve the translational capacity of C2R and the diversity of models, we design a rain-fog feature decoupling and reorganization network (RFDR) by embedding a rainy image degradation model and a mixed discriminator to preserve richer texture details in synthetic rain conversion path. Extensive experiments on benchmark rain-fog and rain datasets show that ACGF outperforms state-of-the-art deraining methods. We also conduct defogging performance evaluation experiments to further demonstrate the effectiveness of ACGF.
abstract_zh: 现实中，雨和雾往往同时存在，会大大降低场景图像的清晰度和质量。然而，大多数无监督单图像除雨方法主要集中在忽略雾气的雨条纹去除上，这导致除雨性能较差。此外，这些方法生成的样本相当同质，缺乏多样性，导致面对复杂的雨景时效果不佳。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种用于单图像去雨的新型非对称循环生成和对抗框架（ACGF），它可以在合成图像和真实雨图像上进行训练，同时捕获雨条纹和雾特征。 ACGF 由 Rain-fog2Clean (R2C) 转换块和 Clean2Rain-fog (C2R) 转换块组成。前者由雨和去雨雾网络和注意力雨雾特征提取网络（ARFE）组成的并行除雨路径和雨雾特征提取路径组成，而后者仅包含合成雨变换路径。在雨雾特征提取路径中，为了更好地表征雨雾融合特征，我们采用 ARFE 通过学习空间特征相关性来利用全局和局部雨雾信息的自相似性。此外，为了提高C2R的转换能力和模型的多样性，我们通过嵌入雨天图像退化模型和混合判别器来设计雨雾特征解耦和重组网络（RFDR），以在合成雨转换路径中保留更丰富的纹理细节。对基准雨雾和降雨数据集的大量实验表明，ACGF 的性能优于最先进的除雨方法。我们还进行了除雾性能评估实验，以进一步证明ACGF的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非对称循环生成对抗框架（ACGF），用于同时处理雨雾混合场景的单图像去雨问题，提升去雨效果和样本多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督去雨方法仅关注雨条去除而忽略雾的影响，导致效果不佳且生成样本同质化严重，难以应对复杂雨雾场景。
AI.method: 设计ACGF框架，包含Rain-fog2Clean（R2C）和Clean2Rain-fog（C2R）双转换模块，结合注意力雨雾特征提取网络（ARFE）和雨雾特征解耦重组网络（RFDR），通过合成与真实雨雾图像联合训练提升特征捕捉能力。
AI.result: 在多个雨雾基准数据集上优于现有最先进方法，且通过去雾性能评估验证了模型在复杂场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ACGF通过联合建模雨雾特征和引入特征解耦机制，有效解决了雨雾共存场景下的去雨难题，提升了生成图像的多样性和质量。

search_text: Deep Single Image Deraining using An Asymetric Cycle Generative and Adversarial Framework 使用不对称循环生成和对抗框架进行深度单图像去雨 In reality, rain and fog are often present at the same time, which can greatly reduce the clarity and quality of the scene image. However, most unsupervised single image deraining methods mainly focus on rain streak removal by disregarding the fog, which leads to low-quality deraining performance. In addition, the samples are rather homogeneous generated by these methods and lack diversity, resulting in poor results in the face of complex rain scenes. To address the above issues, we propose a novel Asymetric Cycle Generative and Adversarial framework (ACGF) for single image deraining that trains on both synthetic and real rainy images while simultaneously capturing both rain streaks and fog features. ACGF consists of a Rain-fog2Clean (R2C) transformation block and a Clean2Rain-fog (C2R) transformation block. The former consists of parallel rain removal path and rain-fog feature extraction path by the rain and derain-fog network and the attention rain-fog feature extraction network (ARFE) , while the latter only contains a synthetic rain transformation path. In rain-fog feature extraction path, to better characterize the rain-fog fusion feature, we employ an ARFE to exploit the self-similarity of global and local rain-fog information by learning the spatial feature correlations. Moreover, to improve the translational capacity of C2R and the diversity of models, we design a rain-fog feature decoupling and reorganization network (RFDR) by embedding a rainy image degradation model and a mixed discriminator to preserve richer texture details in synthetic rain conversion path. Extensive experiments on benchmark rain-fog and rain datasets show that ACGF outperforms state-of-the-art deraining methods. We also conduct defogging performance evaluation experiments to further demonstrate the effectiveness of ACGF. 现实中，雨和雾往往同时存在，会大大降低场景图像的清晰度和质量。然而，大多数无监督单图像除雨方法主要集中在忽略雾气的雨条纹去除上，这导致除雨性能较差。此外，这些方法生成的样本相当同质，缺乏多样性，导致面对复杂的雨景时效果不佳。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种用于单图像去雨的新型非对称循环生成和对抗框架（ACGF），它可以在合成图像和真实雨图像上进行训练，同时捕获雨条纹和雾特征。 ACGF 由 Rain-fog2Clean (R2C) 转换块和 Clean2Rain-fog (C2R) 转换块组成。前者由雨和去雨雾网络和注意力雨雾特征提取网络（ARFE）组成的并行除雨路径和雨雾特征提取路径组成，而后者仅包含合成雨变换路径。在雨雾特征提取路径中，为了更好地表征雨雾融合特征，我们采用 ARFE 通过学习空间特征相关性来利用全局和局部雨雾信息的自相似性。此外，为了提高C2R的转换能力和模型的多样性，我们通过嵌入雨天图像退化模型和混合判别器来设计雨雾特征解耦和重组网络（RFDR），以在合成雨转换路径中保留更丰富的纹理细节。对基准雨雾和降雨数据集的大量实验表明，ACGF 的性能优于最先进的除雨方法。我们还进行了除雾性能评估实验，以进一步证明ACGF的有效性。 本文提出一种非对称循环生成对抗框架（ACGF），用于同时处理雨雾混合场景的单图像去雨问题，提升去雨效果和样本多样性。 Wei Liu,Rui Jiang,Cheng Chen,Tao Lu,Zixiang Xiong cs.CV,eess.IV

title: Teaching Drones on the Fly: Can Emotional Feedback Serve as Learning Signal for Training Artificial Agents?
title_zh: 飞行教学无人机：情感反馈可以作为训练人工智能体的学习信号吗？
comment: 6 pages, Accepted at the AAAI-22 Workshop on Interactive Machine Learning
comments: 6 pages, Accepted at the AAAI-22 Workshop on Interactive Machine Learning
abstract: We investigate whether naturalistic emotional human feedback can be directly exploited as a reward signal for training artificial agents via interactive human-in-the-loop reinforcement learning. To answer this question, we devise an experimental setting inspired by animal training, in which human test subjects interactively teach an emulated drone agent their desired command-action-mapping by providing emotional feedback on the drone's action selections. We present a first empirical proof-of-concept study and analysis confirming that human facial emotion expression can be directly exploited as reward signal in such interactive learning settings. Thereby, we contribute empirical findings towards more naturalistic and intuitive forms of reinforcement learning especially designed for non-expert users.
summary: We investigate whether naturalistic emotional human feedback can be directly exploited as a reward signal for training artificial agents via interactive human-in-the-loop reinforcement learning. To answer this question, we devise an experimental setting inspired by animal training, in which human test subjects interactively teach an emulated drone agent their desired command-action-mapping by providing emotional feedback on the drone's action selections. We present a first empirical proof-of-concept study and analysis confirming that human facial emotion expression can be directly exploited as reward signal in such interactive learning settings. Thereby, we contribute empirical findings towards more naturalistic and intuitive forms of reinforcement learning especially designed for non-expert users.
abstract_zh: 我们研究是否可以直接利用自然情感人类反馈作为通过交互式人机循环强化学习来训练人工智能体的奖励信号。为了回答这个问题，我们设计了一种受动物训练启发的实验设置，其中人类测试对象通过提供有关无人机动作选择的情感反馈，以交互方式向模拟无人机代理传授其所需的命令-动作映射。我们提出了第一个实证概念验证研究和分析，证实人类面部情绪表达可以在这种交互式学习环境中直接用作奖励信号。因此，我们为特别为非专家用户设计的更自然和直观的强化学习形式贡献了经验发现。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨人类情感反馈能否作为强化学习的奖励信号，用于训练无人机代理。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习依赖人工设计的奖励函数，而本研究旨在探索非专家用户通过自然情感反馈直接训练AI代理的可行性。
AI.method: 设计人机交互实验，让人类受试者通过面部情感反馈（如高兴/沮丧）实时指导无人机学习动作映射，将情感信号转化为强化学习奖励。
AI.result: 实验证明人类情感反馈可直接作为有效奖励信号，成功训练无人机完成目标动作。
AI.conclusion: 情感反馈为非专家用户提供了一种更直观自然的强化学习交互方式，推动了人性化AI训练方法的发展。

title: Confidence-rich Localization and Mapping based on Particle Filter for Robotic Exploration
title_zh: 用于机器人探索的基于粒子滤波器的富置信度定位和建图
abstract: This paper mainly studies the localization and mapping of range sensing robots in the confidence-rich map (CRM) and then extends it to provide a full state estimate for information-theoretic exploration. Most previous works about active simultaneous localization and mapping and exploration always assumed the known robot poses or utilized inaccurate information metrics to approximate pose uncertainty, resulting in imbalanced exploration performance and efficiency in the unknown environment. This inspires us to extend the confidence-rich mutual information (CRMI) with measurable pose uncertainty. Specifically, we propose a Rao-Blackwellized particle filter-based localization and mapping scheme (RBPF-CLAM) for CRM, then we develop a new closed-form weighting method to improve the localization accuracy without scan matching. We further derive the uncertain CRMI (UCRMI) with the weighted particles by a more accurate approximation. Simulations and experimental evaluations show the localization accuracy and exploration performance of the proposed methods.
summary: This paper mainly studies the localization and mapping of range sensing robots in the confidence-rich map (CRM) and then extends it to provide a full state estimate for information-theoretic exploration. Most previous works about active simultaneous localization and mapping and exploration always assumed the known robot poses or utilized inaccurate information metrics to approximate pose uncertainty, resulting in imbalanced exploration performance and efficiency in the unknown environment. This inspires us to extend the confidence-rich mutual information (CRMI) with measurable pose uncertainty. Specifically, we propose a Rao-Blackwellized particle filter-based localization and mapping scheme (RBPF-CLAM) for CRM, then we develop a new closed-form weighting method to improve the localization accuracy without scan matching. We further derive the uncertain CRMI (UCRMI) with the weighted particles by a more accurate approximation. Simulations and experimental evaluations show the localization accuracy and exploration performance of the proposed methods.
abstract_zh: 本文主要研究距离感测机器人在置信度丰富的地图（CRM）中的定位和建图，然后将其扩展为信息论探索提供完整的状态估计。以往大多数关于主动同步定位、建图和探索的工作总是假设已知的机器人姿态或利用不准确的信息度量来近似姿态不确定性，导致未知环境中探索性能和效率的不平衡。这激励我们扩展具有可测量的不确定性的置信丰富的互信息（CRMI）。具体来说，我们提出了一种用于 CRM 的基于 Rao-Blackwellized 粒子滤波器的定位和映射方案（RBPF-CLAM），然后我们开发了一种新的封闭形式加权方法来提高定位精度，而无需扫描匹配。我们通过更准确的近似进一步推导出带有加权粒子的不确定CRMI (UCRMI)。仿真和实验评估显示了所提出方法的定位精度和探索性能。

AI.tldr: 研究基于粒子滤波的自信丰富定位与映射方法，以提升机器人在未知环境中的探索性能与效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因假设已知机器人姿态或使用不准确的信息度量，导致探索性能和效率不均衡，需改进姿态不确定性建模以提升探索效果。
AI.method: 提出基于Rao-Blackwellized粒子滤波的定位与映射方案（RBPF-CLAM），结合新的闭式加权方法提升定位精度，并推导不确定CRMI（UCRMI）以更准确逼近姿态不确定性。
AI.result: 仿真与实验表明，所提方法在定位精度和探索性能上优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合姿态不确定性与信息论指标，有效提升了机器人探索的精度与效率，为未知环境建图提供了新思路。

This inspires us to extend the confidence-rich mutual information (CRMI) with measurable pose uncertainty. Specifically, we propose a Rao-Blackwellized particle filter-based localization and mapping scheme (RBPF-CLAM) for CRM, then we develop a new closed-form weighting method to improve the localization accuracy without scan matching. We further derive the uncertain CRMI (UCRMI) with the weighted particles by a more accurate approximation. Simulations and experimental evaluations show the localization accuracy and exploration performance of the proposed methods. 本文主要研究距离感测机器人在置信度丰富的地图（CRM）中的定位和建图，然后将其扩展为信息论探索提供完整的状态估计。以往大多数关于主动同步定位、建图和探索的工作总是假设已知的机器人姿态或利用不准确的信息度量来近似姿态不确定性，导致未知环境中探索性能和效率的不平衡。这激励我们扩展具有可测量的不确定性的置信丰富的互信息（CRMI）。具体来说，我们提出了一种用于 CRM 的基于 Rao-Blackwellized 粒子滤波器的定位和映射方案（RBPF-CLAM），然后我们开发了一种新的封闭形式加权方法来提高定位精度，而无需扫描匹配。我们通过更准确的近似进一步推导出带有加权粒子的不确定CRMI (UCRMI)。仿真和实验评估显示了所提出方法的定位精度和探索性能。 研究基于粒子滤波的自信丰富定位与映射方法，以提升机器人在未知环境中的探索性能与效率。 Yang Xu,Ronghao Zheng,Senlin Zhang,Meiqin Liu cs.RO

title: ValAsp: a tool for data validation in Answer Set Programming
title_zh: ValAsp：答案集编程中的数据验证工具
comment: Under consideration for acceptance in TPLP
comments: Under consideration for acceptance in TPLP
abstract: The development of complex software requires tools promoting fail-fast approaches, so that bugs and unexpected behavior can be quickly identified and fixed. Tools for data validation may save the day of computer programmers. In fact, processing invalid data is a waste of resources at best, and a drama at worst if the problem remains unnoticed and wrong results are used for business. Answer Set Programming (ASP) is not an exception, but the quest for better and better performance resulted in systems that essentially do not validate data. Even under the simplistic assumption that input/output data are eventually validated by external tools, invalid data may appear in other portions of the program, and go undetected until some other module of the designed software suddenly breaks. This paper formalizes the problem of data validation for ASP programs, introduces a language to specify data validation, and presents \textsc{valasp}, a tool to inject data validation in ordinary programs. The proposed approach promotes fail-fast techniques at coding time without imposing any lag on the deployed system if data are pretended to be valid. Validation can be specified in terms of statements using YAML, ASP and Python. Additionally, the proposed approach opens the possibility to use ASP for validating data of imperative programming languages. Under consideration for acceptance in TPLP.
summary: The development of complex software requires tools promoting fail-fast approaches, so that bugs and unexpected behavior can be quickly identified and fixed. Tools for data validation may save the day of computer programmers. In fact, processing invalid data is a waste of resources at best, and a drama at worst if the problem remains unnoticed and wrong results are used for business. Answer Set Programming (ASP) is not an exception, but the quest for better and better performance resulted in systems that essentially do not validate data. Even under the simplistic assumption that input/output data are eventually validated by external tools, invalid data may appear in other portions of the program, and go undetected until some other module of the designed software suddenly breaks. This paper formalizes the problem of data validation for ASP programs, introduces a language to specify data validation, and presents \textsc{valasp}, a tool to inject data validation in ordinary programs. The proposed approach promotes fail-fast techniques at coding time without imposing any lag on the deployed system if data are pretended to be valid. Validation can be specified in terms of statements using YAML, ASP and Python. Additionally, the proposed approach opens the possibility to use ASP for validating data of imperative programming languages. Under consideration for acceptance in TPLP.
abstract_zh: 复杂软件的开发需要促进快速失败方法的工具，以便可以快速识别和修复错误和意外行为。数据验证工具可能会拯救计算机程序员的命运。事实上，处理无效数据往好了说是浪费资源，往坏了说是如果问题未被注意到而将错误的结果用于业务的话，那就是一场戏剧。答案集编程 (ASP) 也不例外，但对越来越好的性能的追求导致系统本质上不验证数据。即使在输入/输出数据最终由外部工具验证的简单假设下，无效数据也可能出现在程序的其他部分中，并且直到设计软件的某些其他模块突然损坏时才被发现。本文形式化了 ASP 程序的数据验证问题，介绍了一种指定数据验证的语言，并提出了 \textsc{valasp}，一个在普通程序中注入数据验证的工具。所提出的方法在编码时促进了快速失败技术，如果数据被假装有效，则不会对已部署的系统造成任何滞后。可以使用 YAML、ASP 和 Python 根据语句指定验证。此外，所提出的方法还提供了使用 ASP 验证命令式编程语言数据的可能性。正在考虑接受 TPLP。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种名为ValAsp的工具，用于在答案集编程（ASP）中进行数据验证。
AI.motivation: 复杂的软件开发需要工具支持快速失败方法，以快速识别和修复错误。然而，ASP系统在追求性能的过程中往往忽略了数据验证，导致无效数据可能引发严重问题。
AI.method: 本文提出了一个用于指定数据验证的语言，并开发了ValAsp工具，能够在普通程序中注入数据验证。验证可以通过YAML、ASP和Python语句进行指定。
AI.result: ValAsp工具能够促进在编码时使用快速失败技术，并且在数据被假定为有效的情况下不会对系统性能造成影响。此外，这种方法还为使用ASP验证其他编程语言的数据提供了可能性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法为ASP程序的数据验证提供了有效解决方案，有助于提高软件的可靠性和稳定性。

title: Evaluation of Neuromorphic Spike Encoding of Sound Using Information Theory
title_zh: 使用信息论评估声音的神经形态尖峰编码
abstract: The problem of spike encoding of sound consists in transforming a sound waveform into spikes. It is of interest in many domains, including the development of audio-based spiking neural networks, where it is the first and most crucial stage of processing. Many algorithms have been proposed to perform spike encoding of sound. However, a systematic approach to quantitatively evaluate their performance is currently lacking. We propose the use of an information-theoretic framework to solve this problem. Specifically, we evaluate the coding efficiency of four spike encoding algorithms on two coding tasks that consist of coding the fundamental characteristics of sound: frequency and amplitude. The algorithms investigated are: Independent Spike Coding, Send-on-Delta coding, Ben's Spiker Algorithm, and Leaky Integrate-and-Fire coding. Using the tools of information theory, we estimate the information that the spikes carry on relevant aspects of an input stimulus. We find disparities in the coding efficiencies of the algorithms, where Leaky Integrate-and-Fire coding performs best. The information-theoretic analysis of their performance on these coding tasks provides insight on the encoding of richer and more complex sound stimuli.
summary: The problem of spike encoding of sound consists in transforming a sound waveform into spikes. It is of interest in many domains, including the development of audio-based spiking neural networks, where it is the first and most crucial stage of processing. Many algorithms have been proposed to perform spike encoding of sound. However, a systematic approach to quantitatively evaluate their performance is currently lacking. We propose the use of an information-theoretic framework to solve this problem. Specifically, we evaluate the coding efficiency of four spike encoding algorithms on two coding tasks that consist of coding the fundamental characteristics of sound: frequency and amplitude. The algorithms investigated are: Independent Spike Coding, Send-on-Delta coding, Ben's Spiker Algorithm, and Leaky Integrate-and-Fire coding. Using the tools of information theory, we estimate the information that the spikes carry on relevant aspects of an input stimulus. We find disparities in the coding efficiencies of the algorithms, where Leaky Integrate-and-Fire coding performs best. The information-theoretic analysis of their performance on these coding tasks provides insight on the encoding of richer and more complex sound stimuli.
abstract_zh: 声音尖峰编码的问题在于将声音波形转换为尖峰。它在许多领域都很有趣，包括基于音频的尖峰神经网络的开发，它是处理的第一个也是最关键的阶段。已经提出了许多算法来执行声音的尖峰编码。然而，目前缺乏定量评估其绩效的系统方法。我们建议使用信息论框架来解决这个问题。具体来说，我们评估了四种尖峰编码算法在两个编码任务上的编码效率，这两个任务包括对声音的基本特征进行编码：频率和幅度。所研究的算法有：独立尖峰编码、Send-on-Delta 编码、Ben 尖峰算法和泄漏积分火编码。使用信息论工具，我们估计尖峰所携带的输入刺激相关方面的信息。我们发现算法的编码效率存在差异，其中 Leaky Integrate-and-Fire 编码表现最好。对它们在这些编码任务上的表现进行信息论分析，为更丰富、更复杂的声音刺激的编码提供了见解。

AI.tldr: 本文通过信息论框架评估四种声音脉冲编码算法在频率和振幅编码任务中的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有声音脉冲编码算法缺乏系统的定量性能评估方法，需建立客观评价体系以指导算法优化。
AI.method: 采用信息论工具量化评估独立脉冲编码、Send-on-Delta编码、Ben算法和漏积分-火神经元编码四类算法的信息传递效率。
AI.result: 实验发现漏积分-火神经元编码在信息保持能力上表现最优，不同算法存在显著效率差异。
AI.conclusion: 信息论分析方法能有效揭示算法性能差异，为复杂声学信号的脉冲编码研究提供理论依据。

authors_text: Breno M. F. Viana,Leonardo T. Pereira,Claudio F. M. Toledo
title: Illuminating the Space of Enemies Through MAP-Elites
title_zh: 通过 MAP-精英照亮敌人的空间
comment: 8 pages, 9 figures, version accepted for IEEE CoG '22
comments: 8 pages, 9 figures, version accepted for IEEE CoG '22
abstract: Action-Adventure games have several challenges to overcome, where the most common are enemies. The enemies' goal is to hinder the players' progression by taking life points, and the way they hinder this progress is distinct for different kinds of enemies. In this context, this paper introduces an extended version of an evolutionary approach for procedurally generating enemies that target the enemy's difficulty as the goal. Our approach advances the enemy generation research by incorporating a MAP-Elites population to generate diverse enemies without losing quality. The computational experiment showed the method converged most enemies in the MAP-Elites in less than a second for most cases. Besides, we experimented with players who played an Action-Adventure game prototype with enemies we generated. This experiment showed that the players enjoyed most levels they played, and we successfully created enemies perceived as easy, medium, or hard to face.
summary: Action-Adventure games have several challenges to overcome, where the most common are enemies. The enemies' goal is to hinder the players' progression by taking life points, and the way they hinder this progress is distinct for different kinds of enemies. In this context, this paper introduces an extended version of an evolutionary approach for procedurally generating enemies that target the enemy's difficulty as the goal. Our approach advances the enemy generation research by incorporating a MAP-Elites population to generate diverse enemies without losing quality. The computational experiment showed the method converged most enemies in the MAP-Elites in less than a second for most cases. Besides, we experimented with players who played an Action-Adventure game prototype with enemies we generated. This experiment showed that the players enjoyed most levels they played, and we successfully created enemies perceived as easy, medium, or hard to face.
abstract_zh: 动作冒险游戏需要克服多项挑战，其中最常见的是敌人。敌人的目标是通过夺取生命值来阻碍玩家的进步，而对于不同类型的敌人来说，他们阻碍这种进步的方式是不同的。在此背景下，本文介绍了一种进化方法的扩展版本，用于以敌人的难度为目标按程序生成敌人。我们的方法通过整合 MAP 精英群体来生成多样化的敌人而不损失质量，从而推进敌人生成研究。计算实验表明，在大多数情况下，该方法在不到一秒的时间内收敛了 MAP-精英中的大多数敌人。此外，我们还对使用我们生成的敌人玩动作冒险游戏原型的玩家进行了实验。这个实验表明，玩家们很喜欢他们所玩的大多数关卡，并且我们成功地创建了被认为容易、中等或难以面对的敌人。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于MAP-Elites的进化算法，用于生成多样化且质量可控的动作冒险游戏敌人。
AI.motivation: 传统敌人生成方法难以平衡多样性与质量，且缺乏对难度的精准控制，影响游戏体验。
AI.method: 扩展进化算法，引入MAP-Elites种群结构，通过难度指标引导敌人生成，结合玩家测试验证感知难度。
AI.result: 算法在1秒内收敛生成敌人，玩家实验显示生成的敌人难度（易/中/难）被准确感知且游戏体验良好。
AI.conclusion: MAP-Elites方法有效实现敌人多样性与质量的统一，为程序化游戏内容生成提供新思路。

search_text: Illuminating the Space of Enemies Through MAP-Elites 通过 MAP-精英照亮敌人的空间 Action-Adventure games have several challenges to overcome, where the most common are enemies. The enemies' goal is to hinder the players' progression by taking life points, and the way they hinder this progress is distinct for different kinds of enemies. In this context, this paper introduces an extended version of an evolutionary approach for procedurally generating enemies that target the enemy's difficulty as the goal. Our approach advances the enemy generation research by incorporating a MAP-Elites population to generate diverse enemies without losing quality. The computational experiment showed the method converged most enemies in the MAP-Elites in less than a second for most cases. Besides, we experimented with players who played an Action-Adventure game prototype with enemies we generated. This experiment showed that the players enjoyed most levels they played, and we successfully created enemies perceived as easy, medium, or hard to face. 动作冒险游戏需要克服多项挑战，其中最常见的是敌人。敌人的目标是通过夺取生命值来阻碍玩家的进步，而对于不同类型的敌人来说，他们阻碍这种进步的方式是不同的。在此背景下，本文介绍了一种进化方法的扩展版本，用于以敌人的难度为目标按程序生成敌人。我们的方法通过整合 MAP 精英群体来生成多样化的敌人而不损失质量，从而推进敌人生成研究。计算实验表明，在大多数情况下，该方法在不到一秒的时间内收敛了 MAP-精英中的大多数敌人。此外，我们还对使用我们生成的敌人玩动作冒险游戏原型的玩家进行了实验。这个实验表明，玩家们很喜欢他们所玩的大多数关卡，并且我们成功地创建了被认为容易、中等或难以面对的敌人。 本文提出一种基于MAP-Elites的进化算法，用于生成多样化且质量可控的动作冒险游戏敌人。 Breno M. F. Viana,Leonardo T. Pereira,Claudio F. M. Toledo cs.AI,cs.NE

title: A Lightweight Dual-Domain Attention Framework for Sparse-View CT Reconstruction
title_zh: 一种用于稀疏视图 CT 重建的轻量级双域注意力框架
abstract: Computed Tomography (CT) plays an essential role in clinical diagnosis. Due to the adverse effects of radiation on patients, the radiation dose is expected to be reduced as low as possible. Sparse sampling is an effective way, but it will lead to severe artifacts on the reconstructed CT image, thus sparse-view CT image reconstruction has been a prevailing and challenging research area. With the popularity of mobile devices, the requirements for lightweight and real-time networks are increasing rapidly. In this paper, we design a novel lightweight network called CAGAN, and propose a dual-domain reconstruction pipeline for parallel beam sparse-view CT. CAGAN is an adversarial auto-encoder, combining the Coordinate Attention unit, which preserves the spatial information of features. Also, the application of Shuffle Blocks reduces the parameters by a quarter without sacrificing its performance. In the Radon domain, the CAGAN learns the mapping between the interpolated data and fringe-free projection data. After the restored Radon data is reconstructed to an image, the image is sent into the second CAGAN trained for recovering the details, so that a high-quality image is obtained. Experiments indicate that the CAGAN strikes an excellent balance between model complexity and performance, and our pipeline outperforms the DD-Net and the DuDoNet.
summary: Computed Tomography (CT) plays an essential role in clinical diagnosis. Due to the adverse effects of radiation on patients, the radiation dose is expected to be reduced as low as possible. Sparse sampling is an effective way, but it will lead to severe artifacts on the reconstructed CT image, thus sparse-view CT image reconstruction has been a prevailing and challenging research area. With the popularity of mobile devices, the requirements for lightweight and real-time networks are increasing rapidly. In this paper, we design a novel lightweight network called CAGAN, and propose a dual-domain reconstruction pipeline for parallel beam sparse-view CT. CAGAN is an adversarial auto-encoder, combining the Coordinate Attention unit, which preserves the spatial information of features. Also, the application of Shuffle Blocks reduces the parameters by a quarter without sacrificing its performance. In the Radon domain, the CAGAN learns the mapping between the interpolated data and fringe-free projection data. After the restored Radon data is reconstructed to an image, the image is sent into the second CAGAN trained for recovering the details, so that a high-quality image is obtained. Experiments indicate that the CAGAN strikes an excellent balance between model complexity and performance, and our pipeline outperforms the DD-Net and the DuDoNet.
abstract_zh: 计算机断层扫描（CT）在临床诊断中发挥着重要作用。由于放射线对患者的不良影响，预计放射剂量应尽可能降低。稀疏采样是一种有效的方法，但它会导致重建的CT图像出现严重的伪影，因此稀疏视图CT图像重建一直是一个普遍且具有挑战性的研究领域。随着移动设备的普及，对网络轻量级、实时性的要求迅速提高。在本文中，我们设计了一种名为 CAGAN 的新型轻量级网络，并提出了一种用于平行束稀疏视图 CT 的双域重建管道。 CAGAN是一种对抗性自动编码器，结合了坐标注意单元，保留了特征的空间信息。此外，Shuffle Blocks的应用在不牺牲性能的情况下将参数减少了四分之一。在 Radon 域中，CAGAN 学习插值数据和无条纹投影数据之间的映射。将恢复的氡气数据重建为图像后，将图像送入经过训练的第二个CAGAN进行细节恢复，从而得到高质量的图像。实验表明，CAGAN 在模型复杂性和性能之间取得了良好的平衡，并且我们的管道优于 DD-Net 和 DuDoNet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级双域注意力框架CAGAN，用于解决稀疏视角CT图像重建中的伪影问题，并提升模型的实时性。
AI.motivation: 稀疏采样可降低CT辐射剂量但导致严重伪影，且移动设备需求推动轻量实时网络的发展，现有方法在性能与复杂度间难以平衡。
AI.method: 设计CAGAN网络，结合坐标注意力机制与Shuffle Block减少参数量，采用双域重建流程：在Radon域学习插值数据与无伪影投影的映射，再通过图像域CAGAN恢复细节。
AI.result: 实验表明CAGAN在模型复杂度与性能间达到良好平衡，优于DD-Net和DuDoNet，在稀疏视角CT重建任务中取得更优结果。
AI.conclusion: CAGAN通过双域注意力机制与轻量化设计，有效解决了稀疏视角CT重建的伪影问题，为移动医疗设备提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Feihu Che,Guohua Yang,Pengpeng Shao,Dawei Zhang,Jianhua Tao
title: MixKG: Mixing for harder negative samples in knowledge graph
title_zh: MixKG：混合知识图中较难的负样本
abstract: Knowledge graph embedding~(KGE) aims to represent entities and relations into low-dimensional vectors for many real-world applications. The representations of entities and relations are learned via contrasting the positive and negative triplets. Thus, high-quality negative samples are extremely important in KGE. However, the present KGE models either rely on simple negative sampling methods, which makes it difficult to obtain informative negative triplets; or employ complex adversarial methods, which requires more training data and strategies. In addition, these methods can only construct negative triplets using the existing entities, which limits the potential to explore harder negative triplets. To address these issues, we adopt mixing operation in generating harder negative samples for knowledge graphs and introduce an inexpensive but effective method called MixKG. Technically, MixKG first proposes two kinds of criteria to filter hard negative triplets among the sampled negatives: based on scoring function and based on correct entity similarity. Then, MixKG synthesizes harder negative samples via the convex combinations of the paired selected hard negatives. Experiments on two public datasets and four classical KGE methods show MixKG is superior to previous negative sampling algorithms.
summary: Knowledge graph embedding~(KGE) aims to represent entities and relations into low-dimensional vectors for many real-world applications. The representations of entities and relations are learned via contrasting the positive and negative triplets. Thus, high-quality negative samples are extremely important in KGE. However, the present KGE models either rely on simple negative sampling methods, which makes it difficult to obtain informative negative triplets; or employ complex adversarial methods, which requires more training data and strategies. In addition, these methods can only construct negative triplets using the existing entities, which limits the potential to explore harder negative triplets. To address these issues, we adopt mixing operation in generating harder negative samples for knowledge graphs and introduce an inexpensive but effective method called MixKG. Technically, MixKG first proposes two kinds of criteria to filter hard negative triplets among the sampled negatives: based on scoring function and based on correct entity similarity. Then, MixKG synthesizes harder negative samples via the convex combinations of the paired selected hard negatives. Experiments on two public datasets and four classical KGE methods show MixKG is superior to previous negative sampling algorithms.
abstract_zh: 知识图嵌入〜（KGE）旨在将实体和关系表示为低维向量，以用于许多现实世界的应用。实体和关系的表示是通过对比正负三元组来学习的。因此，高质量的负样本在 KGE 中极其重要。然而，目前的KGE模型要么依赖于简单的负采样方法，这使得很难获得信息丰富的负三元组；或者采用复杂的对抗方法，这需要更多的训练数据和策略。此外，这些方法只能使用现有实体构造负三元组，这限制了探索更困难的负三元组的潜力。为了解决这些问题，我们采用混合操作来为知识图生成更难的负样本，并引入一种廉价但有效的方法，称为 MixKG。从技术上讲，MixKG首先提出了两种标准来过滤采样负数中的硬负三元组：基于评分函数和基于正确的实体相似性。然后，MixKG 通过配对选定的硬负样本的凸组合来合成更硬的负样本。在两个公共数据集和四种经典 KGE 方法上的实验表明，MixKG 优于之前的负采样算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MixKG方法，通过混合操作生成更难的负样本以提升知识图谱嵌入（KGE）效果。
AI.motivation: 现有KGE模型的负样本生成方法存在两大问题：简单采样难以获得信息量大的负样本，复杂对抗方法依赖更多数据和策略；且现有方法仅能基于已有实体构造负样本，限制了探索更难样本的潜力。
AI.method: MixKG通过两种标准筛选硬负样本（基于评分函数和正确实体相似度），再通过凸组合合成更难的负样本。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集和四种经典KGE方法上，MixKG优于现有负样本生成算法。
AI.conclusion: MixKG提供了一种高效且有效的负样本生成方法，为知识图谱嵌入任务中的负样本优化提供了新思路。

motivation: 现有KGE模型的负样本生成方法存在两大问题：简单采样难以获得信息量大的负样本，复杂对抗方法依赖更多数据和策略；且现有方法仅能基于已有实体构造负样本，限制了探索更难样本的潜力。
method: MixKG通过两种标准筛选硬负样本（基于评分函数和正确实体相似度），再通过凸组合合成更难的负样本。
result: 在两个公开数据集和四种经典KGE方法上，MixKG优于现有负样本生成算法。
conclusion: MixKG提供了一种高效且有效的负样本生成方法，为知识图谱嵌入任务中的负样本优化提供了新思路。
search_text: MixKG: Mixing for harder negative samples in knowledge graph MixKG：混合知识图中较难的负样本 Knowledge graph embedding~(KGE) aims to represent entities and relations into low-dimensional vectors for many real-world applications. The representations of entities and relations are learned via contrasting the positive and negative triplets. Thus, high-quality negative samples are extremely important in KGE. However, the present KGE models either rely on simple negative sampling methods, which makes it difficult to obtain informative negative triplets; or employ complex adversarial methods, which requires more training data and strategies. In addition, these methods can only construct negative triplets using the existing entities, which limits the potential to explore harder negative triplets. To address these issues, we adopt mixing operation in generating harder negative samples for knowledge graphs and introduce an inexpensive but effective method called MixKG. Technically, MixKG first proposes two kinds of criteria to filter hard negative triplets among the sampled negatives: based on scoring function and based on correct entity similarity. Then, MixKG synthesizes harder negative samples via the convex combinations of the paired selected hard negatives. Experiments on two public datasets and four classical KGE methods show MixKG is superior to previous negative sampling algorithms. 知识图嵌入〜（KGE）旨在将实体和关系表示为低维向量，以用于许多现实世界的应用。实体和关系的表示是通过对比正负三元组来学习的。因此，高质量的负样本在 KGE 中极其重要。然而，目前的KGE模型要么依赖于简单的负采样方法，这使得很难获得信息丰富的负三元组；或者采用复杂的对抗方法，这需要更多的训练数据和策略。此外，这些方法只能使用现有实体构造负三元组，这限制了探索更困难的负三元组的潜力。为了解决这些问题，我们采用混合操作来为知识图生成更难的负样本，并引入一种廉价但有效的方法，称为 MixKG。从技术上讲，MixKG首先提出了两种标准来过滤采样负数中的硬负三元组：基于评分函数和基于正确的实体相似性。然后，MixKG 通过配对选定的硬负样本的凸组合来合成更硬的负样本。在两个公共数据集和四种经典 KGE 方法上的实验表明，MixKG 优于之前的负采样算法。 本文提出MixKG方法，通过混合操作生成更难的负样本以提升知识图谱嵌入（KGE）效果。 Feihu Che,Guohua Yang,Pengpeng Shao,Dawei Zhang,Jianhua Tao cs.AI

title: Image-to-Graph Transformers for Chemical Structure Recognition
title_zh: 用于化学结构识别的图像到图形转换器
abstract: For several decades, chemical knowledge has been published in written text, and there have been many attempts to make it accessible, for example, by transforming such natural language text to a structured format. Although the discovered chemical itself commonly represented in an image is the most important part, the correct recognition of the molecular structure from the image in literature still remains a hard problem since they are often abbreviated to reduce the complexity and drawn in many different styles. In this paper, we present a deep learning model to extract molecular structures from images. The proposed model is designed to transform the molecular image directly into the corresponding graph, which makes it capable of handling non-atomic symbols for abbreviations. Also, by end-to-end learning approach it can fully utilize many open image-molecule pair data from various sources, and hence it is more robust to image style variation than other tools. The experimental results show that the proposed model outperforms the existing models with 17.1 % and 12.8 % relative improvement for well-known benchmark datasets and large molecular images that we collected from literature, respectively.
summary: For several decades, chemical knowledge has been published in written text, and there have been many attempts to make it accessible, for example, by transforming such natural language text to a structured format. Although the discovered chemical itself commonly represented in an image is the most important part, the correct recognition of the molecular structure from the image in literature still remains a hard problem since they are often abbreviated to reduce the complexity and drawn in many different styles. In this paper, we present a deep learning model to extract molecular structures from images. The proposed model is designed to transform the molecular image directly into the corresponding graph, which makes it capable of handling non-atomic symbols for abbreviations. Also, by end-to-end learning approach it can fully utilize many open image-molecule pair data from various sources, and hence it is more robust to image style variation than other tools. The experimental results show that the proposed model outperforms the existing models with 17.1 % and 12.8 % relative improvement for well-known benchmark datasets and large molecular images that we collected from literature, respectively.
abstract_zh: 几十年来，化学知识一直以书面文本形式出版，并且已经进行了许多尝试以使其易于理解，例如，通过将此类自然语言文本转换为结构化格式。尽管所发现的化学物质本身通常以图像形式表示是最重要的部分，但从文献中的图像中正确识别分子结构仍然是一个难题，因为它们经常被缩写以降低复杂性并以多种不同的风格绘制。在本文中，我们提出了一种从图像中提取分子结构的深度学习模型。所提出的模型旨在将分子图像直接转换为相应的图形，这使得它能够处理缩写的非原子符号。此外，通过端到端学习方法，它可以充分利用来自各种来源的许多开放图像分子对数据，因此它比其他工具对图像风格变化更加鲁棒。实验结果表明，所提出的模型优于现有模型，对于众所周知的基准数据集和我们从文献中收集的大分子图像分别相对提高了 17.1% 和 12.8%。

AI.tldr: 提出一种深度学习模型，直接将分子图像转换为图结构以识别化学分子结构。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以处理化学图像中的缩写符号和多样画风，现有工具在图像风格变化时鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 基于Transformer的深度学习模型，直接将分子图像转换为图结构，并通过端到端学习利用多源图像-分子对数据进行训练。
AI.result: 在基准数据集和自建大型分子图像数据集上分别实现17.1%和12.8%的相对性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 该模型能有效处理化学图像中的缩写和风格多样性，相比现有工具具有更优的鲁棒性和识别准确率。

title: Tripartite: Tackle Noisy Labels by a More Precise Partition
title_zh: 三方：通过更精确的划分来解决嘈杂的标签
abstract: Samples in large-scale datasets may be mislabeled due to various reasons, and Deep Neural Networks can easily over-fit to the noisy label data. To tackle this problem, the key point is to alleviate the harm of these noisy labels. Many existing methods try to divide training data into clean and noisy subsets in terms of loss values, and then process the noisy label data varied. One of the reasons hindering a better performance is the hard samples. As hard samples always have relatively large losses whether their labels are clean or noisy, these methods could not divide them precisely. Instead, we propose a Tripartite solution to partition training data more precisely into three subsets: hard, noisy, and clean. The partition criteria are based on the inconsistent predictions of two networks, and the inconsistency between the prediction of a network and the given label. To minimize the harm of noisy labels but maximize the value of noisy label data, we apply a low-weight learning on hard data and a self-supervised learning on noisy label data without using the given labels. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Tripartite can filter out noisy label data more precisely, and outperforms most state-of-the-art methods on five benchmark datasets, especially on real-world datasets.
summary: Samples in large-scale datasets may be mislabeled due to various reasons, and Deep Neural Networks can easily over-fit to the noisy label data. To tackle this problem, the key point is to alleviate the harm of these noisy labels. Many existing methods try to divide training data into clean and noisy subsets in terms of loss values, and then process the noisy label data varied. One of the reasons hindering a better performance is the hard samples. As hard samples always have relatively large losses whether their labels are clean or noisy, these methods could not divide them precisely. Instead, we propose a Tripartite solution to partition training data more precisely into three subsets: hard, noisy, and clean. The partition criteria are based on the inconsistent predictions of two networks, and the inconsistency between the prediction of a network and the given label. To minimize the harm of noisy labels but maximize the value of noisy label data, we apply a low-weight learning on hard data and a self-supervised learning on noisy label data without using the given labels. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Tripartite can filter out noisy label data more precisely, and outperforms most state-of-the-art methods on five benchmark datasets, especially on real-world datasets.
abstract_zh: 大规模数据集中的样本可能由于各种原因而被错误标记，而深度神经网络很容易对噪声标签数据进行过度拟合。解决这个问题的关键是减轻这些嘈杂标签的危害。许多现有方法尝试根据损失值将训练数据分为干净子集和噪声子集，然后对噪声标签数据进行不同的处理。阻碍更好性能的原因之一是硬样本。由于硬样本无论其标签是干净的还是有噪声的，总是具有相对较大的损失，因此这些方法无法精确地划分它们。相反，我们提出了一种三方解决方案，将训练数据更精确地划分为三个子集：硬子集、噪声子集和干净子集。划分标准基于两个网络的不一致预测，以及网络的预测与给定标签之间的不一致。为了最大限度地减少噪声标签的危害，同时最大化噪声标签数据的价值，我们在硬数据上应用低权重学习，在不使用给定标签的情况下对噪声标签数据应用自监督学习。大量的实验表明，Tripartite 可以更精确地过滤掉噪声标签数据，并且在五个基准数据集上优于大多数最先进的方法，尤其是在真实数据集上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Tripartite方法，通过更精确地将训练数据划分为硬样本、噪声样本和干净样本三类，以解决深度神经网络在噪声标签数据上的过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过损失值划分数据集，但难以准确区分硬样本（无论标签是否噪声均具有较大损失），导致噪声标签处理效果不佳。
AI.method: 基于两个网络预测的不一致性及预测与标签的不一致性，将数据划分为三类：硬样本、噪声样本和干净样本。对硬样本采用低权重学习，对噪声样本采用无需标签的自监督学习。
AI.result: 在五个基准数据集上实验表明，Tripartite能更精确过滤噪声标签，尤其在真实世界数据集上优于大多数最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: Tripartite通过精确划分数据子集并结合针对性学习策略，有效缓解了噪声标签问题，提升了模型性能。

title: Training Robots without Robots: Deep Imitation Learning for Master-to-Robot Policy Transfer
title_zh: 在没有机器人的情况下训练机器人：用于主机到机器人策略转移的深度模仿学习
abstract: Deep imitation learning is promising for robot manipulation because it only requires demonstration samples. In this study, deep imitation learning is applied to tasks that require force feedback. However, existing demonstration methods have deficiencies; bilateral teleoperation requires a complex control scheme and is expensive, and kinesthetic teaching suffers from visual distractions from human intervention. This research proposes a new master-to-robot (M2R) policy transfer system that does not require robots for teaching force feedback-based manipulation tasks. The human directly demonstrates a task using a controller. This controller resembles the kinematic parameters of the robot arm and uses the same end-effector with force/torque (F/T) sensors to measure the force feedback. Using this controller, the operator can feel force feedback without a bilateral system. The proposed method can overcome domain gaps between the master and robot using gaze-based imitation learning and a simple calibration method. Furthermore, a Transformer is applied to infer policy from F/T sensory input. The proposed system was evaluated on a bottle-cap-opening task that requires force feedback.
summary: Deep imitation learning is promising for robot manipulation because it only requires demonstration samples. In this study, deep imitation learning is applied to tasks that require force feedback. However, existing demonstration methods have deficiencies; bilateral teleoperation requires a complex control scheme and is expensive, and kinesthetic teaching suffers from visual distractions from human intervention. This research proposes a new master-to-robot (M2R) policy transfer system that does not require robots for teaching force feedback-based manipulation tasks. The human directly demonstrates a task using a controller. This controller resembles the kinematic parameters of the robot arm and uses the same end-effector with force/torque (F/T) sensors to measure the force feedback. Using this controller, the operator can feel force feedback without a bilateral system. The proposed method can overcome domain gaps between the master and robot using gaze-based imitation learning and a simple calibration method. Furthermore, a Transformer is applied to infer policy from F/T sensory input. The proposed system was evaluated on a bottle-cap-opening task that requires force feedback.
abstract_zh: 深度模仿学习对于机器人操作很有希望，因为它只需要演示样本。在这项研究中，深度模仿学习被应用于需要力反馈的任务。然而，现有的演示方法存在缺陷；双边远程操作需要复杂的控制方案并且成本昂贵，并且动觉教学会受到人为干预的视觉干扰。这项研究提出了一种新的主​​机到机器人（M2R）策略传输系统，不需要机器人来教授基于力反馈的操纵任务。人类使用控制器直接演示任务。该控制器类似于机器人手臂的运动学参数，并使用相同的末端执行器和力/扭矩 (F/T) 传感器来测量力反馈。使用该控制器，操作员无需双边系统即可感受到力反馈。该方法可以使用基于凝视的模仿学习和简单的校准方法来克服主人和机器人之间的领域差距。此外，还应用 Transformer 从 F/T 感官输入推断策略。所提出的系统在需要力反馈的瓶盖打开任务上进行了评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需实际机器人即可训练机器人的深度模仿学习方法，通过人类操作控制器演示力反馈任务，并将策略迁移至机器人。
AI.motivation: 现有示范方法如双侧遥操作成本高且复杂，动觉教学存在视觉干扰，难以有效获取力反馈任务的示范数据。
AI.method: 使用模拟机器人运动学参数的控制器配合力/扭矩传感器采集力反馈数据，结合基于视觉的模仿学习与简单校准方法，利用Transformer模型从力反馈信号中推断策略。
AI.result: 在需要精确力控制的瓶盖开启任务中验证了该系统的有效性，成功实现了从人类示范到机器人策略的迁移。
AI.conclusion: 该方法克服了传统示范方式的局限性，为复杂力反馈任务的机器人策略学习提供了无需实际机器人参与的新方案。

search_text: Training Robots without Robots: Deep Imitation Learning for Master-to-Robot Policy Transfer 在没有机器人的情况下训练机器人：用于主机到机器人策略转移的深度模仿学习 Deep imitation learning is promising for robot manipulation because it only requires demonstration samples. In this study, deep imitation learning is applied to tasks that require force feedback. However, existing demonstration methods have deficiencies; bilateral teleoperation requires a complex control scheme and is expensive, and kinesthetic teaching suffers from visual distractions from human intervention. This research proposes a new master-to-robot (M2R) policy transfer system that does not require robots for teaching force feedback-based manipulation tasks. The human directly demonstrates a task using a controller. This controller resembles the kinematic parameters of the robot arm and uses the same end-effector with force/torque (F/T) sensors to measure the force feedback. Using this controller, the operator can feel force feedback without a bilateral system. The proposed method can overcome domain gaps between the master and robot using gaze-based imitation learning and a simple calibration method. Furthermore, a Transformer is applied to infer policy from F/T sensory input. The proposed system was evaluated on a bottle-cap-opening task that requires force feedback. 深度模仿学习对于机器人操作很有希望，因为它只需要演示样本。在这项研究中，深度模仿学习被应用于需要力反馈的任务。然而，现有的演示方法存在缺陷；双边远程操作需要复杂的控制方案并且成本昂贵，并且动觉教学会受到人为干预的视觉干扰。这项研究提出了一种新的主​​机到机器人（M2R）策略传输系统，不需要机器人来教授基于力反馈的操纵任务。人类使用控制器直接演示任务。该控制器类似于机器人手臂的运动学参数，并使用相同的末端执行器和力/扭矩 (F/T) 传感器来测量力反馈。使用该控制器，操作员无需双边系统即可感受到力反馈。该方法可以使用基于凝视的模仿学习和简单的校准方法来克服主人和机器人之间的领域差距。此外，还应用 Transformer 从 F/T 感官输入推断策略。所提出的系统在需要力反馈的瓶盖打开任务上进行了评估。 本文提出一种无需实际机器人即可训练机器人的深度模仿学习方法，通过人类操作控制器演示力反馈任务，并将策略迁移至机器人。 Heecheol Kim,Yoshiyuki Ohmura,Akihiko Nagakubo,Yasuo Kuniyoshi cs.RO,cs.AI

title: Diversity in deep generative models and generative AI
title_zh: 深度生成模型和生成人工智能的多样性
abstract: The decoder-based machine learning generative algorithms such as Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN), Variational Auto-Encoders (VAE), Transformers show impressive results when constructing objects similar to those in a training ensemble. However, the generation of new objects builds mainly on the understanding of the hidden structure of the training dataset followed by a sampling from a multi-dimensional normal variable. In particular each sample is independent from the others and can repeatedly propose same type of objects. To cure this drawback we introduce a kernel-based measure quantization method that can produce new objects from a given target measure by approximating it as a whole and even staying away from elements already drawn from that distribution. This ensures a better diversity of the produced objects. The method is tested on classic machine learning benchmarks.
summary: The decoder-based machine learning generative algorithms such as Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN), Variational Auto-Encoders (VAE), Transformers show impressive results when constructing objects similar to those in a training ensemble. However, the generation of new objects builds mainly on the understanding of the hidden structure of the training dataset followed by a sampling from a multi-dimensional normal variable. In particular each sample is independent from the others and can repeatedly propose same type of objects. To cure this drawback we introduce a kernel-based measure quantization method that can produce new objects from a given target measure by approximating it as a whole and even staying away from elements already drawn from that distribution. This ensures a better diversity of the produced objects. The method is tested on classic machine learning benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 基于解码器的机器学习生成算法，例如生成对抗网络（GAN）、变分自动编码器（VAE）、Transformers，在构建与训练集合中类似的对象时显示出令人印象深刻的结果。然而，新对象的生成主要建立在对训练数据集隐藏结构的理解之上，然后从多维正态变量中进行采样。特别是每个样本都独立于其他样本，并且可以重复提出相同类型的对象。为了解决这个缺点，我们引入了一种基于内核的度量量化方法，该方法可以通过将给定的目标度量近似为一个整体，甚至远离已经从该分布中提取的元素来从给定的目标度量生成新对象。这确保了所生产的物体具有更好的多样性。该方法在经典机器学习基准上进行了测试。

AI.tldr: 解决深度生成模型中生成对象多样性不足的问题，提出一种基于核的方法来提高生成样本的多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有生成模型生成的样本独立且可能重复，导致多样性不足，需改进方法以提高生成对象的多样性。
AI.method: 提出基于核的度量量化方法，通过整体近似目标分布并避免重复已生成元素，以提高样本多样性。
AI.result: 在经典机器学习基准测试中，该方法有效提升了生成样本的多样性，减少了重复对象的生成。
AI.conclusion: 提出的核基方法有效解决了生成模型多样性不足的问题，为生成AI提供了新的思路。
