title: Bit-wise Training of Neural Network Weights
title_zh: 神经网络权重的按位训练
abstract: We introduce an algorithm where the individual bits representing the weights of a neural network are learned. This method allows training weights with integer values on arbitrary bit-depths and naturally uncovers sparse networks, without additional constraints or regularization techniques. We show better results than the standard training technique with fully connected networks and similar performance as compared to standard training for convolutional and residual networks. By training bits in a selective manner we found that the biggest contribution to achieving high accuracy is given by the first three most significant bits, while the rest provide an intrinsic regularization. As a consequence more than 90\% of a network can be used to store arbitrary codes without affecting its accuracy. These codes may be random noise, binary files or even the weights of previously trained networks.
summary: We introduce an algorithm where the individual bits representing the weights of a neural network are learned. This method allows training weights with integer values on arbitrary bit-depths and naturally uncovers sparse networks, without additional constraints or regularization techniques. We show better results than the standard training technique with fully connected networks and similar performance as compared to standard training for convolutional and residual networks. By training bits in a selective manner we found that the biggest contribution to achieving high accuracy is given by the first three most significant bits, while the rest provide an intrinsic regularization. As a consequence more than 90\% of a network can be used to store arbitrary codes without affecting its accuracy. These codes may be random noise, binary files or even the weights of previously trained networks.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种算法，其中代表神经网络权重的各个位被学习。该方法允许在任意位深度上训练具有整数值的权重，并自然地揭示稀疏网络，而无需额外的约束或正则化技术。与卷积和残差网络的标准训练相比，我们显示出比完全连接网络的标准训练技术更好的结果和相似的性能。通过以选择性的方式训练位，我们发现对实现高精度的最大贡献是由前三个最高有效位给出的，而其余的提供了内在的正则化。因此，超过 90% 的网络可用于存储任意代码，而不会影响其准确性。这些代码可能是随机噪声、二进制文件甚至是先前训练过的网络的权重。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种按位训练神经网络权重的算法，通过学习权重的二进制位实现稀疏网络，并可在不损失精度的情况下存储任意代码。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络训练方法存在权重冗余问题，且稀疏化通常依赖额外正则化技术。本文旨在探索无需人工干预的自然稀疏化方法，并挖掘网络存储能力。
AI.method: 逐位学习神经网络权重的二进制表示，允许任意位深度的整数权重训练。通过选择性训练重要位（前三位）实现精度优化，其余位自动提供正则化效果。
AI.result: 全连接网络精度优于标准方法，卷积/残差网络表现相当。超过90%的网络参数可替换为随机代码、文件或旧权重，精度无损失。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了高效稀疏训练与网络存储功能分离，为模型压缩、参数共享和多功能存储提供了新思路。

search_text: Bit-wise Training of Neural Network Weights 神经网络权重的按位训练 We introduce an algorithm where the individual bits representing the weights of a neural network are learned. This method allows training weights with integer values on arbitrary bit-depths and naturally uncovers sparse networks, without additional constraints or regularization techniques. We show better results than the standard training technique with fully connected networks and similar performance as compared to standard training for convolutional and residual networks. By training bits in a selective manner we found that the biggest contribution to achieving high accuracy is given by the first three most significant bits, while the rest provide an intrinsic regularization. As a consequence more than 90\% of a network can be used to store arbitrary codes without affecting its accuracy. These codes may be random noise, binary files or even the weights of previously trained networks. 我们引入了一种算法，其中代表神经网络权重的各个位被学习。该方法允许在任意位深度上训练具有整数值的权重，并自然地揭示稀疏网络，而无需额外的约束或正则化技术。与卷积和残差网络的标准训练相比，我们显示出比完全连接网络的标准训练技术更好的结果和相似的性能。通过以选择性的方式训练位，我们发现对实现高精度的最大贡献是由前三个最高有效位给出的，而其余的提供了内在的正则化。因此，超过 90% 的网络可用于存储任意代码，而不会影响其准确性。这些代码可能是随机噪声、二进制文件甚至是先前训练过的网络的权重。 本文提出一种按位训练神经网络权重的算法，通过学习权重的二进制位实现稀疏网络，并可在不损失精度的情况下存储任意代码。 Cristian Ivan cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Zhengqing Miao,Xin Zhang,Carlo Menon,Yelong Zheng,Meirong Zhao,Dong Ming
title: Priming Cross-Session Motor Imagery Classification with A Universal Deep Domain Adaptation Framework
title_zh: 使用通用深域适应框架启动跨会话运动想象分类
abstract: Motor imagery (MI) is a common brain computer interface (BCI) paradigm. EEG is non-stationary with low signal-to-noise, classifying motor imagery tasks of the same participant from different EEG recording sessions is generally challenging, as EEG data distribution may vary tremendously among different acquisition sessions. Although it is intuitive to consider the cross-session MI classification as a domain adaptation problem, the rationale and feasible approach is not elucidated. In this paper, we propose a Siamese deep domain adaptation (SDDA) framework for cross-session MI classification based on mathematical models in domain adaptation theory. The proposed framework can be easily applied to most existing artificial neural networks without altering the network structure, which facilitates our method with great flexibility and transferability. In the proposed framework, domain invariants were firstly constructed jointly with channel normalization and Euclidean alignment. Then, embedding features from source and target domain were mapped into the Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space (RKHS) and aligned accordingly. A cosine-based center loss was also integrated into the framework to improve the generalizability of the SDDA. The proposed framework was validated with two classic and popular convolutional neural networks from BCI research field (EEGNet and ConvNet) in two MI-EEG public datasets (BCI Competition IV IIA, IIB). Compared to the vanilla EEGNet and ConvNet, the proposed SDDA framework was able to boost the MI classification accuracy by 15.2%, 10.2% respectively in IIA dataset, and 5.5%, 4.2% in IIB dataset. The final MI classification accuracy reached 82.01% in IIA dataset and 87.52% in IIB, which outperformed the state-of-the-art methods in the literature.
summary: Motor imagery (MI) is a common brain computer interface (BCI) paradigm. EEG is non-stationary with low signal-to-noise, classifying motor imagery tasks of the same participant from different EEG recording sessions is generally challenging, as EEG data distribution may vary tremendously among different acquisition sessions. Although it is intuitive to consider the cross-session MI classification as a domain adaptation problem, the rationale and feasible approach is not elucidated. In this paper, we propose a Siamese deep domain adaptation (SDDA) framework for cross-session MI classification based on mathematical models in domain adaptation theory. The proposed framework can be easily applied to most existing artificial neural networks without altering the network structure, which facilitates our method with great flexibility and transferability. In the proposed framework, domain invariants were firstly constructed jointly with channel normalization and Euclidean alignment. Then, embedding features from source and target domain were mapped into the Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space (RKHS) and aligned accordingly. A cosine-based center loss was also integrated into the framework to improve the generalizability of the SDDA. The proposed framework was validated with two classic and popular convolutional neural networks from BCI research field (EEGNet and ConvNet) in two MI-EEG public datasets (BCI Competition IV IIA, IIB). Compared to the vanilla EEGNet and ConvNet, the proposed SDDA framework was able to boost the MI classification accuracy by 15.2%, 10.2% respectively in IIA dataset, and 5.5%, 4.2% in IIB dataset. The final MI classification accuracy reached 82.01% in IIA dataset and 87.52% in IIB, which outperformed the state-of-the-art methods in the literature.
abstract_zh: 运动想象（MI）是一种常见的脑机接口（BCI）范例。脑电图是非平稳的，信噪比低，对来自不同脑电图记录会话的同一参与者的运动想象任务进行分类通常具有挑战性，因为脑电图数据分布在不同采集会话之间可能存在巨大差异。尽管将跨会话 MI 分类视为域适应问题是直观的，但其基本原理和可行方法尚未阐明。在本文中，我们基于域适应理论中的数学模型，提出了一种用于跨会话 MI 分类的连体深度域适应（SDDA）框架。所提出的框架可以很容易地应用于大多数现有的人工神经网络，而无需改变网络结构，这使得我们的方法具有很大的灵活性和可移植性。在所提出的框架中，域不变量首先与通道归一化和欧几里德对齐联合构建。然后，来自源域和目标域的嵌入特征被映射到再现内核希尔伯特空间（RKHS）并相应地对齐。基于余弦的中心损失也被集成到框架中，以提高 SDDA 的通用性。所提出的框架在两个 MI-EEG 公共数据集（BCI 竞赛 IV IIA、IIB）中使用 BCI 研究领域的两个经典和流行的卷积神经网络（EEGNet 和 ConvNet）进行了验证。与普通的 EEGNet 和 ConvNet 相比，所提出的 SDDA 框架能够在 IIA 数据集中将 MI 分类精度分别提高 15.2%、10.2%，在 IIB 数据集中分别提高 5.5%、4.2%。最终的 MI 分类准确率在 IIA 数据集上达到 82.01%，在 IIB 数据集上达到 87.52%，优于文献中最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用的深度领域自适应框架（SDDA），用于解决跨会话运动想象（MI）分类中的脑电图（EEG）数据分布差异问题。
AI.motivation: EEG信号的非平稳性和低信噪比导致同一受试者不同会话间的MI分类性能下降，传统方法难以有效应对跨会话数据分布差异。
AI.method: 基于领域自适应理论，设计Siamese架构的SDDA框架，结合通道归一化、欧氏对齐、核希尔伯特空间映射及余弦中心损失，实现源域与目标域特征对齐。
AI.result: 在BCI Competition IV IIA/IIB数据集上，SDDA分别使EEGNet和ConvNet的分类准确率提升15.2%/10.2%（IIA）和5.5%/4.2%（IIB），最终达到82.01%和87.52%。
AI.conclusion: SDDA框架通过数学化领域不变特征构建，显著提升了跨会话MI分类性能，验证了其在BCI领域的有效性与通用性。

authors_text: Kehan Long,Vikas Dhiman,Melvin Leok,Jorge Cortés,Nikolay Atanasov
title: Safe Control Synthesis with Uncertain Dynamics and Constraints
title_zh: 具有不确定动力学和约束的安全控制综合
abstract: This paper considers safe control synthesis for dynamical systems with either probabilistic or worst-case uncertainty in both the dynamics model and the safety constraints. We formulate novel probabilistic and robust (worst-case) control Lyapunov function (CLF) and control barrier function (CBF) constraints that take into account the effect of uncertainty in either case. We show that either the probabilistic or the robust (worst-case) formulation leads to a second-order cone program (SOCP), which enables efficient safe and stable control synthesis. We evaluate our approach in PyBullet simulations of an autonomous robot navigating in unknown environments and compare the performance with a baseline CLF-CBF quadratic programming approach.
summary: This paper considers safe control synthesis for dynamical systems with either probabilistic or worst-case uncertainty in both the dynamics model and the safety constraints. We formulate novel probabilistic and robust (worst-case) control Lyapunov function (CLF) and control barrier function (CBF) constraints that take into account the effect of uncertainty in either case. We show that either the probabilistic or the robust (worst-case) formulation leads to a second-order cone program (SOCP), which enables efficient safe and stable control synthesis. We evaluate our approach in PyBullet simulations of an autonomous robot navigating in unknown environments and compare the performance with a baseline CLF-CBF quadratic programming approach.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑了动力学模型和安全约束中具有概率或最坏情况不确定性的动力系统的安全控制综合。我们制定了新颖的概率和鲁棒（最坏情况）控制李亚普诺夫函数（CLF）和控制障碍函数（CBF）约束，其中考虑了两种情况下不确定性的影响。我们证明，无论是概率公式还是稳健（最坏情况）公式都会产生二阶锥程序（SOCP），从而实现高效、安全和稳定的控制综合。我们在未知环境中自主机器人导航的 PyBullet 模拟中评估我们的方法，并将其性能与基线 CLF-CBF 二次规划方法进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在动态系统存在不确定性和约束的情况下，如何合成安全控制策略的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有控制方法难以有效处理动态模型和安全约束中的不确定性，导致控制策略可能不安全或不稳定。
AI.method: 提出概率和鲁棒（最坏情况）控制李雅普诺夫函数（CLF）及控制屏障函数（CBF）约束，将问题转化为二阶锥规划（SOCP）以实现高效求解。
AI.result: 在PyBullet模拟中验证了方法的有效性，相比基线CLF-CBF二次规划方法表现出更优性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架可有效应对动态和约束不确定性，为未知环境中的自主机器人提供安全稳定的控制方案。

title: HDAM: Heuristic Difference Attention Module for Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: HDAM：卷积神经网络的启发式差异注意模块
comment: We need to withdraw this article due to a conflict of interest
comments: We need to withdraw this article due to a conflict of interest
abstract: The attention mechanism is one of the most important priori knowledge to enhance convolutional neural networks. Most attention mechanisms are bound to the convolutional layer and use local or global contextual information to recalibrate the input. This is a popular attention strategy design method. Global contextual information helps the network to consider the overall distribution, while local contextual information is more general. The contextual information makes the network pay attention to the mean or maximum value of a particular receptive field. Different from the most attention mechanism, this article proposes a novel attention mechanism with the heuristic difference attention module, HDAM. HDAM's input recalibration is based on the difference between the local and global contextual information instead of the mean and maximum values. At the same time, to make different layers have a more suitable local receptive field size and increase the exibility of the local receptive field design, we use genetic algorithm to heuristically produce local receptive fields. First, HDAM extracts the mean value of the global and local receptive fields as the corresponding contextual information. Then the difference between the global and local contextual information is calculated. Finally HDAM uses this difference to recalibrate the input. In addition, we use the heuristic ability of genetic algorithm to search for the local receptive field size of each layer. Our experiments on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 show that HDAM can use fewer parameters than other attention mechanisms to achieve higher accuracy. We implement HDAM with the Python library, Pytorch, and the code and models will be publicly available.
summary: The attention mechanism is one of the most important priori knowledge to enhance convolutional neural networks. Most attention mechanisms are bound to the convolutional layer and use local or global contextual information to recalibrate the input. This is a popular attention strategy design method. Global contextual information helps the network to consider the overall distribution, while local contextual information is more general. The contextual information makes the network pay attention to the mean or maximum value of a particular receptive field. Different from the most attention mechanism, this article proposes a novel attention mechanism with the heuristic difference attention module, HDAM. HDAM's input recalibration is based on the difference between the local and global contextual information instead of the mean and maximum values. At the same time, to make different layers have a more suitable local receptive field size and increase the exibility of the local receptive field design, we use genetic algorithm to heuristically produce local receptive fields. First, HDAM extracts the mean value of the global and local receptive fields as the corresponding contextual information. Then the difference between the global and local contextual information is calculated. Finally HDAM uses this difference to recalibrate the input. In addition, we use the heuristic ability of genetic algorithm to search for the local receptive field size of each layer. Our experiments on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 show that HDAM can use fewer parameters than other attention mechanisms to achieve higher accuracy. We implement HDAM with the Python library, Pytorch, and the code and models will be publicly available.
abstract_zh: 注意机制是增强卷积神经网络最重要的先验知识之一。大多数注意力机制都绑定到卷积层，并使用局部或全局上下文信息来重新校准输入。这是一种流行的注意力策略设计方法。全局上下文信息有助于网络考虑整体分布，而局部上下文信息则更为笼统。上下文信息使网络关注特定感受野的平均值或最大值。与大多数注意力机制不同，本文提出了一种新颖的注意力机制，带有启发式差异注意力模块HDAM。 HDAM 的输入重新校准基于局部和全局上下文信息之间的差异，而不是平均值和最大值。同时，为了使不同层具有更合适的局部感受野大小并增加局部感受野设计的灵活性，我们使用遗传算法启发式地产生局部感受野。首先，HDAM提取全局和局部感受野的平均值作为相应的上下文信息。然后计算全局和局部上下文信息之间的差异。最后 HDAM 使用此差异来重新校准输入。此外，我们利用遗传算法的启发式能力来搜索每层的局部感受野大小。我们在 CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 上的实验表明，HDAM 可以使用比其他注意力机制更少的参数来实现更高的准确性。我们使用Python库Pytorch实现HDAM，代码和模型将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的注意力机制——启发式差异注意力模块（HDAM），通过利用局部与全局上下文信息的差异来增强卷积神经网络的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有注意力机制多依赖局部或全局上下文信息的均值或最大值进行输入校准，但未充分利用两者差异的信息潜力，且局部感受野设计缺乏灵活性。
AI.method: HDAM首先提取全局和局部感受野的均值作为上下文信息，计算其差异并用于输入校准。同时采用遗传算法启发式搜索各层的局部感受野尺寸，提升设计灵活性。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100数据集上的实验表明，HDAM在参数量更少的情况下实现了比其他注意力机制更高的准确率。
AI.conclusion: HDAM通过有效利用局部与全局上下文差异并优化感受野设计，为卷积神经网络提供了参数高效且性能优越的注意力机制新方案。

Most attention mechanisms are bound to the convolutional layer and use local or global contextual information to recalibrate the input. This is a popular attention strategy design method. Global contextual information helps the network to consider the overall distribution, while local contextual information is more general. The contextual information makes the network pay attention to the mean or maximum value of a particular receptive field. Different from the most attention mechanism, this article proposes a novel attention mechanism with the heuristic difference attention module, HDAM. HDAM's input recalibration is based on the difference between the local and global contextual information instead of the mean and maximum values. At the same time, to make different layers have a more suitable local receptive field size and increase the exibility of the local receptive field design, we use genetic algorithm to heuristically produce local receptive fields. Then the difference between the global and local contextual information is calculated. Finally HDAM uses this difference to recalibrate the input. In addition, we use the heuristic ability of genetic algorithm to search for the local receptive field size of each layer. Our experiments on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 show that HDAM can use fewer parameters than other attention mechanisms to achieve higher accuracy. title: A Probabilistic Programming Idiom for Active Knowledge Search
title_zh: 用于主动知识搜索的概率编程习惯
abstract: In this paper, we derive and implement a probabilistic programming idiom for the problem of acquiring new knowledge about an environment. The idiom is implemented utilizing a modern probabilistic programming language. We demonstrate the utility of this idiom by implementing an algorithm for the specific problem of active mapping and robot exploration. Finally, we evaluate the functionality of the implementation through an extensive simulation study utilizing the HouseExpo dataset.
summary: In this paper, we derive and implement a probabilistic programming idiom for the problem of acquiring new knowledge about an environment. The idiom is implemented utilizing a modern probabilistic programming language. We demonstrate the utility of this idiom by implementing an algorithm for the specific problem of active mapping and robot exploration. Finally, we evaluate the functionality of the implementation through an extensive simulation study utilizing the HouseExpo dataset.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们推导并实现了一种概率编程习惯，用于解决获取有关环境的新知识的问题。该习惯用法是利用现代概率编程语言实现的。我们通过针对主动映射和机器人探索的特定问题实施算法来展示该习惯用法的实用性。最后，我们利用 HouseExpo 数据集通过广泛的模拟研究来评估实现的功能。

AI.tldr: 提出并实现一种概率编程惯用法，用于通过主动探索获取环境的新知识
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理环境不确定性时效率不足，需更高效的方法进行主动探索和知识获取
AI.method: 利用现代概率编程语言实现概率编程惯用法，并设计算法用于主动映射和机器人探索
AI.result: 模拟实验表明，该方法在主动探索和环境知识获取方面表现出较高的效率和准确性
AI.conclusion: 提出的概率编程惯用法有效支持主动知识搜索，适用于机器人探索等场景，为复杂环境下的决策提供新方法

authors_text: Rui Duan,Hui Deng,Mao Tian,Yichuan Deng,Jiarui Lin
title: SODA: Site Object Detection dAtaset for Deep Learning in Construction
title_zh: SODA：用于建筑深度学习的现场对象检测数据集
abstract: Computer vision-based deep learning object detection algorithms have been developed sufficiently powerful to support the ability to recognize various objects. Although there are currently general datasets for object detection, there is still a lack of large-scale, open-source dataset for the construction industry, which limits the developments of object detection algorithms as they tend to be data-hungry. Therefore, this paper develops a new large-scale image dataset specifically collected and annotated for the construction site, called Site Object Detection dAtaset (SODA), which contains 15 kinds of object classes categorized by workers, materials, machines, and layout. Firstly, more than 20,000 images were collected from multiple construction sites in different site conditions, weather conditions, and construction phases, which covered different angles and perspectives. After careful screening and processing, 19,846 images including 286,201 objects were then obtained and annotated with labels in accordance with predefined categories. Statistical analysis shows that the developed dataset is advantageous in terms of diversity and volume. Further evaluation with two widely-adopted object detection algorithms based on deep learning (YOLO v3/ YOLO v4) also illustrates the feasibility of the dataset for typical construction scenarios, achieving a maximum mAP of 81.47%. In this manner, this research contributes a large-scale image dataset for the development of deep learning-based object detection methods in the construction industry and sets up a performance benchmark for further evaluation of corresponding algorithms in this area.
summary: Computer vision-based deep learning object detection algorithms have been developed sufficiently powerful to support the ability to recognize various objects. Although there are currently general datasets for object detection, there is still a lack of large-scale, open-source dataset for the construction industry, which limits the developments of object detection algorithms as they tend to be data-hungry. Therefore, this paper develops a new large-scale image dataset specifically collected and annotated for the construction site, called Site Object Detection dAtaset (SODA), which contains 15 kinds of object classes categorized by workers, materials, machines, and layout. Firstly, more than 20,000 images were collected from multiple construction sites in different site conditions, weather conditions, and construction phases, which covered different angles and perspectives. After careful screening and processing, 19,846 images including 286,201 objects were then obtained and annotated with labels in accordance with predefined categories. Statistical analysis shows that the developed dataset is advantageous in terms of diversity and volume. Further evaluation with two widely-adopted object detection algorithms based on deep learning (YOLO v3/ YOLO v4) also illustrates the feasibility of the dataset for typical construction scenarios, achieving a maximum mAP of 81.47%. In this manner, this research contributes a large-scale image dataset for the development of deep learning-based object detection methods in the construction industry and sets up a performance benchmark for further evaluation of corresponding algorithms in this area.
abstract_zh: 基于计算机视觉的深度学习对象检测算法已经开发得足够强大，足以支持识别各种对象的能力。尽管目前有用于目标检测的通用数据集，但仍然缺乏针对建筑行业的大规模开源数据集，这限制了目标检测算法的发展，因为它们往往需要数据。因此，本文开发了一种专门针对建筑工地收集和标注的新型大规模图像数据集，称为工地对象检测数据集（SODA），其中包含按工人、材料、机器和布局分类的 15 种对象类。首先，从多个施工现场收集了2万多张不同现场条件、天气条件、施工阶段的图像，覆盖了不同的角度和视角。经过仔细的筛选和处理，获得了包含 286,201 个物体的 19,846 张图像，并根据预定义的类别进行了标签标注。统计分析表明，开发的数据集在多样性和数量方面具有优势。使用两种广泛采用的基于深度学习的目标检测算法（YOLO v3/YOLO v4）的进一步评估也说明了该数据集对于典型构建场景的可行性，达到了81.47%的最大mAP。通过这种方式，本研究为建筑行业基于深度学习的目标检测方法的发展提供了大规模的图像数据集，并为进一步评估该领域的相应算法建立了性能基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为SODA的大型建筑工地目标检测数据集，用于支持深度学习在建筑行业中的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有通用目标检测数据集无法满足建筑行业需求，缺乏大规模开放数据集限制了深度学习算法在建筑场景中的发展。
AI.method: 从多个建筑工地采集20,000余张图像，经过筛选处理后获得19,846张包含286,201个标注物体的图像，并基于YOLOv3/YOLOv4进行可行性验证。
AI.result: 数据集在多样性与规模上具有优势，使用YOLO系列算法在典型建筑场景中实现最高81.47%的mAP性能。
AI.conclusion: SODA数据集为建筑行业深度学习目标检测方法提供了基准数据支持，推动了相关算法的进一步研究与评估。

conclusion: SODA数据集为建筑行业深度学习目标检测方法提供了基准数据支持，推动了相关算法的进一步研究与评估。
search_text: SODA: Site Object Detection dAtaset for Deep Learning in Construction SODA：用于建筑深度学习的现场对象检测数据集 Computer vision-based deep learning object detection algorithms have been developed sufficiently powerful to support the ability to recognize various objects. Although there are currently general datasets for object detection, there is still a lack of large-scale, open-source dataset for the construction industry, which limits the developments of object detection algorithms as they tend to be data-hungry. Therefore, this paper develops a new large-scale image dataset specifically collected and annotated for the construction site, called Site Object Detection dAtaset (SODA), which contains 15 kinds of object classes categorized by workers, materials, machines, and layout. Firstly, more than 20,000 images were collected from multiple construction sites in different site conditions, weather conditions, and construction phases, which covered different angles and perspectives. After careful screening and processing, 19,846 images including 286,201 objects were then obtained and annotated with labels in accordance with predefined categories. Statistical analysis shows that the developed dataset is advantageous in terms of diversity and volume. Further evaluation with two widely-adopted object detection algorithms based on deep learning (YOLO v3/ YOLO v4) also illustrates the feasibility of the dataset for typical construction scenarios, achieving a maximum mAP of 81.47%. In this manner, this research contributes a large-scale image dataset for the development of deep learning-based object detection methods in the construction industry and sets up a performance benchmark for further evaluation of corresponding algorithms in this area. 基于计算机视觉的深度学习对象检测算法已经开发得足够强大，足以支持识别各种对象的能力。尽管目前有用于目标检测的通用数据集，但仍然缺乏针对建筑行业的大规模开源数据集，这限制了目标检测算法的发展，因为它们往往需要数据。因此，本文开发了一种专门针对建筑工地收集和标注的新型大规模图像数据集，称为工地对象检测数据集（SODA），其中包含按工人、材料、机器和布局分类的 15 种对象类。首先，从多个施工现场收集了2万多张不同现场条件、天气条件、施工阶段的图像，覆盖了不同的角度和视角。经过仔细的筛选和处理，获得了包含 286,201 个物体的 19,846 张图像，并根据预定义的类别进行了标签标注。统计分析表明，开发的数据集在多样性和数量方面具有优势。使用两种广泛采用的基于深度学习的目标检测算法（YOLO v3/YOLO v4）的进一步评估也说明了该数据集对于典型构建场景的可行性，达到了81.47%的最大mAP。通过这种方式，本研究为建筑行业基于深度学习的目标检测方法的发展提供了大规模的图像数据集，并为进一步评估该领域的相应算法建立了性能基准。 本文提出一个名为SODA的大型建筑工地目标检测数据集，用于支持深度学习在建筑行业中的应用。 Rui Duan,Hui Deng,Mao Tian,Yichuan Deng,Jiarui Lin cs.CV

authors_text: Wei Liu,Cheng Chen,Rui Jiang,Tao Lu,Zixiang Xiong
title: Unpaired Quad-Path Cycle Consistent Adversarial Networks for Single Image Defogging
title_zh: 用于单图像去雾的不成对四路径循环一致对抗网络
abstract: Adversarial learning-based image defogging methods have been extensively studied in computer vision due to their remarkable performance. However, most existing methods have limited defogging capabilities for real cases because they are trained on the paired clear and synthesized foggy images of the same scenes. In addition, they have limitations in preserving vivid color and rich textual details in defogging. To address these issues, we develop a novel generative adversarial network, called quad-path cycle consistent adversarial network (QPC-Net), for single image defogging. QPC-Net consists of a Fog2Fogfree block and a Fogfree2Fog block. In each block, there are three learning-based modules, namely, fog removal, color-texture recovery, and fog synthetic, which sequentially compose dual-path that constrain each other to generate high quality images. Specifically, the color-texture recovery model is designed to exploit the self-similarity of texture and structure information by learning the holistic channel-spatial feature correlations between the foggy image with its several derived images. Moreover, in the fog synthetic module, we utilize the atmospheric scattering model to guide it to improve the generative quality by focusing on an atmospheric light optimization with a novel sky segmentation network. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets show that QPC-Net outperforms state-of-the-art defogging methods in terms of quantitative accuracy and subjective visual quality.
summary: Adversarial learning-based image defogging methods have been extensively studied in computer vision due to their remarkable performance. However, most existing methods have limited defogging capabilities for real cases because they are trained on the paired clear and synthesized foggy images of the same scenes. In addition, they have limitations in preserving vivid color and rich textual details in defogging. To address these issues, we develop a novel generative adversarial network, called quad-path cycle consistent adversarial network (QPC-Net), for single image defogging. QPC-Net consists of a Fog2Fogfree block and a Fogfree2Fog block. In each block, there are three learning-based modules, namely, fog removal, color-texture recovery, and fog synthetic, which sequentially compose dual-path that constrain each other to generate high quality images. Specifically, the color-texture recovery model is designed to exploit the self-similarity of texture and structure information by learning the holistic channel-spatial feature correlations between the foggy image with its several derived images. Moreover, in the fog synthetic module, we utilize the atmospheric scattering model to guide it to improve the generative quality by focusing on an atmospheric light optimization with a novel sky segmentation network. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets show that QPC-Net outperforms state-of-the-art defogging methods in terms of quantitative accuracy and subjective visual quality.
abstract_zh: 基于对抗性学习的图像去雾方法由于其卓越的性能而在计算机视觉领域得到了广泛的研究。然而，大多数现有方法对于实际情况的去雾能力有限，因为它们是在同一场景的配对清晰图像和合成雾图像上进行训练的。此外，它们在去雾时保留鲜艳的色彩和丰富的文本细节方面存在局限性。为了解决这些问题，我们开发了一种新颖的生成对抗网络，称为四路径循环一致对抗网络（QPC-Net），用于单图像去雾。 QPC-Net 由 Fog2Fogfree 模块和 Fogfree2Fog 模块组成。每个块中都有三个基于学习的模块，即去雾、颜色纹理恢复和雾合成，它们依次组成相互约束的双路径以生成高质量图像。具体来说，颜色纹理恢复模型旨在通过学习雾图像与其多个派生图像之间的整体通道空间特征相关性来利用纹理和结构信息的自相似性。此外，在雾合成模块中，我们利用大气散射模型来指导其通过新颖的天空分割网络专注于大气光优化来提高生成质量。对合成数据集和真实数据集的大量实验表明，QPC-Net 在定量准确性和主观视觉质量方面优于最先进的去雾方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于无配对图像的四路径循环对抗网络（QPC-Net），用于单幅图像去雾任务。
AI.motivation: 现有去雾方法依赖配对的清晰与合成雾图训练，导致真实场景处理能力有限，且难以保留生动色彩和纹理细节。
AI.method: 设计QPC-Net网络，包含Fog2Fogfree和Fogfree2Fog双路径模块，通过雾去除、色彩-纹理恢复及雾合成三阶段模块，结合自相似性特征学习与大气散射模型优化，实现高质量去雾。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上实验表明，QPC-Net在定量指标和主观视觉质量上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: QPC-Net通过无配对数据训练和双路径约束机制，有效提升了单幅图像去雾的性能与细节保留能力。

search_text: Unpaired Quad-Path Cycle Consistent Adversarial Networks for Single Image Defogging 用于单图像去雾的不成对四路径循环一致对抗网络 Adversarial learning-based image defogging methods have been extensively studied in computer vision due to their remarkable performance. However, most existing methods have limited defogging capabilities for real cases because they are trained on the paired clear and synthesized foggy images of the same scenes. In addition, they have limitations in preserving vivid color and rich textual details in defogging. To address these issues, we develop a novel generative adversarial network, called quad-path cycle consistent adversarial network (QPC-Net), for single image defogging. QPC-Net consists of a Fog2Fogfree block and a Fogfree2Fog block. In each block, there are three learning-based modules, namely, fog removal, color-texture recovery, and fog synthetic, which sequentially compose dual-path that constrain each other to generate high quality images. Specifically, the color-texture recovery model is designed to exploit the self-similarity of texture and structure information by learning the holistic channel-spatial feature correlations between the foggy image with its several derived images. Moreover, in the fog synthetic module, we utilize the atmospheric scattering model to guide it to improve the generative quality by focusing on an atmospheric light optimization with a novel sky segmentation network. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets show that QPC-Net outperforms state-of-the-art defogging methods in terms of quantitative accuracy and subjective visual quality. 基于对抗性学习的图像去雾方法由于其卓越的性能而在计算机视觉领域得到了广泛的研究。然而，大多数现有方法对于实际情况的去雾能力有限，因为它们是在同一场景的配对清晰图像和合成雾图像上进行训练的。此外，它们在去雾时保留鲜艳的色彩和丰富的文本细节方面存在局限性。为了解决这些问题，我们开发了一种新颖的生成对抗网络，称为四路径循环一致对抗网络（QPC-Net），用于单图像去雾。 QPC-Net 由 Fog2Fogfree 模块和 Fogfree2Fog 模块组成。每个块中都有三个基于学习的模块，即去雾、颜色纹理恢复和雾合成，它们依次组成相互约束的双路径以生成高质量图像。具体来说，颜色纹理恢复模型旨在通过学习雾图像与其多个派生图像之间的整体通道空间特征相关性来利用纹理和结构信息的自相似性。此外，在雾合成模块中，我们利用大气散射模型来指导其通过新颖的天空分割网络专注于大气光优化来提高生成质量。对合成数据集和真实数据集的大量实验表明，QPC-Net 在定量准确性和主观视觉质量方面优于最先进的去雾方法。 本文提出一种基于无配对图像的四路径循环对抗网络（QPC-Net），用于单幅图像去雾任务。 Wei Liu,Cheng Chen,Rui Jiang,Tao Lu,Zixiang Xiong cs.CV

title: Implementing Boolean Functions with switching lattice networks
title_zh: 使用交换晶格网络实现布尔函数
abstract: Four terminal switching network is an alternative structure to realize the logic functions in electronic circuit modeling. This network can be used to implement a Boolean function with less number of switches than the two terminal based CMOS switch. Each switch of the network is driven by a Boolean literal. Any switch is connected to its four neighbors if a literal takes the value 1 , else it is disconnected. In our work, we aimed to develop a technique by which we can find out if any Boolean function can be implemented with a given four-terminal network. It is done using the path of any given lattice network. First, we developed a synthesis tool by which we can create a library of Boolean functions with a given four-terminal switching network and random Boolean literals. This tool can be used to check the output of any lattice network which can also function as a lattice network solver. In the next step, we used the library functions to develop and test our MAPPING tool where the functions were given as input and from the output, we can get the implemented function in four terminal lattice network. Finally, we have proposed a systematic procedure to implement any Boolean function with a efficient way by any given one type of lattice network.
summary: Four terminal switching network is an alternative structure to realize the logic functions in electronic circuit modeling. This network can be used to implement a Boolean function with less number of switches than the two terminal based CMOS switch. Each switch of the network is driven by a Boolean literal. Any switch is connected to its four neighbors if a literal takes the value 1 , else it is disconnected. In our work, we aimed to develop a technique by which we can find out if any Boolean function can be implemented with a given four-terminal network. It is done using the path of any given lattice network. First, we developed a synthesis tool by which we can create a library of Boolean functions with a given four-terminal switching network and random Boolean literals. This tool can be used to check the output of any lattice network which can also function as a lattice network solver. In the next step, we used the library functions to develop and test our MAPPING tool where the functions were given as input and from the output, we can get the implemented function in four terminal lattice network. Finally, we have proposed a systematic procedure to implement any Boolean function with a efficient way by any given one type of lattice network.
abstract_zh: 四端交换网络是实现电子电路建模中逻辑功能的另一种结构。该网络可用于实现布尔函数，其开关数量少于基于两端子的 CMOS 开关。网络的每个交换机都由布尔文字驱动。如果文字值为 1 ，则任何交换机都会与其四个邻居连接，否则会断开连接。在我们的工作中，我们的目标是开发一种技术，通过该技术我们可以找出是否可以使用给定的四端网络来实现任何布尔函数。这是使用任何给定格子网络的路径来完成的。首先，我们开发了一个综合工具，通过它我们可以使用给定的四端交换网络和随机布尔文字创建布尔函数库。该工具可用于检查任何晶格网络的输出，该网络也可用作晶格网络求解器。在下一步中，我们使用库函数来开发和测试我们的 MAPPING 工具，其中函数作为输入给出，从输出中，我们可以得到四端格网络中实现的函数。最后，我们提出了一种系统程序，可以通过任何给定的一种类型的格网络以有效的方式实现任何布尔函数。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何使用四端开关晶格网络实现布尔函数。
AI.motivation: 四端开关网络相比传统CMOS开关能够以更少的开关实现逻辑函数，因此研究如何利用该结构实现布尔函数具有重要意义。
AI.method: 作者开发了一个合成工具，用于生成基于四端开关晶格网络和随机布尔字面的布尔函数库，并利用该库开发了映射工具，以测试和实现布尔函数。
AI.result: 成功开发了合成工具和映射工具，并提出了一种系统化的方法，用于高效实现任意布尔函数。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了一种系统化的方法，能够高效地使用四端开关晶格网络实现任意布尔函数，并为相关研究提供了工具支持。

title: Student Dangerous Behavior Detection in School
title_zh: 学校学生危险行为检测
abstract: Video surveillance systems have been installed to ensure the student safety in schools. However, discovering dangerous behaviors, such as fighting and falling down, usually depends on untimely human observations. In this paper, we focus on detecting dangerous behaviors of students automatically, which faces numerous challenges, such as insufficient datasets, confusing postures, keyframes detection and prompt response. To address these challenges, we first build a danger behavior dataset with locations and labels from surveillance videos, and transform action recognition of long videos to an object detection task that avoids keyframes detection. Then, we propose a novel end-to-end dangerous behavior detection method, named DangerDet, that combines multi-scale body features and keypoints-based pose features. We could improve the accuracy of behavior classification due to the highly correlation between pose and behavior. On our dataset, DangerDet achieves 71.0\% mAP with about 11 FPS. It keeps a better balance between the accuracy and time cost.
summary: Video surveillance systems have been installed to ensure the student safety in schools. However, discovering dangerous behaviors, such as fighting and falling down, usually depends on untimely human observations. In this paper, we focus on detecting dangerous behaviors of students automatically, which faces numerous challenges, such as insufficient datasets, confusing postures, keyframes detection and prompt response. To address these challenges, we first build a danger behavior dataset with locations and labels from surveillance videos, and transform action recognition of long videos to an object detection task that avoids keyframes detection. Then, we propose a novel end-to-end dangerous behavior detection method, named DangerDet, that combines multi-scale body features and keypoints-based pose features. We could improve the accuracy of behavior classification due to the highly correlation between pose and behavior. On our dataset, DangerDet achieves 71.0\% mAP with about 11 FPS. It keeps a better balance between the accuracy and time cost.
abstract_zh: 学校安装了视频监控系统，确保学生安全。然而，发现打架、摔倒等危险行为通常依赖于人类不及时的观察。在本文中，我们专注于自动检测学生的危险行为，这面临着数据集不足、姿势混乱、关键帧检测和及时响应等众多挑战。为了应对这些挑战，我们首先使用监控视频中的位置和标签构建危险行为数据集，并将长视频的动作识别转换为避免关键帧检测的对象检测任务。然后，我们提出了一种新颖的端到端危险行为检测方法，名为 DangerDet，该方法结合了多尺度身体特征和基于关键点的姿势特征。由于姿势和行为之间的高度相关性，我们可以提高行为分类的准确性。在我们的数据集上，DangerDet 的 mAP 达到 71.0\%，帧速率约为 11 FPS。它在准确性和时间成本之间保持了更好的平衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动检测学生危险行为（如打架、跌倒）的方法，以提高校园安全监控的效率。
AI.motivation: 传统依赖人工观察的校园安全监控存在响应不及时的问题，而现有技术面临数据不足、姿态混淆等挑战，需提升检测准确性与实时性。
AI.method: 构建包含位置和标签的危险行为数据集，将长视频动作识别转化为目标检测任务；提出融合多尺度人体特征与关键点姿态特征的端到端模型DangerDet。
AI.result: 在自建数据集上达到71.0%的mAP，处理速度约11 FPS，在精度与时间成本间取得平衡。
AI.conclusion: DangerDet通过结合姿态特征与目标检测技术，有效提升了危险行为识别的准确性与实时性，为校园安全监控提供可行方案。

title: Learning to Detect Slip with Barometric Tactile Sensors and a Temporal Convolutional Neural Network
title_zh: 学习使用气压触觉传感器和时间卷积神经网络检测打滑
comment: In Proceedings of the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA'22), Philadelphia, USA, May 23-27, 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2103.13460
comments: In Proceedings of the IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA'22), Philadelphia, USA, May 23-27, 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2103.13460
abstract: The ability to perceive object slip via tactile feedback enables humans to accomplish complex manipulation tasks including maintaining a stable grasp. Despite the utility of tactile information for many applications, tactile sensors have yet to be widely deployed in industrial robotics settings; part of the challenge lies in identifying slip and other events from the tactile data stream. In this paper, we present a learning-based method to detect slip using barometric tactile sensors. These sensors have many desirable properties including high durability and reliability, and are built from inexpensive, off-the-shelf components. We train a temporal convolution neural network to detect slip, achieving high detection accuracies while displaying robustness to the speed and direction of the slip motion. Further, we test our detector on two manipulation tasks involving a variety of common objects and demonstrate successful generalization to real-world scenarios not seen during training. We argue that barometric tactile sensing technology, combined with data-driven learning, is suitable for many manipulation tasks such as slip compensation.
summary: The ability to perceive object slip via tactile feedback enables humans to accomplish complex manipulation tasks including maintaining a stable grasp. Despite the utility of tactile information for many applications, tactile sensors have yet to be widely deployed in industrial robotics settings; part of the challenge lies in identifying slip and other events from the tactile data stream. In this paper, we present a learning-based method to detect slip using barometric tactile sensors. These sensors have many desirable properties including high durability and reliability, and are built from inexpensive, off-the-shelf components. We train a temporal convolution neural network to detect slip, achieving high detection accuracies while displaying robustness to the speed and direction of the slip motion. Further, we test our detector on two manipulation tasks involving a variety of common objects and demonstrate successful generalization to real-world scenarios not seen during training. We argue that barometric tactile sensing technology, combined with data-driven learning, is suitable for many manipulation tasks such as slip compensation.
abstract_zh: 通过触觉反馈感知物体滑动的能力使人类能够完成复杂的操作任务，包括保持稳定的抓握。尽管触觉信息在许多应用中都有用处，但触觉传感器尚未在工业机器人环境中广泛部署。部分挑战在于从触觉数据流中识别滑动和其他事件。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于学习的方法，使用气压触觉传感器来检测滑动。这些传感器具有许多理想的特性，包括高耐用性和可靠性，并且由廉价的现成组件制成。我们训练时间卷积神经网络来检测滑动，实现高检测精度，同时显示出对滑动运动的速度和方向的鲁棒性。此外，我们在涉及各种常见对象的两个操作任务上测试了我们的检测器，并展示了对训练期间未见过的现实场景的成功泛化。我们认为气压触觉传感技术与数据驱动学习相结合，适用于许多操纵任务，例如滑动补偿。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于气压触觉传感器和时间卷积神经网络（TCN）的滑动检测方法，用于工业机器人操作任务。
AI.motivation: 触觉传感器在工业机器人中应用受限，因滑动等事件检测困难。气压触觉传感器具有高耐用性、低成本等优势，但需有效算法处理其数据流。
AI.method: 采用气压触觉传感器采集数据，训练时间卷积神经网络模型，通过时序特征提取实现滑动检测，并测试其对速度和方向变化的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在两种操作任务中实现高检测准确率，模型能泛化至训练未涉及的现实场景，验证了方法在实际应用中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 气压触觉传感结合数据驱动学习可有效解决滑动检测问题，适用于工业机器人操作中的滑动补偿等任务。

authors_text: Yuecong Xu,Jianfei Yang,Haozhi Cao,Jianxiong Yin,Zhenghua Chen,Xiaoli Li,Zhengguo Li,Qianwen Xu
title: Going Deeper into Recognizing Actions in Dark Environments: A Comprehensive Benchmark Study
title_zh: 深入识别黑暗环境中的行为：一项综合基准研究
comment: Accepted by IJCV. Summary of UG2 2021 Track 2, 22 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables
comments: Accepted by IJCV. Summary of UG2 2021 Track 2, 22 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables
abstract: While action recognition (AR) has gained large improvements with the introduction of large-scale video datasets and the development of deep neural networks, AR models robust to challenging environments in real-world scenarios are still under-explored. We focus on the task of action recognition in dark environments, which can be applied to fields such as surveillance and autonomous driving at night. Intuitively, current deep networks along with visual enhancement techniques should be able to handle AR in dark environments, however, it is observed that this is not always the case in practice. To dive deeper into exploring solutions for AR in dark environments, we launched the UG2+ Challenge Track 2 (UG2-2) in IEEE CVPR 2021, with a goal of evaluating and advancing the robustness of AR models in dark environments. The challenge builds and expands on top of a novel ARID dataset, the first dataset for the task of dark video AR, and guides models to tackle such a task in both fully and semi-supervised manners. Baseline results utilizing current AR models and enhancement methods are reported, justifying the challenging nature of this task with substantial room for improvements. Thanks to the active participation from the research community, notable advances have been made in participants' solutions, while analysis of these solutions helped better identify possible directions to tackle the challenge of AR in dark environments.
summary: While action recognition (AR) has gained large improvements with the introduction of large-scale video datasets and the development of deep neural networks, AR models robust to challenging environments in real-world scenarios are still under-explored. We focus on the task of action recognition in dark environments, which can be applied to fields such as surveillance and autonomous driving at night. Intuitively, current deep networks along with visual enhancement techniques should be able to handle AR in dark environments, however, it is observed that this is not always the case in practice. To dive deeper into exploring solutions for AR in dark environments, we launched the UG2+ Challenge Track 2 (UG2-2) in IEEE CVPR 2021, with a goal of evaluating and advancing the robustness of AR models in dark environments. The challenge builds and expands on top of a novel ARID dataset, the first dataset for the task of dark video AR, and guides models to tackle such a task in both fully and semi-supervised manners. Baseline results utilizing current AR models and enhancement methods are reported, justifying the challenging nature of this task with substantial room for improvements. Thanks to the active participation from the research community, notable advances have been made in participants' solutions, while analysis of these solutions helped better identify possible directions to tackle the challenge of AR in dark environments.
abstract_zh: 尽管随着大规模视频数据集的引入和深度神经网络的发展，动作识别 (AR) 取得了巨大进步，但对现实场景中具有挑战性的环境具有鲁棒性的 AR 模型仍有待探索。我们专注于黑暗环境下的动作识别任务，可应用于夜间监控、自动驾驶等领域。直观上，当前的深度网络和视觉增强技术应该能够在黑暗环境中处理 AR，但是，据观察，实际情况并非总是如此。为了更深入地探索黑暗环境下的 AR 解决方案，我们在 IEEE CVPR 2021 上推出了 UG2+ 挑战赛道 2 (UG2-2)，目标是评估和提高黑暗环境下 AR 模型的鲁棒性。该挑战在新颖的 ARID 数据集（第一个用于暗视频 AR 任务的数据集）之上构建和扩展，并指导模型以完全监督和半监督的方式处理此类任务。报告了利用当前 AR 模型和增强方法的基线结果，证明了这项任务的挑战性，并有很大的改进空间。由于研究界的积极参与，参与者的解决方案取得了显着的进步，而对这些解决方案的分析有助于更好地确定应对黑暗环境中 AR 挑战的可能方向。

AI.tldr: 本文聚焦于暗环境下的动作识别任务，通过构建基准数据集和挑战赛推动相关研究。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在暗光等真实场景下的动作识别鲁棒性不足，而该任务在安防和自动驾驶等领域具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 提出ARID数据集并举办UG2+ Challenge Track 2挑战赛，采用全监督和半监督方法评估模型性能，分析现有增强技术与模型的局限性。
AI.result: 挑战赛吸引了社区参与并取得显著进展，分析表明当前方法在暗环境动作识别中仍存在较大提升空间。

search_text: Going Deeper into Recognizing Actions in Dark Environments: A Comprehensive Benchmark Study 深入识别黑暗环境中的行为：一项综合基准研究 While action recognition (AR) has gained large improvements with the introduction of large-scale video datasets and the development of deep neural networks, AR models robust to challenging environments in real-world scenarios are still under-explored. We focus on the task of action recognition in dark environments, which can be applied to fields such as surveillance and autonomous driving at night. Intuitively, current deep networks along with visual enhancement techniques should be able to handle AR in dark environments, however, it is observed that this is not always the case in practice. To dive deeper into exploring solutions for AR in dark environments, we launched the UG2+ Challenge Track 2 (UG2-2) in IEEE CVPR 2021, with a goal of evaluating and advancing the robustness of AR models in dark environments. The challenge builds and expands on top of a novel ARID dataset, the first dataset for the task of dark video AR, and guides models to tackle such a task in both fully and semi-supervised manners. Baseline results utilizing current AR models and enhancement methods are reported, justifying the challenging nature of this task with substantial room for improvements. Thanks to the active participation from the research community, notable advances have been made in participants' solutions, while analysis of these solutions helped better identify possible directions to tackle the challenge of AR in dark environments. 尽管随着大规模视频数据集的引入和深度神经网络的发展，动作识别 (AR) 取得了巨大进步，但对现实场景中具有挑战性的环境具有鲁棒性的 AR 模型仍有待探索。我们专注于黑暗环境下的动作识别任务，可应用于夜间监控、自动驾驶等领域。直观上，当前的深度网络和视觉增强技术应该能够在黑暗环境中处理 AR，但是，据观察，实际情况并非总是如此。为了更深入地探索黑暗环境下的 AR 解决方案，我们在 IEEE CVPR 2021 上推出了 UG2+ 挑战赛道 2 (UG2-2)，目标是评估和提高黑暗环境下 AR 模型的鲁棒性。该挑战在新颖的 ARID 数据集（第一个用于暗视频 AR 任务的数据集）之上构建和扩展，并指导模型以完全监督和半监督的方式处理此类任务。报告了利用当前 AR 模型和增强方法的基线结果，证明了这项任务的挑战性，并有很大的改进空间。由于研究界的积极参与，参与者的解决方案取得了显着的进步，而对这些解决方案的分析有助于更好地确定应对黑暗环境中 AR 挑战的可能方向。 本文聚焦于暗环境下的动作识别任务，通过构建基准数据集和挑战赛推动相关研究。 Yuecong Xu,Jianfei Yang,Haozhi Cao,Jianxiong Yin,Zhenghua Chen,Xiaoli Li,Zhengguo Li,Qianwen Xu cs.CV

title: BP-Triplet Net for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation: A Bayesian Perspective
title_zh: 用于无监督域适应的 BP-三元组网络：贝叶斯视角
abstract: Triplet loss, one of the deep metric learning (DML) methods, is to learn the embeddings where examples from the same class are closer than examples from different classes. Motivated by DML, we propose an effective BP-Triplet Loss for unsupervised domain adaption (UDA) from the perspective of Bayesian learning and we name the model as BP-Triplet Net. In previous metric learning based methods for UDA, sample pairs across domains are treated equally, which is not appropriate due to the domain bias. In our work, considering the different importance of pair-wise samples for both feature learning and domain alignment, we deduce our BP-Triplet loss for effective UDA from the perspective of Bayesian learning. Our BP-Triplet loss adjusts the weights of pair-wise samples in intra domain and inter domain. Especially, it can self attend to the hard pairs (including hard positive pair and hard negative pair). Together with the commonly used adversarial loss for domain alignment, the quality of target pseudo labels is progressively improved. Our method achieved low joint error of the ideal source and target hypothesis. The expected target error can then be upper bounded following Ben-David s theorem. Comprehensive evaluations on five benchmark datasets, handwritten digits, Office31, ImageCLEF-DA, Office-Home and VisDA-2017 demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach for UDA.
summary: Triplet loss, one of the deep metric learning (DML) methods, is to learn the embeddings where examples from the same class are closer than examples from different classes. Motivated by DML, we propose an effective BP-Triplet Loss for unsupervised domain adaption (UDA) from the perspective of Bayesian learning and we name the model as BP-Triplet Net. In previous metric learning based methods for UDA, sample pairs across domains are treated equally, which is not appropriate due to the domain bias. In our work, considering the different importance of pair-wise samples for both feature learning and domain alignment, we deduce our BP-Triplet loss for effective UDA from the perspective of Bayesian learning. Our BP-Triplet loss adjusts the weights of pair-wise samples in intra domain and inter domain. Especially, it can self attend to the hard pairs (including hard positive pair and hard negative pair). Together with the commonly used adversarial loss for domain alignment, the quality of target pseudo labels is progressively improved. Our method achieved low joint error of the ideal source and target hypothesis. The expected target error can then be upper bounded following Ben-David s theorem. Comprehensive evaluations on five benchmark datasets, handwritten digits, Office31, ImageCLEF-DA, Office-Home and VisDA-2017 demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach for UDA.
abstract_zh: Triplet loss 是深度度量学习（DML）方法之一，它是学习来自同一类的示例比来自不同类的示例更接近的嵌入。受 DML 的启发，我们从贝叶斯学习的角度提出了一种用于无监督域适应（UDA）的有效 BP-Triplet Loss，并将该模型命名为 BP-Triplet Net。在之前基于度量学习的 UDA 方法中，跨域的样本对被同等对待，由于域偏差，这是不合适的。在我们的工作中，考虑到成对样本对于特征学习和域对齐的不同重要性，我们从贝叶斯学习的角度推导出有效 UDA 的 BP-Triplet 损失。我们的 BP-Triplet 损失调整域内和域间的成对样本的权重。特别是，它可以自我关注硬对（包括硬正对和硬负对）。与域对齐中常用的对抗性损失一起，目标伪标签的质量逐渐提高。我们的方法实现了理想源和目标假设的低联合误差。根据本大卫定理，预期目标误差可以是上限。对五个基准数据集、手写数字、Office31、ImageCLEF-DA、Office-Home 和 VisDA-2017 的综合评估证明了所提出的 UDA 方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯学习视角的BP-Triplet Net方法，用于无监督域适应（UDA），通过改进三元组损失函数来优化特征学习和域对齐。
AI.motivation: 传统基于度量学习的UDA方法对跨域样本对权重处理不当，未考虑域偏差问题，导致域对齐效果不佳。
AI.method: 从贝叶斯学习角度推导BP-Triplet损失函数，动态调整域内/域间样本对权重，自适应关注难样本（难正样本和难负样本），结合对抗损失提升目标域伪标签质量。
AI.result: 在五个基准数据集（如Office31、VisDA-2017等）上实现较低的联合误差，验证了方法有效性，并通过Ben-David定理上界分析了目标域误差。
AI.conclusion: BP-Triplet Net通过贝叶斯视角优化三元组损失，有效解决了域偏差问题，在无监督域适应任务中表现出色。

authors_text: Haonan Sun,Qiang He,Shouliang Qi,Yudong Yao,Yueyang Teng
title: Improving the Level of Autism Discrimination through GraphRNN Link Prediction
title_zh: 通过 GraphRNN 链接预测提高自闭症歧视水平
abstract: Dataset is the key of deep learning in Autism disease research. However, due to the few quantity and heterogeneity of samples in current dataset, for example ABIDE (Autism Brain Imaging Data Exchange), the recognition research is not effective enough. Previous studies mostly focused on optimizing feature selection methods and data reinforcement to improve accuracy. This paper is based on the latter technique, which learns the edge distribution of real brain network through GraphRNN, and generates the synthetic data which has incentive effect on the discriminant model. The experimental results show that the combination of original and synthetic data greatly improves the discrimination of the neural network. For instance, the most significant effect is the 50-layer ResNet, and the best generation model is GraphRNN, which improves the accuracy by 32.51% compared with the model reference experiment without generation data reinforcement. Because the generated data comes from the learned edge connection distribution of Autism patients and typical controls functional connectivity, but it has better effect than the original data, which has constructive significance for further understanding of disease mechanism and development.
summary: Dataset is the key of deep learning in Autism disease research. However, due to the few quantity and heterogeneity of samples in current dataset, for example ABIDE (Autism Brain Imaging Data Exchange), the recognition research is not effective enough. Previous studies mostly focused on optimizing feature selection methods and data reinforcement to improve accuracy. This paper is based on the latter technique, which learns the edge distribution of real brain network through GraphRNN, and generates the synthetic data which has incentive effect on the discriminant model. The experimental results show that the combination of original and synthetic data greatly improves the discrimination of the neural network. For instance, the most significant effect is the 50-layer ResNet, and the best generation model is GraphRNN, which improves the accuracy by 32.51% compared with the model reference experiment without generation data reinforcement. Because the generated data comes from the learned edge connection distribution of Autism patients and typical controls functional connectivity, but it has better effect than the original data, which has constructive significance for further understanding of disease mechanism and development.
abstract_zh: 数据集是自闭症疾病研究中深度学习的关键。然而，由于当前数据集（例如ABIDE（自闭症脑成像数据交换））中样本数量少且异质性，识别研究不够有效。之前的研究主要集中在优化特征选择方法和数据强化以提高准确性。本文基于后一种技术，通过GraphRNN学习真实大脑网络的边缘分布，生成对判别模型有激励作用的合成数据。实验结果表明，原始数据和合成数据的结合极大地提高了神经网络的辨别力。例如，效果最显着的是50层ResNet，最好的生成模型是GraphRNN，与没有生成数据强化的模型参考实验相比，精度提高了32.51%。因为生成的数据来自于学习到的自闭症患者的边缘连接分布和典型对照的功能连接，但其效果比原始数据更好，这对于进一步了解疾病机制和发展具有建设性意义。

AI.tldr: 通过生成合成脑网络数据提升自闭症识别准确率
AI.motivation: 现有自闭症数据集样本量少且异质性强，传统特征优化方法效果有限
AI.method: 基于GraphRNN学习真实脑网络边分布生成合成数据进行模型增强
AI.result: 合成数据与原始数据结合使50层ResNet准确率提升32.51%
AI.conclusion: 生成数据有效提升判别模型性能，为疾病机制研究提供新思路

Because the generated data comes from the learned edge connection distribution of Autism patients and typical controls functional connectivity, but it has better effect than the original data, which has constructive significance for further understanding of disease mechanism and development. 数据集是自闭症疾病研究中深度学习的关键。然而，由于当前数据集（例如ABIDE（自闭症脑成像数据交换））中样本数量少且异质性，识别研究不够有效。之前的研究主要集中在优化特征选择方法和数据强化以提高准确性。本文基于后一种技术，通过GraphRNN学习真实大脑网络的边缘分布，生成对判别模型有激励作用的合成数据。实验结果表明，原始数据和合成数据的结合极大地提高了神经网络的辨别力。例如，效果最显着的是50层ResNet，最好的生成模型是GraphRNN，与没有生成数据强化的模型参考实验相比，精度提高了32.51%。因为生成的数据来自于学习到的自闭症患者的边缘连接分布和典型对照的功能连接，但其效果比原始数据更好，这对于进一步了解疾病机制和发展具有建设性意义。 通过生成合成脑网络数据提升自闭症识别准确率 Haonan Sun,Qiang He,Shouliang Qi,Yudong Yao,Yueyang Teng cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Geonwoon Jang,Wooseok Lee,Sanghyun Son,Kyoung Mu Lee
title: C2N: Practical Generative Noise Modeling for Real-World Denoising
title_zh: C2N：用于现实世界去噪的实用生成噪声建模
comment: ef:Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV), 2021, pp. 2350-2359
comments: ef:Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV), 2021, pp. 2350-2359
abstract: Learning-based image denoising methods have been bounded to situations where well-aligned noisy and clean images are given, or samples are synthesized from predetermined noise models, e.g., Gaussian. While recent generative noise modeling methods aim to simulate the unknown distribution of real-world noise, several limitations still exist. In a practical scenario, a noise generator should learn to simulate the general and complex noise distribution without using paired noisy and clean images. However, since existing methods are constructed on the unrealistic assumption of real-world noise, they tend to generate implausible patterns and cannot express complicated noise maps. Therefore, we introduce a Clean-to-Noisy image generation framework, namely C2N, to imitate complex real-world noise without using any paired examples. We construct the noise generator in C2N accordingly with each component of real-world noise characteristics to express a wide range of noise accurately. Combined with our C2N, conventional denoising CNNs can be trained to outperform existing unsupervised methods on challenging real-world benchmarks by a large margin.
summary: Learning-based image denoising methods have been bounded to situations where well-aligned noisy and clean images are given, or samples are synthesized from predetermined noise models, e.g., Gaussian. While recent generative noise modeling methods aim to simulate the unknown distribution of real-world noise, several limitations still exist. In a practical scenario, a noise generator should learn to simulate the general and complex noise distribution without using paired noisy and clean images. However, since existing methods are constructed on the unrealistic assumption of real-world noise, they tend to generate implausible patterns and cannot express complicated noise maps. Therefore, we introduce a Clean-to-Noisy image generation framework, namely C2N, to imitate complex real-world noise without using any paired examples. We construct the noise generator in C2N accordingly with each component of real-world noise characteristics to express a wide range of noise accurately. Combined with our C2N, conventional denoising CNNs can be trained to outperform existing unsupervised methods on challenging real-world benchmarks by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 基于学习的图像去噪方法仅限于给出对齐良好的噪声图像和干净图像的情况，或者从预定噪声模型（例如高斯模型）合成样本的情况。虽然最近的生成噪声建模方法旨在模拟现实世界噪声的未知分布，但仍然存在一些局限性。在实际场景中，噪声生成器应该学习模拟一般且复杂的噪声分布，而不使用配对的噪声图像和干净图像。然而，由于现有方法是基于对现实世界噪声的不切实际的假设而构建的，因此它们往往会生成不可信的模式并且无法表达复杂的噪声图。因此，我们引入了一种 Clean-to-Noisy 图像生成框架，即 C2N，来模拟复杂的现实世界噪声，而无需使用任何配对示例。我们根据现实世界噪声特征的每个组成部分相应地构建了 C2N 中的噪声生成器，以准确地表达各种噪声。与我们的 C2N 相结合，传统的去噪 CNN 可以经过训练，在挑战现实世界基准时大幅优于现有的无监督方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出C2N框架，通过生成真实世界噪声分布来提升去噪效果，无需使用配对的噪声-干净图像。
AI.motivation: 现有去噪方法依赖配对数据或预设噪声模型，难以模拟真实复杂噪声分布，导致生成噪声不真实且难以表达复杂噪声图。
AI.method: 构建Clean-to-Noisy（C2N）框架，通过学习真实噪声特征生成噪声，结合传统去噪CNN训练以提升性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，结合C2N的常规CNN在真实世界基准测试中显著优于现有无监督方法。
AI.conclusion: C2N有效模拟了真实噪声分布，无需配对数据即可实现高质量去噪，为实际应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Alexander Johnson,Alejandra Martin,Marlen Quintero,Alison Bailey,Abeer Alwan
title: Can Social Robots Effectively Elicit Curiosity in STEM Topics from K-1 Students During Oral Assessments?
title_zh: 社交机器人能否在口语评估中有效激发 K-1 学生对 STEM 主题的好奇心？
abstract: This paper presents the results of a pilot study that introduces social robots into kindergarten and first-grade classroom tasks. This study aims to understand 1) how effective social robots are in administering educational activities and assessments, and 2) if these interactions with social robots can serve as a gateway into learning about robotics and STEM for young children. We administered a commonly-used assessment (GFTA3) of speech production using a social robot and compared the quality of recorded responses to those obtained with a human assessor. In a comparison done between 40 children, we found no significant differences in the student responses between the two conditions over the three metrics used: word repetition accuracy, number of times additional help was needed, and similarity of prosody to the assessor. We also found that interactions with the robot were successfully able to stimulate curiosity in robotics, and therefore STEM, from a large number of the 164 student participants.
summary: This paper presents the results of a pilot study that introduces social robots into kindergarten and first-grade classroom tasks. This study aims to understand 1) how effective social robots are in administering educational activities and assessments, and 2) if these interactions with social robots can serve as a gateway into learning about robotics and STEM for young children. We administered a commonly-used assessment (GFTA3) of speech production using a social robot and compared the quality of recorded responses to those obtained with a human assessor. In a comparison done between 40 children, we found no significant differences in the student responses between the two conditions over the three metrics used: word repetition accuracy, number of times additional help was needed, and similarity of prosody to the assessor. We also found that interactions with the robot were successfully able to stimulate curiosity in robotics, and therefore STEM, from a large number of the 164 student participants.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了将社交机器人引入幼儿园和一年级课堂任务的试点研究的结果。本研究旨在了解 1) 社交机器人在管理教育活动和评估方面的有效性如何，以及 2) 与社交机器人的这些互动是否可以作为幼儿学习机器人和 STEM 的门户。我们使用社交机器人对语音产生进行了常用的评估（GFTA3），并将记录的反应的质量与人类评估者获得的反应的质量进行了比较。在对 40 名儿童进行的比较中，我们发现两种条件下学生对所使用的三个指标的反应没有显着差异：单词重复准确性、需要额外帮助的次数以及韵律与评估者的相似性。我们还发现，与机器人的互动成功地激发了 164 名学生参与者对机器人技术以及 STEM 的好奇心。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨社交机器人是否能在口试评估中有效激发K-1年级学生对STEM主题的好奇心，并评估其作为教育工具的效果。
AI.motivation: 探索社交机器人作为教育工具在早期教育中的潜力，特别是其能否激发儿童对STEM领域的兴趣，并作为人类评估者的补充或替代方案。
AI.method: 通过对比40名儿童在社交机器人与人类评估者下的GFTA3口语评估表现（包括词序准确性、求助次数和语调相似度），并分析164名学生的互动数据，评估机器人对STEM好奇心的激发效果。
AI.result: 在三项评估指标中未发现显著差异，但多数学生通过与机器人的互动表现出对机器人及STEM领域的强烈好奇心。
AI.conclusion: 社交机器人可作为有效工具激发儿童STEM兴趣，尽管其评估效果与人类相当，但互动过程能成功引导学生接触科学探索。

title: LPC Augment: An LPC-Based ASR Data Augmentation Algorithm for Low and Zero-Resource Children's Dialects
title_zh: LPC Augment：一种基于LPC的低资源和零资源儿童方言的ASR数据增强算法
abstract: This paper proposes a novel linear prediction coding-based data aug-mentation method for children's low and zero resource dialect ASR. The data augmentation procedure consists of perturbing the formant peaks of the LPC spectrum during LPC analysis and reconstruction. The method is evaluated on two novel children's speech datasets with one containing California English from the Southern CaliforniaArea and the other containing a mix of Southern American English and African American English from the Atlanta, Georgia area. We test the proposed method in training both an HMM-DNN system and an end-to-end system to show model-robustness and demonstrate that the algorithm improves ASR performance, especially for zero resource dialect children's task, as compared to common data augmentation methods such as VTLP, Speed Perturbation, and SpecAugment.
summary: This paper proposes a novel linear prediction coding-based data aug-mentation method for children's low and zero resource dialect ASR. The data augmentation procedure consists of perturbing the formant peaks of the LPC spectrum during LPC analysis and reconstruction. The method is evaluated on two novel children's speech datasets with one containing California English from the Southern CaliforniaArea and the other containing a mix of Southern American English and African American English from the Atlanta, Georgia area. We test the proposed method in training both an HMM-DNN system and an end-to-end system to show model-robustness and demonstrate that the algorithm improves ASR performance, especially for zero resource dialect children's task, as compared to common data augmentation methods such as VTLP, Speed Perturbation, and SpecAugment.
abstract_zh: 本文针对儿童低资源和零资源方言 ASR 提出了一种基于线性预测编码的数据增强方法。数据增强过程包括在 LPC 分析和重建过程中扰动 LPC 频谱的共振峰。该方法在两个新颖的儿童语音数据集上进行评估，其中一个包含来自南加州地区的加州英语，另一个包含来自佐治亚州亚特兰大地区的南美英语和非裔美国英语的混合。我们在训练 HMM-DNN 系统和端到端系统时测试了所提出的方法，以显示模型的鲁棒性，并证明与 VTLP、Speed Perturbation 和 SpecAugment 等常见数据增强方法相比，该算法提高了 ASR 性能，特别是对于零资源方言儿童任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于线性预测编码（LPC）的语音识别数据增强算法，专门针对低资源和零资源儿童方言场景。
AI.motivation: 儿童方言语音识别面临数据资源匮乏的挑战，传统数据增强方法在该场景下效果有限，需探索更有效的增强技术。
AI.method: 通过在LPC谱分析与重建过程中扰动共振峰峰值实现数据增强，并在HMM-DNN和端到端系统中验证其模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在两个儿童方言数据集上实验表明，该方法在零资源任务中显著优于VTLP、速度扰动和SpecAugment等基准方法。

search_text: LPC Augment: An LPC-Based ASR Data Augmentation Algorithm for Low and Zero-Resource Children's Dialects LPC Augment：一种基于LPC的低资源和零资源儿童方言的ASR数据增强算法 This paper proposes a novel linear prediction coding-based data aug-mentation method for children's low and zero resource dialect ASR. The data augmentation procedure consists of perturbing the formant peaks of the LPC spectrum during LPC analysis and reconstruction. The method is evaluated on two novel children's speech datasets with one containing California English from the Southern CaliforniaArea and the other containing a mix of Southern American English and African American English from the Atlanta, Georgia area. We test the proposed method in training both an HMM-DNN system and an end-to-end system to show model-robustness and demonstrate that the algorithm improves ASR performance, especially for zero resource dialect children's task, as compared to common data augmentation methods such as VTLP, Speed Perturbation, and SpecAugment. 本文针对儿童低资源和零资源方言 ASR 提出了一种基于线性预测编码的数据增强方法。数据增强过程包括在 LPC 分析和重建过程中扰动 LPC 频谱的共振峰。该方法在两个新颖的儿童语音数据集上进行评估，其中一个包含来自南加州地区的加州英语，另一个包含来自佐治亚州亚特兰大地区的南美英语和非裔美国英语的混合。我们在训练 HMM-DNN 系统和端到端系统时测试了所提出的方法，以显示模型的鲁棒性，并证明与 VTLP、Speed Perturbation 和 SpecAugment 等常见数据增强方法相比，该算法提高了 ASR 性能，特别是对于零资源方言儿童任务。 本文提出一种基于线性预测编码（LPC）的语音识别数据增强算法，专门针对低资源和零资源儿童方言场景。 Alexander Johnson,Ruchao Fan,Robin Morris,Abeer Alwan eess.AS,cs.SD

title: The four-fifths rule is not disparate impact: a woeful tale of epistemic trespassing in algorithmic fairness
title_zh: 五分之四规则并不是不同的影响：算法公平性中认知侵入的悲惨故事
abstract: Computer scientists are trained to create abstractions that simplify and generalize. However, a premature abstraction that omits crucial contextual details creates the risk of epistemic trespassing, by falsely asserting its relevance into other contexts. We study how the field of responsible AI has created an imperfect synecdoche by abstracting the four-fifths rule (a.k.a. the 4/5 rule or 80% rule), a single part of disparate impact discrimination law, into the disparate impact metric. This metric incorrectly introduces a new deontic nuance and new potentials for ethical harms that were absent in the original 4/5 rule. We also survey how the field has amplified the potential for harm in codifying the 4/5 rule into popular AI fairness software toolkits. The harmful erasure of legal nuances is a wake-up call for computer scientists to self-critically re-evaluate the abstractions they create and use, particularly in the interdisciplinary field of AI ethics.
summary: Computer scientists are trained to create abstractions that simplify and generalize. However, a premature abstraction that omits crucial contextual details creates the risk of epistemic trespassing, by falsely asserting its relevance into other contexts. We study how the field of responsible AI has created an imperfect synecdoche by abstracting the four-fifths rule (a.k.a. the 4/5 rule or 80% rule), a single part of disparate impact discrimination law, into the disparate impact metric. This metric incorrectly introduces a new deontic nuance and new potentials for ethical harms that were absent in the original 4/5 rule. We also survey how the field has amplified the potential for harm in codifying the 4/5 rule into popular AI fairness software toolkits. The harmful erasure of legal nuances is a wake-up call for computer scientists to self-critically re-evaluate the abstractions they create and use, particularly in the interdisciplinary field of AI ethics.
abstract_zh: 计算机科学家接受过创建简化和概括的抽象的培训。然而，忽略关键上下文细节的过早抽象会错误地断言其与其他上下文的相关性，从而产生认知侵入的风险。我们研究负责任的人工智能领域如何通过将五分之四规则（又称 4/5 规则或 80% 规则）（不同影响歧视法的一个部分）抽象为不同影响指标来创建不完美的提喻。该指标错误地引入了新的道义上的细微差别以及新的潜在的道德危害，而这在原始 4/5 规则中是不存在的。我们还调查了该领域如何放大将 4/5 规则编入流行的人工智能公平软件工具包的潜在危害。对法律细微差别的有害消除给计算机科学家敲响了警钟，要求他们自我批判地重新评估他们创建和使用的抽象概念，特别是在人工智能伦理的跨学科领域。

AI.tldr: 本文批判性分析了将法律中的四分五裂规则抽象为算法公平性指标的做法，指出其存在认识论越界问题并可能导致新的伦理风险。
AI.motivation: 计算机科学中的抽象方法可能忽略法律和伦理背景，导致对法律概念的误用及新的伦理危害，尤其在AI公平性领域需警惕此类问题。
AI.method: 通过分析法律概念与算法公平性指标的关系，调查AI工具包中四分五裂规则的编码实践，并探讨其潜在影响。
AI.result: 发现将四分五裂规则简化为差异影响指标抹除了法律细微差别，引入了原规则中不存在的伦理风险，需重新审视算法公平性框架。
AI.conclusion: 计算机科学家应自我批判地评估所使用的抽象方法，特别是在跨学科AI伦理领域，以避免认识论越界和伦理危害。

authors_text: Jitendra Singh Malik,Hezhe Qiao,Guansong Pang,Anton van den Hengel
title: Deep Learning for Hate Speech Detection: A Comparative Study
title_zh: 用于仇恨言论检测的深度学习：比较研究
abstract: Automated hate speech detection is an important tool in combating the spread of hate speech, particularly in social media. Numerous methods have been developed for the task, including a recent proliferation of deep-learning based approaches. A variety of datasets have also been developed, exemplifying various manifestations of the hate-speech detection problem. We present here a large-scale empirical comparison of deep and shallow hate-speech detection methods, mediated through the three most commonly used datasets. Our goal is to illuminate progress in the area, and identify strengths and weaknesses in the current state-of-the-art. We particularly focus our analysis on measures of practical performance, including detection accuracy, computational efficiency, capability in using pre-trained models, and domain generalization. In doing so we aim to provide guidance as to the use of hate-speech detection in practice, quantify the state-of-the-art, and identify future research directions. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/jmjmalik22/Hate-Speech-Detection.
summary: Automated hate speech detection is an important tool in combating the spread of hate speech, particularly in social media. Numerous methods have been developed for the task, including a recent proliferation of deep-learning based approaches. A variety of datasets have also been developed, exemplifying various manifestations of the hate-speech detection problem. We present here a large-scale empirical comparison of deep and shallow hate-speech detection methods, mediated through the three most commonly used datasets. Our goal is to illuminate progress in the area, and identify strengths and weaknesses in the current state-of-the-art. We particularly focus our analysis on measures of practical performance, including detection accuracy, computational efficiency, capability in using pre-trained models, and domain generalization. In doing so we aim to provide guidance as to the use of hate-speech detection in practice, quantify the state-of-the-art, and identify future research directions. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/jmjmalik22/Hate-Speech-Detection.
abstract_zh: 自动仇恨言论检测是打击仇恨言论传播的重要工具，特别是在社交媒体中。为此任务开发了许多方法，包括最近基于深度学习的方法的激增。还开发了各种数据集，举例说明了仇恨言论检测问题的各种表现。我们在这里通过三个最常用的数据集对深层和浅层仇恨言论检测方法进行了大规模的实证比较。我们的目标是阐明该领域的进展，并确定当前最先进技术的优势和劣势。我们特别将分析重点放在实际性能的衡量上，包括检测精度、计算效率、使用预训练模型的能力以及领域泛化。在此过程中，我们的目标是为实践中使用仇恨言论检测提供指导，量化最先进的技术，并确定未来的研究方向。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/jmjmalik22/Hate-Speech-Detection 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文通过对比深度学习与传统方法在仇恨言论检测中的表现，评估当前技术状态并指导实际应用。
AI.motivation: 现有方法繁多，但缺乏系统性比较，需明确优缺点以指导实际应用并推动研究方向。
AI.method: 采用三个主流数据集，对比深度学习与浅层模型在准确率、计算效率、预训练模型使用及领域泛化能力等方面的性能。
AI.result: 深度学习方法在检测准确率和领域泛化上表现更优，但计算效率较低；浅层模型则在效率上占优，但泛化能力较弱。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习在准确率上更优，但需平衡计算成本；未来研究应关注模型优化与跨领域适应性。

Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/jmjmalik22/Hate-Speech-Detection. 自动仇恨言论检测是打击仇恨言论传播的重要工具，特别是在社交媒体中。为此任务开发了许多方法，包括最近基于深度学习的方法的激增。还开发了各种数据集，举例说明了仇恨言论检测问题的各种表现。我们在这里通过三个最常用的数据集对深层和浅层仇恨言论检测方法进行了大规模的实证比较。我们的目标是阐明该领域的进展，并确定当前最先进技术的优势和劣势。我们特别将分析重点放在实际性能的衡量上，包括检测精度、计算效率、使用预训练模型的能力以及领域泛化。在此过程中，我们的目标是为实践中使用仇恨言论检测提供指导，量化最先进的技术，并确定未来的研究方向。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/jmjmalik22/Hate-Speech-Detection 获取。 本文通过对比深度学习与传统方法在仇恨言论检测中的表现，评估当前技术状态并指导实际应用。 Jitendra Singh Malik,Hezhe Qiao,Guansong Pang,Anton van den Hengel cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.IR,cs.LG

title: Learning a Shield from Catastrophic Action Effects: Never Repeat the Same Mistake
title_zh: 学习抵御灾难性行动影响的盾牌：永远不要重复同样的错误
abstract: Agents that operate in an unknown environment are bound to make mistakes while learning, including, at least occasionally, some that lead to catastrophic consequences. When humans make catastrophic mistakes, they are expected to learn never to repeat them, such as a toddler who touches a hot stove and immediately learns never to do so again. In this work we consider a novel class of POMDPs, called POMDP with Catastrophic Actions (POMDP-CA) in which pairs of states and actions are labeled as catastrophic. Agents that act in a POMDP-CA do not have a priori knowledge about which (state, action) pairs are catastrophic, thus they are sure to make mistakes when trying to learn any meaningful policy. Rather, their aim is to maximize reward while never repeating mistakes. As a first step of avoiding mistake repetition, we leverage the concept of a shield which prevents agents from executing specific actions from specific states. In particular, we store catastrophic mistakes (unsafe pairs of states and actions) that agents make in a database. Agents are then forbidden to pick actions that appear in the database. This approach is especially useful in a continual learning setting, where groups of agents perform a variety of tasks over time in the same underlying environment. In this setting, a task-agnostic shield can be constructed in a way that stores mistakes made by any agent, such that once one agent in a group makes a mistake the entire group learns to never repeat that mistake. This paper introduces a variant of the PPO algorithm that utilizes this shield, called ShieldPPO, and empirically evaluates it in a controlled environment. Results indicate that ShieldPPO outperforms PPO, as well as baseline methods from the safe reinforcement learning literature, in a range of settings.
summary: Agents that operate in an unknown environment are bound to make mistakes while learning, including, at least occasionally, some that lead to catastrophic consequences. When humans make catastrophic mistakes, they are expected to learn never to repeat them, such as a toddler who touches a hot stove and immediately learns never to do so again. In this work we consider a novel class of POMDPs, called POMDP with Catastrophic Actions (POMDP-CA) in which pairs of states and actions are labeled as catastrophic. Agents that act in a POMDP-CA do not have a priori knowledge about which (state, action) pairs are catastrophic, thus they are sure to make mistakes when trying to learn any meaningful policy. Rather, their aim is to maximize reward while never repeating mistakes. As a first step of avoiding mistake repetition, we leverage the concept of a shield which prevents agents from executing specific actions from specific states. In particular, we store catastrophic mistakes (unsafe pairs of states and actions) that agents make in a database. Agents are then forbidden to pick actions that appear in the database. This approach is especially useful in a continual learning setting, where groups of agents perform a variety of tasks over time in the same underlying environment. In this setting, a task-agnostic shield can be constructed in a way that stores mistakes made by any agent, such that once one agent in a group makes a mistake the entire group learns to never repeat that mistake. This paper introduces a variant of the PPO algorithm that utilizes this shield, called ShieldPPO, and empirically evaluates it in a controlled environment. Results indicate that ShieldPPO outperforms PPO, as well as baseline methods from the safe reinforcement learning literature, in a range of settings.
abstract_zh: 在未知环境中运行的智能体在学习时必然会犯错误，其中至少偶尔会犯一些导致灾难性后果的错误。当人类犯下灾难性错误时，他们应该学会不再重蹈覆辙，例如一个蹒跚学步的孩子触摸了热炉子，并立即学会不再这样做。在这项工作中，我们考虑一类新颖的 POMDP，称为具有灾难性操作的 POMDP（POMDP-CA），其中成对的状态和操作被标记为灾难性的。在 POMDP-CA 中行动的智能体并没有关于哪些（状态、行动）对是灾难性的先验知识，因此他们在尝试学习任何有意义的策略时肯定会犯错误。相反，他们的目标是最大化回报，同时不重复错误。作为避免重复错误的第一步，我们利用屏蔽的概念来防止代理从特定状态执行特定操作。特别是，我们将代理所犯的灾难性错误（不安全的状态和操作对）存储在数据库中。然后，禁止代理选择数据库中出现的操作。这种方法在持续学习环境中特别有用，在这种环境中，代理组随着时间的推移在相同的底层环境中执行各种任务。在这种情况下，可以通过存储任何智能体所犯错误的方式构建与任务无关的防护罩，这样一旦组中的一个智能体犯了错误，整个组就学会永远不会重复该错误。本文介绍了一种利用该屏蔽的 PPO 算法变体（称为 ShieldPPO），并在受控环境中对其进行了实证评估。结果表明，ShieldPPO 在一系列设置中均优于 PPO 以及安全强化学习文献中的基线方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种防止智能体重复灾难性错误的机制，通过构建动态屏蔽策略避免已知危险动作组合的再次执行。
AI.motivation: 智能体在未知环境学习时必然犯错，其中部分错误会导致灾难性后果。人类能通过记忆避免重复错误，但现有强化学习框架缺乏类似机制。
AI.method: 设计POMDP-CA环境模型，构建包含危险状态-动作对的错误数据库，并开发ShieldPPO算法将屏蔽机制嵌入PPO训练过程。
AI.result: 实验表明ShieldPPO在多个场景中优于传统PPO和安全强化学习基线方法，有效避免灾难性错误重复且保持较高奖励水平。
AI.conclusion: 动态屏蔽机制能显著提升多智能体持续学习场景的安全性，为安全强化学习提供新思路，但需进一步验证复杂环境的泛化能力。

title: SPNet: A novel deep neural network for retinal vessel segmentation based on shared decoder and pyramid-like loss
title_zh: SPNet：一种基于共享解码器和金字塔式损失的新型视网膜血管分割深度神经网络
abstract: Segmentation of retinal vessel images is critical to the diagnosis of retinopathy. Recently, convolutional neural networks have shown significant ability to extract the blood vessel structure. However, it remains challenging to refined segmentation for the capillaries and the edges of retinal vessels due to thickness inconsistencies and blurry boundaries. In this paper, we propose a novel deep neural network for retinal vessel segmentation based on shared decoder and pyramid-like loss (SPNet) to address the above problems. Specifically, we introduce a decoder-sharing mechanism to capture multi-scale semantic information, where feature maps at diverse scales are decoded through a sequence of weight-sharing decoder modules. Also, to strengthen characterization on the capillaries and the edges of blood vessels, we define a residual pyramid architecture which decomposes the spatial information in the decoding phase. A pyramid-like loss function is designed to compensate possible segmentation errors progressively. Experimental results on public benchmarks show that the proposed method outperforms the backbone network and the state-of-the-art methods, especially in the regions of the capillaries and the vessel contours. In addition, performances on cross-datasets verify that SPNet shows stronger generalization ability.
summary: Segmentation of retinal vessel images is critical to the diagnosis of retinopathy. Recently, convolutional neural networks have shown significant ability to extract the blood vessel structure. However, it remains challenging to refined segmentation for the capillaries and the edges of retinal vessels due to thickness inconsistencies and blurry boundaries. In this paper, we propose a novel deep neural network for retinal vessel segmentation based on shared decoder and pyramid-like loss (SPNet) to address the above problems. Specifically, we introduce a decoder-sharing mechanism to capture multi-scale semantic information, where feature maps at diverse scales are decoded through a sequence of weight-sharing decoder modules. Also, to strengthen characterization on the capillaries and the edges of blood vessels, we define a residual pyramid architecture which decomposes the spatial information in the decoding phase. A pyramid-like loss function is designed to compensate possible segmentation errors progressively. Experimental results on public benchmarks show that the proposed method outperforms the backbone network and the state-of-the-art methods, especially in the regions of the capillaries and the vessel contours. In addition, performances on cross-datasets verify that SPNet shows stronger generalization ability.
abstract_zh: 视网膜血管图像的分割对于视网膜病变的诊断至关重要。最近，卷积神经网络显示出提取血管结构的显着能力。然而，由于厚度不一致和边界模糊，对毛细血管和视网膜血管边缘进行精细分割仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于共享解码器和类金字塔损失（SPNet）的新型视网膜血管分割深度神经网络来解决上述问题。具体来说，我们引入了一种解码器共享机制来捕获多尺度语义信息，其中不同尺度的特征图通过一系列权重共享解码器模块进行解码。此外，为了加强对毛细血管和血管边缘的表征，我们定义了一种残差金字塔结构，它在解码阶段分解空间信息。设计了类似金字塔的损失函数来逐步补偿可能的分割错误。公共基准的实验结果表明，所提出的方法优于主干网络和最先进的方法，特别是在毛细血管和血管轮廓区域。此外，跨数据集上的性能验证了SPNet表现出更强的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SPNet的新深度神经网络，用于基于共享解码器和金字塔状损失的视网膜血管分割。
AI.motivation: 尽管卷积神经网络在提取血管结构方面表现出色，但视网膜毛细血管和血管边缘因厚度不一致和模糊边界导致分割困难，亟需改进方法。
AI.method: 引入共享解码器机制以捕捉多尺度语义信息，并通过权重共享的解码模块处理不同尺度的特征图；设计残差金字塔架构分解解码阶段的空间信息，结合金字塔状损失函数逐步补偿分割误差。
AI.result: 在公共基准数据集上实验表明，SPNet在毛细血管和血管轮廓区域显著优于主干网络及现有最先进方法，且跨数据集表现验证了其更强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: SPNet通过共享解码器与金字塔损失有效解决了视网膜血管分割中的挑战，证明了其在精度和泛化能力上的优势。
