title: Smooth time optimal trajectory generation for drones
title_zh: 无人机的平滑时间最优轨迹生成
abstract: In this paper, we address a minimum-time steering problem for a drone modeled as point mass with bounded acceleration, across a set of desired waypoints in the presence of gravity. We first provide a method to solve for the minimum-time control input that will steer the point mass between two waypoints based on a continuous-time problem formulation which we address by using Pontryagin's Minimum Principle. Subsequently, we solve for the time-optimal trajectory across the given set of waypoints by discretizing in the time domain and formulating the minimum-time problem as a nonlinear program (NLP). The velocities at each waypoint obtained from solving the NLP in the discretized domain are then used as boundary conditions to extend our two-point solution across those multiple waypoints. We apply this planning methodology to execute a surveying task that minimizes the time taken to completely explore a target area or volume. Numerical simulations and theoretical analyses of this new planning methodology are presented. The results from our approach are also compared to traditional polynomial trajectories like minimum snap planning.
summary: In this paper, we address a minimum-time steering problem for a drone modeled as point mass with bounded acceleration, across a set of desired waypoints in the presence of gravity. We first provide a method to solve for the minimum-time control input that will steer the point mass between two waypoints based on a continuous-time problem formulation which we address by using Pontryagin's Minimum Principle. Subsequently, we solve for the time-optimal trajectory across the given set of waypoints by discretizing in the time domain and formulating the minimum-time problem as a nonlinear program (NLP). The velocities at each waypoint obtained from solving the NLP in the discretized domain are then used as boundary conditions to extend our two-point solution across those multiple waypoints. We apply this planning methodology to execute a surveying task that minimizes the time taken to completely explore a target area or volume. Numerical simulations and theoretical analyses of this new planning methodology are presented. The results from our approach are also compared to traditional polynomial trajectories like minimum snap planning.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了无人机的最短时间转向问题，该无人机被建模为具有有限加速度的点质量，在存在重力的情况下跨越一组所需的航路点。我们首先提供一种求解最小时间控制输入的方法，该方法将基于连续时间问题公式在两个航路点之间引导点质量，我们通过使用庞特里亚金的最小原理来解决该问题公式。随后，我们通过在时域中离散化并将最小时间问题公式化为非线性程序（NLP）来求解给定航路点集的时间最优轨迹。然后，将通过求解离散域中的 NLP 获得的每个路点的速度用作边界条件，以将我们的两点解扩展到这些多个路点。我们应用这种规划方法来执行测量任务，最大限度地减少完全探索目标区域或体积所需的时间。提出了这种新规划方法的数值模拟和理论分析。我们的方法的结果还与传统的多项式轨迹（例如最小捕捉规划）进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在重力影响下，无人机作为质点模型在有限加速度约束下穿越多个航路点的最短时间轨迹生成问题。
AI.motivation: 传统多项式轨迹规划方法（如最小加加速度规划）在复杂环境下难以兼顾时间最优性与轨迹平滑性，亟需更高效的路径规划算法以提升无人机巡检等任务的效率。
AI.method: 基于庞特里亚金最小值原理解决两点间连续时间最优控制问题，通过时间离散化将多航路点问题转化为非线性规划（NLP），并利用NLP求解得到的航路点速度作为边界条件扩展至多点轨迹优化。
AI.result: 数值仿真表明该方法在保证轨迹平滑性的同时显著优于传统多项式轨迹规划，成功应用于目标区域的快速勘探任务。
AI.conclusion: 提出的规划方法为无人机时间最优轨迹生成提供了有效解决方案，通过理论分析与仿真验证了其在复杂环境下的优越性。

search_text: Smooth time optimal trajectory generation for drones 无人机的平滑时间最优轨迹生成 In this paper, we address a minimum-time steering problem for a drone modeled as point mass with bounded acceleration, across a set of desired waypoints in the presence of gravity. We first provide a method to solve for the minimum-time control input that will steer the point mass between two waypoints based on a continuous-time problem formulation which we address by using Pontryagin's Minimum Principle. Subsequently, we solve for the time-optimal trajectory across the given set of waypoints by discretizing in the time domain and formulating the minimum-time problem as a nonlinear program (NLP). The velocities at each waypoint obtained from solving the NLP in the discretized domain are then used as boundary conditions to extend our two-point solution across those multiple waypoints. We apply this planning methodology to execute a surveying task that minimizes the time taken to completely explore a target area or volume. Numerical simulations and theoretical analyses of this new planning methodology are presented. The results from our approach are also compared to traditional polynomial trajectories like minimum snap planning. 在本文中，我们解决了无人机的最短时间转向问题，该无人机被建模为具有有限加速度的点质量，在存在重力的情况下跨越一组所需的航路点。我们首先提供一种求解最小时间控制输入的方法，该方法将基于连续时间问题公式在两个航路点之间引导点质量，我们通过使用庞特里亚金的最小原理来解决该问题公式。随后，我们通过在时域中离散化并将最小时间问题公式化为非线性程序（NLP）来求解给定航路点集的时间最优轨迹。然后，将通过求解离散域中的 NLP 获得的每个路点的速度用作边界条件，以将我们的两点解扩展到这些多个路点。我们应用这种规划方法来执行测量任务，最大限度地减少完全探索目标区域或体积所需的时间。提出了这种新规划方法的数值模拟和理论分析。我们的方法的结果还与传统的多项式轨迹（例如最小捕捉规划）进行了比较。 本文研究了在重力影响下，无人机作为质点模型在有限加速度约束下穿越多个航路点的最短时间轨迹生成问题。 Srinath Tankasala,Can Pehlivanturk,Efstathios Bakolas,Mitch Pryor cs.RO

title: Counterfactual Analysis of the Impact of the IMF Program on Child Poverty in the Global-South Region using Causal-Graphical Normalizing Flows
title_zh: 使用因果图标准化流对国际货币基金组织计划对南半球地区儿童贫困的影响进行反事实分析
comment: 8(+6) pages, 3(+3) figures, arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2202.03281
comments: 8(+6) pages, 3(+3) figures, arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2202.03281
abstract: This work demonstrates the application of a particular branch of causal inference and deep learning models: \emph{causal-Graphical Normalizing Flows (c-GNFs)}. In a recent contribution, scholars showed that normalizing flows carry certain properties, making them particularly suitable for causal and counterfactual analysis. However, c-GNFs have only been tested in a simulated data setting and no contribution to date have evaluated the application of c-GNFs on large-scale real-world data. Focusing on the \emph{AI for social good}, our study provides a counterfactual analysis of the impact of the International Monetary Fund (IMF) program on child poverty using c-GNFs. The analysis relies on a large-scale real-world observational data: 1,941,734 children under the age of 18, cared for by 567,344 families residing in the 67 countries from the Global-South. While the primary objective of the IMF is to support governments in achieving economic stability, our results find that an IMF program reduces child poverty as a positive side-effect by about 1.2$\pm$0.24 degree (`0' equals no poverty and `7' is maximum poverty). Thus, our article shows how c-GNFs further the use of deep learning and causal inference in AI for social good. It shows how learning algorithms can be used for addressing the untapped potential for a significant social impact through counterfactual inference at population level (ACE), sub-population level (CACE), and individual level (ICE). In contrast to most works that model ACE or CACE but not ICE, c-GNFs enable personalization using \emph{`The First Law of Causal Inference'}.

In a recent contribution, scholars showed that normalizing flows carry certain properties, making them particularly suitable for causal and counterfactual analysis. However, c-GNFs have only been tested in a simulated data setting and no contribution to date have evaluated the application of c-GNFs on large-scale real-world data. Focusing on the \emph{AI for social good}, our study provides a counterfactual analysis of the impact of the International Monetary Fund (IMF) program on child poverty using c-GNFs. The analysis relies on a large-scale real-world observational data: 1,941,734 children under the age of 18, cared for by 567,344 families residing in the 67 countries from the Global-South. While the primary objective of the IMF is to support governments in achieving economic stability, our results find that an IMF program reduces child poverty as a positive side-effect by about 1.2$\pm$0.24 degree (`0' equals no poverty and `7' is maximum poverty). Thus, our article shows how c-GNFs further the use of deep learning and causal inference in AI for social good. It shows how learning algorithms can be used for addressing the untapped potential for a significant social impact through counterfactual inference at population level (ACE), sub-population level (CACE), and individual level (ICE). In contrast to most works that model ACE or CACE but not ICE, c-GNFs enable personalization using \emph{`The First Law of Causal Inference'}.
abstract_zh: 这项工作演示了因果推理和深度学习模型的特定分支的应用：\emph{因果图形标准化流（c-GNF）}。在最近的一篇文章中，学者们表明，标准化流具有某些属性，使其特别适合因果和反事实分析。然而，c-GNF 仅在模拟数据设置中进行了测试，迄今为止还没有任何贡献评估 c-GNF 在大规模现实世界数据上的应用。我们的研究重点关注\emph{人工智能造福社会}，利用 c-GNF 对国际货币基金组织 (IMF) 计划对儿童贫困的影响进行了反事实分析。该分析依赖于大规模的现实世界观察数据：1,941,734 名 18 岁以下儿童，由居住在南半球 67 个国家的 567,344 个家庭照顾。虽然国际货币基金组织的主要目标是支持政府实现经济稳定，但我们的研究结果发现，国际货币基金组织的计划将儿童贫困这一积极副作用降低了约 1.2$\pm$0.24 度（“0”等于无贫困，“7”表示最严重贫困）。因此，我们的文章展示了 c-GNF 如何进一步利用人工智能中的深度学习和因果推理来造福社会。它展示了如何使用学习算法通过人口层面（ACE）、子群体层面（CACE）和个人层面（ICE）的反事实推理来解决产生重大社会影响的未开发潜力。与大多数对 ACE 或 CACE 而不是 ICE 进行建模的作品相比，c-GNF 使用 \emph{“因果推理第一定律”}实现个性化。

AI.tldr: 利用因果图归一化流（c-GNFs）进行反事实分析，评估IMF计划对全球南方地区儿童贫困的影响
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对c-GNFs在真实大规模数据中的应用，且IMF计划对儿童贫困的潜在积极影响未被充分评估
AI.method: 采用因果图归一化流（c-GNFs）模型，结合因果推理与深度学习技术，分析全球南方67国的大规模观察数据
AI.result: IMF计划作为经济稳定措施，意外减少了儿童贫困程度约1.2±0.24度（0为无贫困，7为最高贫困）
AI.conclusion: c-GNFs有效推进AI在社会公益中的应用，通过反事实推理实现群体、子群体及个体层面的个性化分析，揭示政策的潜在社会影响

title: Black-box Node Injection Attack for Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 图神经网络的黑盒节点注入攻击
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have drawn significant attentions over the years and been broadly applied to vital fields that require high security standard such as product recommendation and traffic forecasting. Under such scenarios, exploiting GNN's vulnerabilities and further downgrade its classification performance become highly incentive for adversaries. Previous attackers mainly focus on structural perturbations of existing graphs. Although they deliver promising results, the actual implementation needs capability of manipulating the graph connectivity, which is impractical in some circumstances. In this work, we study the possibility of injecting nodes to evade the victim GNN model, and unlike previous related works with white-box setting, we significantly restrict the amount of accessible knowledge and explore the black-box setting. Specifically, we model the node injection attack as a Markov decision process and propose GA2C, a graph reinforcement learning framework in the fashion of advantage actor critic, to generate realistic features for injected nodes and seamlessly merge them into the original graph following the same topology characteristics. Through our extensive experiments on multiple acknowledged benchmark datasets, we demonstrate the superior performance of our proposed GA2C over existing state-of-the-art methods. The data and source code are publicly accessible at: https://github.com/jumxglhf/GA2C.
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have drawn significant attentions over the years and been broadly applied to vital fields that require high security standard such as product recommendation and traffic forecasting. Under such scenarios, exploiting GNN's vulnerabilities and further downgrade its classification performance become highly incentive for adversaries. Previous attackers mainly focus on structural perturbations of existing graphs. Although they deliver promising results, the actual implementation needs capability of manipulating the graph connectivity, which is impractical in some circumstances. In this work, we study the possibility of injecting nodes to evade the victim GNN model, and unlike previous related works with white-box setting, we significantly restrict the amount of accessible knowledge and explore the black-box setting. Specifically, we model the node injection attack as a Markov decision process and propose GA2C, a graph reinforcement learning framework in the fashion of advantage actor critic, to generate realistic features for injected nodes and seamlessly merge them into the original graph following the same topology characteristics. Through our extensive experiments on multiple acknowledged benchmark datasets, we demonstrate the superior performance of our proposed GA2C over existing state-of-the-art methods. The data and source code are publicly accessible at: https://github.com/jumxglhf/GA2C.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）多年来引起了人们的广泛关注，并广泛应用于需要高安全标准的重要领域，例如产品推荐和流量预测。在这种情况下，利用 GNN 的漏洞并进一步降低其分类性能成为对手的高度激励。以前的攻击者主要关注现有图的结构扰动。尽管它们提供了有希望的结果，但实际实现需要操纵图连接的能力，这在某些情况下是不切实际的。在这项工作中，我们研究了注入节点来逃避受害者 GNN 模型的可能性，与之前白盒设置的相关工作不同，我们显着限制了可访问的知识量并探索了黑盒设置。具体来说，我们将节点注入攻击建模为马尔可夫决策过程，并提出 GA2C，一种以优势参与者批评家的方式的图强化学习框架，为注入节点生成真实的特征，并按照相同的拓扑特征将它们无缝地合并到原始图中。通过对多个公认的基准数据集进行的广泛实验，我们证明了我们提出的 GA2C 相对于现有最先进方法的卓越性能。数据和源代码可公开访问：https://github.com/jumxglhf/GA2C。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对图神经网络（GNN）的黑盒节点注入攻击方法，通过注入伪装节点降低模型分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有攻击方法依赖对图结构的直接篡改，但在实际场景中难以实现。黑盒攻击更符合现实攻击条件，且能揭示GNN在未知模型结构下的脆弱性。
AI.method: 将节点注入攻击建模为马尔可夫决策过程，设计基于优势演员评论家（A2C）的图强化学习框架GA2C，自动生成符合拓扑特征的注入节点特征。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上验证了GA2C优于现有最先进的攻击方法，且提供了公开的数据和代码。
AI.conclusion: 黑盒节点注入攻击在实际场景中具有可行性，证明了GNN在面对未知攻击时的潜在安全风险。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对图神经网络（GNN）的黑盒节点注入攻击方法，通过注入伪装节点降低模型分类性能。

search_text: Black-box Node Injection Attack for Graph Neural Networks 图神经网络的黑盒节点注入攻击 Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have drawn significant attentions over the years and been broadly applied to vital fields that require high security standard such as product recommendation and traffic forecasting. Under such scenarios, exploiting GNN's vulnerabilities and further downgrade its classification performance become highly incentive for adversaries. Previous attackers mainly focus on structural perturbations of existing graphs. Although they deliver promising results, the actual implementation needs capability of manipulating the graph connectivity, which is impractical in some circumstances. In this work, we study the possibility of injecting nodes to evade the victim GNN model, and unlike previous related works with white-box setting, we significantly restrict the amount of accessible knowledge and explore the black-box setting. Specifically, we model the node injection attack as a Markov decision process and propose GA2C, a graph reinforcement learning framework in the fashion of advantage actor critic, to generate realistic features for injected nodes and seamlessly merge them into the original graph following the same topology characteristics. Through our extensive experiments on multiple acknowledged benchmark datasets, we demonstrate the superior performance of our proposed GA2C over existing state-of-the-art methods. The data and source code are publicly accessible at: https://github.com/jumxglhf/GA2C. 图神经网络（GNN）多年来引起了人们的广泛关注，并广泛应用于需要高安全标准的重要领域，例如产品推荐和流量预测。在这种情况下，利用 GNN 的漏洞并进一步降低其分类性能成为对手的高度激励。以前的攻击者主要关注现有图的结构扰动。尽管它们提供了有希望的结果，但实际实现需要操纵图连接的能力，这在某些情况下是不切实际的。在这项工作中，我们研究了注入节点来逃避受害者 GNN 模型的可能性，与之前白盒设置的相关工作不同，我们显着限制了可访问的知识量并探索了黑盒设置。具体来说，我们将节点注入攻击建模为马尔可夫决策过程，并提出 GA2C，一种以优势参与者批评家的方式的图强化学习框架，为注入节点生成真实的特征，并按照相同的拓扑特征将它们无缝地合并到原始图中。通过对多个公认的基准数据集进行的广泛实验，我们证明了我们提出的 GA2C 相对于现有最先进方法的卓越性能。数据和源代码可公开访问：https://github.com/jumxglhf/GA2C。 本文提出了一种针对图神经网络（GNN）的黑盒节点注入攻击方法，通过注入伪装节点降低模型分类性能。 Mingxuan Ju,Yujie Fan,Yanfang Ye,Liang Zhao cs.LG,cs.AI

title: A Molecular Prior Distribution for Bayesian Inference Based on Wilson Statistics
title_zh: 基于威尔逊统计的贝叶斯推理的分子先验分布
abstract: Background and Objective: Wilson statistics describe well the power spectrum of proteins at high frequencies. Therefore, it has found several applications in structural biology, e.g., it is the basis for sharpening steps used in cryogenic electron microscopy (cryo-EM). A recent paper gave the first rigorous proof of Wilson statistics based on a formalism of Wilson's original argument. This new analysis also leads to statistical estimates of the scattering potential of proteins that reveal a correlation between neighboring Fourier coefficients. Here we exploit these estimates to craft a novel prior that can be used for Bayesian inference of molecular structures. Methods: We describe the properties of the prior and the computation of its hyperparameters. We then evaluate the prior on two synthetic linear inverse problems, and compare against a popular prior in cryo-EM reconstruction at a range of SNRs. Results: We show that the new prior effectively suppresses noise and fills-in low SNR regions in the spectral domain. Furthermore, it improves the resolution of estimates on the problems considered for a wide range of SNR and produces Fourier Shell Correlation curves that are insensitive to masking effects. Conclusions: We analyze the assumptions in the model, discuss relations to other regularization strategies, and postulate on potential implications for structure determination in cryo-EM.
summary: Background and Objective: Wilson statistics describe well the power spectrum of proteins at high frequencies. Therefore, it has found several applications in structural biology, e.g., it is the basis for sharpening steps used in cryogenic electron microscopy (cryo-EM). A recent paper gave the first rigorous proof of Wilson statistics based on a formalism of Wilson's original argument. This new analysis also leads to statistical estimates of the scattering potential of proteins that reveal a correlation between neighboring Fourier coefficients. Here we exploit these estimates to craft a novel prior that can be used for Bayesian inference of molecular structures. Methods: We describe the properties of the prior and the computation of its hyperparameters. We then evaluate the prior on two synthetic linear inverse problems, and compare against a popular prior in cryo-EM reconstruction at a range of SNRs. Results: We show that the new prior effectively suppresses noise and fills-in low SNR regions in the spectral domain. Furthermore, it improves the resolution of estimates on the problems considered for a wide range of SNR and produces Fourier Shell Correlation curves that are insensitive to masking effects. Conclusions: We analyze the assumptions in the model, discuss relations to other regularization strategies, and postulate on potential implications for structure determination in cryo-EM.
abstract_zh: 背景和目的：威尔逊统计很好地描述了蛋白质在高频下的功率谱。因此，它在结构生物学中得到了多种应用，例如，它是低温电子显微镜 (cryo-EM) 中使用的锐化步骤的基础。最近的一篇论文基于威尔逊原始论点的形式主义，首次给出了威尔逊统计的严格证明。这项新分析还可以对蛋白质的散射潜力进行统计估计，从而揭示相邻傅里叶系数之间的相关性。在这里，我们利用这些估计来设计一个新颖的先验，可用于分子结构的贝叶斯推理。方法：我们描述先验的属性及其超参数的计算。然后，我们评估两个合成线性逆问题的先验，并与一系列 SNR 下冷冻电镜重建中流行的先验进行比较。结果：我们证明新的先验有效地抑制了噪声并填充了谱域中的低 SNR 区域。此外，它还提高了对各种 SNR 所考虑问题的估计分辨率，并生成对掩蔽效应不敏感的傅里叶壳相关曲线。结论：我们分析了模型中的假设，讨论了与其他正则化策略的关系，并假设了冷冻电镜结构测定的潜在影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Wilson统计的分子先验分布，用于改进低温电子显微镜（cryo-EM）中的分子结构贝叶斯推断方法。
AI.motivation: 现有cryo-EM重建方法在低信噪比（SNR）条件下表现不佳，而Wilson统计能有效描述蛋白质高频功率谱特性，为构建更优先验提供理论基础。
AI.method: 基于Wilson统计推导分子散射势的统计估计，构建新型先验分布并计算其超参数；通过合成线性逆问题测试该先验在不同SNR下的性能，与传统先验方法对比验证效果。
AI.result: 新先验显著抑制噪声并填补低SNR频域区域，在宽SNR范围内提升重建分辨率，且傅里叶壳相关（FSC）曲线不受掩膜效应干扰。
AI.conclusion: 分析了模型假设与正则化策略的关联，认为该先验有望推动cryo-EM结构解析的精度提升，为后续研究提供理论支持。

authors_text: Yanqi Zhou,Tao Lei,Hanxiao Liu,Nan Du,Yanping Huang,Vincent Zhao,Andrew Dai,Zhifeng Chen,Quoc Le,James Laudon
title: Mixture-of-Experts with Expert Choice Routing
title_zh: 具有专家选择路由的专家混合
abstract: Sparsely-activated Mixture-of-experts (MoE) models allow the number of parameters to greatly increase while keeping the amount of computation for a given token or a given sample unchanged. However, a poor expert routing strategy (e.g. one resulting in load imbalance) can cause certain experts to be under-trained, leading to an expert being under or over-specialized. Prior work allocates a fixed number of experts to each token using a top-k function regardless of the relative importance of different tokens. To address this, we propose a heterogeneous mixture-of-experts employing an expert choice method. Instead of letting tokens select the top-k experts, we have experts selecting the top-k tokens. As a result, each token can be routed to a variable number of experts and each expert can have a fixed bucket size. We systematically study pre-training speedups using the same computational resources of the Switch Transformer top-1 and GShard top-2 gating of prior work and find that our method improves training convergence time by more than 2x. For the same computational cost, our method demonstrates higher performance in fine-tuning 11 selected tasks in the GLUE and SuperGLUE benchmarks. For a smaller activation cost, our method outperforms the T5 dense model in 7 out of the 11 tasks.
summary: Sparsely-activated Mixture-of-experts (MoE) models allow the number of parameters to greatly increase while keeping the amount of computation for a given token or a given sample unchanged. However, a poor expert routing strategy (e.g. one resulting in load imbalance) can cause certain experts to be under-trained, leading to an expert being under or over-specialized. Prior work allocates a fixed number of experts to each token using a top-k function regardless of the relative importance of different tokens. To address this, we propose a heterogeneous mixture-of-experts employing an expert choice method. Instead of letting tokens select the top-k experts, we have experts selecting the top-k tokens. As a result, each token can be routed to a variable number of experts and each expert can have a fixed bucket size. We systematically study pre-training speedups using the same computational resources of the Switch Transformer top-1 and GShard top-2 gating of prior work and find that our method improves training convergence time by more than 2x. For the same computational cost, our method demonstrates higher performance in fine-tuning 11 selected tasks in the GLUE and SuperGLUE benchmarks. For a smaller activation cost, our method outperforms the T5 dense model in 7 out of the 11 tasks.
abstract_zh: 稀疏激活的专家混合（MoE）模型允许参数数量大大增加，同时保持给定令牌或给定样本的计算量不变。然而，糟糕的专家路由策略（例如导致负载不平衡的策略）可能会导致某些专家训练不足，从而导致专家不够专业或过于专​​业。先前的工作使用 top-k 函数为每个代币分配固定数量的专家，而不管不同代币的相对重要性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了采用专家选择方法的异构专家混合。我们不是让代币选择前 k 个专家，而是让专家选择前 k 个代币。因此，每个令牌可以被路由到可变数量的专家，并且每个专家可以具有固定的存储桶大小。我们使用 Switch Transformer top-1 和 GShard top-2 门控的先前工作的相同计算资源系统地研究预训练加速，发现我们的方法将训练收敛时间提高了 2 倍以上。对于相同的计算成本，我们的方法在 GLUE 和 SuperGLUE 基准测试中微调 11 个选定任务时表现出更高的性能。对于较小的激活成本，我们的方法在 11 项任务中的 7 项中优于 T5 密集模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种异构混合专家（MoE）模型，通过专家选择路由机制优化计算资源分配，提升模型训练效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 传统MoE模型因固定专家分配策略导致负载不平衡，专家可能欠训练或过拟合，且无法根据token重要性动态调整计算资源。
AI.method: 采用专家选择token的路由方式，让专家自主选择处理的token，实现每个token可变专家数量分配及专家固定桶大小的异构结构。
AI.result: 在相同计算资源下，训练收敛时间提升2倍以上；GLUE/SuperGLUE基准测试中11项任务微调性能优于Switch Transformer和GShard，7项任务超越T5密集模型。
AI.conclusion: 专家选择路由机制有效平衡计算负载，提升训练效率与模型性能，为大规模MoE模型优化提供新思路。

search_text: Mixture-of-Experts with Expert Choice Routing 具有专家选择路由的专家混合 Sparsely-activated Mixture-of-experts (MoE) models allow the number of parameters to greatly increase while keeping the amount of computation for a given token or a given sample unchanged. However, a poor expert routing strategy (e.g. one resulting in load imbalance) can cause certain experts to be under-trained, leading to an expert being under or over-specialized. Prior work allocates a fixed number of experts to each token using a top-k function regardless of the relative importance of different tokens. To address this, we propose a heterogeneous mixture-of-experts employing an expert choice method. Instead of letting tokens select the top-k experts, we have experts selecting the top-k tokens. As a result, each token can be routed to a variable number of experts and each expert can have a fixed bucket size. We systematically study pre-training speedups using the same computational resources of the Switch Transformer top-1 and GShard top-2 gating of prior work and find that our method improves training convergence time by more than 2x. For the same computational cost, our method demonstrates higher performance in fine-tuning 11 selected tasks in the GLUE and SuperGLUE benchmarks. For a smaller activation cost, our method outperforms the T5 dense model in 7 out of the 11 tasks. 稀疏激活的专家混合（MoE）模型允许参数数量大大增加，同时保持给定令牌或给定样本的计算量不变。然而，糟糕的专家路由策略（例如导致负载不平衡的策略）可能会导致某些专家训练不足，从而导致专家不够专业或过于专​​业。先前的工作使用 top-k 函数为每个代币分配固定数量的专家，而不管不同代币的相对重要性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了采用专家选择方法的异构专家混合。我们不是让代币选择前 k 个专家，而是让专家选择前 k 个代币。因此，每个令牌可以被路由到可变数量的专家，并且每个专家可以具有固定的存储桶大小。我们使用 Switch Transformer top-1 和 GShard top-2 门控的先前工作的相同计算资源系统地研究预训练加速，发现我们的方法将训练收敛时间提高了 2 倍以上。对于相同的计算成本，我们的方法在 GLUE 和 SuperGLUE 基准测试中微调 11 个选定任务时表现出更高的性能。对于较小的激活成本，我们的方法在 11 项任务中的 7 项中优于 T5 密集模型。 本文提出一种异构混合专家（MoE）模型，通过专家选择路由机制优化计算资源分配，提升模型训练效率和性能。 Yanqi Zhou,Tao Lei,Hanxiao Liu,Nan Du,Yanping Huang,Vincent Zhao,Andrew Dai,Zhifeng Chen,Quoc Le,James Laudon cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Peng Xiang,Xin Wen,Yu-Shen Liu,Yan-Pei Cao,Pengfei Wan,Wen Zheng,Zhizhong Han
title: Snowflake Point Deconvolution for Point Cloud Completion and Generation with Skip-Transformer
title_zh: 使用 Skip-Transformer 进行点云补全和生成的雪花点反卷积
comment: IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI), 2022. This work is a journal extension of our ICCV 2021 paper arXiv:2108.04444 . The first two authors contributed equally
comments: IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI), 2022. This work is a journal extension of our ICCV 2021 paper arXiv:2108.04444 . The first two authors contributed equally
abstract: Most existing point cloud completion methods suffer from the discrete nature of point clouds and the unstructured prediction of points in local regions, which makes it difficult to reveal fine local geometric details. To resolve this issue, we propose SnowflakeNet with snowflake point deconvolution (SPD) to generate complete point clouds. SPD models the generation of point clouds as the snowflake-like growth of points, where child points are generated progressively by splitting their parent points after each SPD. Our insight into the detailed geometry is to introduce a skip-transformer in the SPD to learn the point splitting patterns that can best fit the local regions. The skip-transformer leverages attention mechanism to summarize the splitting patterns used in the previous SPD layer to produce the splitting in the current layer. The locally compact and structured point clouds generated by SPD precisely reveal the structural characteristics of the 3D shape in local patches, which enables us to predict highly detailed geometries. Moreover, since SPD is a general operation that is not limited to completion, we explore its applications in other generative tasks, including point cloud auto-encoding, generation, single image reconstruction, and upsampling. Our experimental results outperform state-of-the-art methods under widely used benchmarks.
summary: Most existing point cloud completion methods suffer from the discrete nature of point clouds and the unstructured prediction of points in local regions, which makes it difficult to reveal fine local geometric details. To resolve this issue, we propose SnowflakeNet with snowflake point deconvolution (SPD) to generate complete point clouds. SPD models the generation of point clouds as the snowflake-like growth of points, where child points are generated progressively by splitting their parent points after each SPD. Our insight into the detailed geometry is to introduce a skip-transformer in the SPD to learn the point splitting patterns that can best fit the local regions. The skip-transformer leverages attention mechanism to summarize the splitting patterns used in the previous SPD layer to produce the splitting in the current layer. The locally compact and structured point clouds generated by SPD precisely reveal the structural characteristics of the 3D shape in local patches, which enables us to predict highly detailed geometries. Moreover, since SPD is a general operation that is not limited to completion, we explore its applications in other generative tasks, including point cloud auto-encoding, generation, single image reconstruction, and upsampling. Our experimental results outperform state-of-the-art methods under widely used benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的点云补全方法都受到点云的离散性和局部区域点的非结构化预测的影响，这使得难以揭示精细的局部几何细节。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了使用雪花点反卷积（SPD）的 SnowflakeNet 来生成完整的点云。 SPD 将点云的生成建模为点的雪花状增长，其中子点是通过在每次 SPD 后分割其父点来逐步生成的。我们对详细几何结构的洞察是在 SPD 中引入一个跳跃变换器来学习最适合局部区域的点分裂模式。 Skip-Transformer 利用注意力机制来总结先前 SPD 层中使用的分裂模式，以在当前层中产生分裂。 SPD 生成的局部紧凑且结构化的点云精确地揭示了局部斑块中 3D 形状的结构特征，这使我们能够预测高度详细的几何形状。此外，由于SPD是一种通用操作，不限于完成，我们探索其在其他生成任务中的应用，包括点云自动编码、生成、单图像重建和上采样。我们的实验结果在广泛使用的基准下优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SnowflakeNet及其雪晶点反卷积（SPD）方法，用于点云补全与生成任务。
AI.motivation: 现有点云补全方法因点云离散性和局部区域无序预测，难以还原精细几何细节，需改进局部结构建模能力。
AI.method: 通过SPD模块模拟雪晶生长过程，逐层分裂父点生成子点；引入跳变Transformer学习历史分裂模式，增强局部结构化建模。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中优于现有SOTA方法，实现更精细的几何细节还原，并扩展应用于点云自编码、生成等任务。
AI.conclusion: SPD通过结构化点生成机制有效捕捉局部几何特征，为点云生成任务提供通用且高效的解决方案。

title: Playing against no-regret players
title_zh: 与无悔的玩家比赛
abstract: In increasingly different contexts, it happens that a human player has to interact with artificial players who make decisions following decision-making algorithms. How should the human player play against these algorithms to maximize his utility? Does anything change if he faces one or more artificial players? The main goal of the paper is to answer these two questions. Consider n-player games in normal form repeated over time, where we call the human player optimizer, and the (n -- 1) artificial players, learners. We assume that learners play no-regret algorithms, a class of algorithms widely used in online learning and decision-making. In these games, we consider the concept of Stackelberg equilibrium. In a recent paper, Deng, Schneider, and Sivan have shown that in a 2-player game the optimizer can always guarantee an expected cumulative utility of at least the Stackelberg value per round. In our first result, we show, with counterexamples, that this result is no longer true if the optimizer has to face more than one player. Therefore, we generalize the definition of Stackelberg equilibrium introducing the concept of correlated Stackelberg equilibrium. Finally, in the main result, we prove that the optimizer can guarantee at least the correlated Stackelberg value per round. Moreover, using a version of the strong law of large numbers, we show that our result is also true almost surely for the optimizer utility instead of the optimizer's expected utility.
summary: In increasingly different contexts, it happens that a human player has to interact with artificial players who make decisions following decision-making algorithms. How should the human player play against these algorithms to maximize his utility? Does anything change if he faces one or more artificial players? The main goal of the paper is to answer these two questions. Consider n-player games in normal form repeated over time, where we call the human player optimizer, and the (n -- 1) artificial players, learners. We assume that learners play no-regret algorithms, a class of algorithms widely used in online learning and decision-making. In these games, we consider the concept of Stackelberg equilibrium. In a recent paper, Deng, Schneider, and Sivan have shown that in a 2-player game the optimizer can always guarantee an expected cumulative utility of at least the Stackelberg value per round. In our first result, we show, with counterexamples, that this result is no longer true if the optimizer has to face more than one player. Therefore, we generalize the definition of Stackelberg equilibrium introducing the concept of correlated Stackelberg equilibrium. Finally, in the main result, we prove that the optimizer can guarantee at least the correlated Stackelberg value per round. Moreover, using a version of the strong law of large numbers, we show that our result is also true almost surely for the optimizer utility instead of the optimizer's expected utility.
abstract_zh: 在日益不同的环境中，人类玩家必须与根据决策算法做出决策的人工玩家进行交互。人类玩家应该如何对抗这些算法才能最大化他的效用？如果他面对一名或多名人工球员，会有什么变化吗？本文的主要目标是回答这两个问题。考虑随时间重复的正常形式的 n 玩家游戏，我们称之为人类玩家优化器，以及 (n - 1) 人工玩家，学习者。我们假设学习者使用无悔算法，这是一类广泛应用于在线学习和决策的算法。在这些游戏中，我们考虑斯塔克尔伯格均衡的概念。在最近的一篇论文中，Deng、Schneider 和 Sivan 表明，在 2 人游戏中，优化器始终可以保证每轮至少达到 Stackelberg 值的预期累积效用。在我们的第一个结果中，我们通过反例表明，如果优化器必须面对多个玩家，则该结果不再正确。因此，我们推广了 Stackelberg 均衡的定义，引入了相关 Stackelberg 均衡的概念。最后，在主要结果中，我们证明优化器至少可以保证每轮相关的 Stackelberg 值。此外，使用强大数定律的一个版本，我们表明我们的结果对于优化器效用而不是优化器的预期效用几乎肯定也是正确的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究人类玩家在重复博弈中如何对抗使用无遗憾算法的多个人工智能玩家，以最大化自身效用，并探讨Stackelberg均衡在多玩家场景下的适用性。
AI.motivation: 在现实场景中，人类常需与遵循算法决策的AI玩家互动，但现有理论多针对单个AI玩家。当面对多个AI玩家时，人类策略的最优性及均衡概念需重新分析。
AI.method: 通过分析正常形式重复博弈，引入Stackelberg均衡概念，并针对多玩家场景提出关联Stackelberg均衡。结合大数定律验证结果的几乎必然性。
AI.result: 证明单个AI玩家时优化者可保证Stackelberg值，但多玩家场景下该结论不成立。通过关联Stackelberg均衡，优化者仍可保证每轮关联Stackelberg值，且结果对效用几乎必然成立。
AI.conclusion: 面对多个无遗憾学习者时，关联Stackelberg均衡为优化者提供了效用保障，扩展了传统博弈论在多AI交互场景下的应用边界。

search_text: Playing against no-regret players 与无悔的玩家比赛 In increasingly different contexts, it happens that a human player has to interact with artificial players who make decisions following decision-making algorithms. How should the human player play against these algorithms to maximize his utility? Does anything change if he faces one or more artificial players? The main goal of the paper is to answer these two questions. Consider n-player games in normal form repeated over time, where we call the human player optimizer, and the (n -- 1) artificial players, learners. We assume that learners play no-regret algorithms, a class of algorithms widely used in online learning and decision-making. In these games, we consider the concept of Stackelberg equilibrium. In a recent paper, Deng, Schneider, and Sivan have shown that in a 2-player game the optimizer can always guarantee an expected cumulative utility of at least the Stackelberg value per round. In our first result, we show, with counterexamples, that this result is no longer true if the optimizer has to face more than one player. Therefore, we generalize the definition of Stackelberg equilibrium introducing the concept of correlated Stackelberg equilibrium. Finally, in the main result, we prove that the optimizer can guarantee at least the correlated Stackelberg value per round. Moreover, using a version of the strong law of large numbers, we show that our result is also true almost surely for the optimizer utility instead of the optimizer's expected utility. 在日益不同的环境中，人类玩家必须与根据决策算法做出决策的人工玩家进行交互。人类玩家应该如何对抗这些算法才能最大化他的效用？如果他面对一名或多名人工球员，会有什么变化吗？本文的主要目标是回答这两个问题。考虑随时间重复的正常形式的 n 玩家游戏，我们称之为人类玩家优化器，以及 (n - 1) 人工玩家，学习者。我们假设学习者使用无悔算法，这是一类广泛应用于在线学习和决策的算法。在这些游戏中，我们考虑斯塔克尔伯格均衡的概念。在最近的一篇论文中，Deng、Schneider 和 Sivan 表明，在 2 人游戏中，优化器始终可以保证每轮至少达到 Stackelberg 值的预期累积效用。在我们的第一个结果中，我们通过反例表明，如果优化器必须面对多个玩家，则该结果不再正确。因此，我们推广了 Stackelberg 均衡的定义，引入了相关 Stackelberg 均衡的概念。最后，在主要结果中，我们证明优化器至少可以保证每轮相关的 Stackelberg 值。此外，使用强大数定律的一个版本，我们表明我们的结果对于优化器效用而不是优化器的预期效用几乎肯定也是正确的。 本文研究人类玩家在重复博弈中如何对抗使用无遗憾算法的多个人工智能玩家，以最大化自身效用，并探讨Stackelberg均衡在多玩家场景下的适用性。 Maurizio D 'Andrea cs.GT,cs.AI,math.OC

title: Towards Digital Twin Oriented Modelling of Complex Networked Systems and Their Dynamics: A Comprehensive Survey
title_zh: 面向复杂网络系统及其动力学的数字孪生建模：综合调查
abstract: This paper aims to provide a comprehensive critical overview on how entities and their interactions in Complex Networked Systems (CNS) are modelled across disciplines as they approach their ultimate goal of creating a Digital Twin (DT) that perfectly matches the reality. We propose a new framework to conceptually compare diverse existing modelling paradigms from different perspectives and create unified assessment criteria to assess their respective capabilities of reaching such an ultimate goal. Using the proposed criteria, we also appraise how far the reviewed current state-of-the-art approaches are from the idealised DTs. We also identify and propose potential directions and ways of building a DT-orientated CNS based on the convergence and integration of CNS and DT utilising a variety of cross-disciplinary techniques.
summary: This paper aims to provide a comprehensive critical overview on how entities and their interactions in Complex Networked Systems (CNS) are modelled across disciplines as they approach their ultimate goal of creating a Digital Twin (DT) that perfectly matches the reality. We propose a new framework to conceptually compare diverse existing modelling paradigms from different perspectives and create unified assessment criteria to assess their respective capabilities of reaching such an ultimate goal. Using the proposed criteria, we also appraise how far the reviewed current state-of-the-art approaches are from the idealised DTs. We also identify and propose potential directions and ways of building a DT-orientated CNS based on the convergence and integration of CNS and DT utilising a variety of cross-disciplinary techniques.
abstract_zh: 本文旨在对复杂网络系统 (CNS) 中的实体及其交互如何跨学科建模提供全面的批判性概述，以实现创建与现实完美匹配的数字孪生 (DT) 的最终目标。我们提出了一个新的框架，从不同的角度从概念上比较不同的现有建模范式，并创建统一的评估标准来评估它们各自实现最终目标的能力。使用所提出的标准，我们还评估了所审查的当前最先进的方法与理想化 DT 的距离。我们还利用各种跨学科技术，基于 CNS 和 DT 的融合和集成，确定并提出了构建面向 DT 的 CNS 的潜在方向和方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在综述复杂网络系统（CNS）向数字孪生（DT）建模的跨学科方法，并提出统一评估框架以衡量现有模型与理想DT的差距。
AI.motivation: 现有CNS建模方法分散且缺乏统一标准，难以实现与现实完全匹配的数字孪生，需整合跨学科技术以推动DT发展。
AI.method: 提出跨视角比较框架及统一评估标准，用于评估现有CNS建模方法在实现数字孪生目标上的能力。
AI.result: 评估显示当前方法与理想DT存在差距，并提出融合CNS与DT的跨学科技术路径作为未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 需通过跨学科技术融合与统一评估框架推动复杂网络系统向数字孪生的建模发展。

title: Parameter Identification of a PN-Guided Incoming Missile Using an Improved Multiple-Model Mechanism
title_zh: 使用改进的多模型机制对 PN 制导来袭导弹进行参数识别
abstract: An active defense against an incoming missile requires information of it, including a guidance law parameter and a first-order lateral time constant. To this end, assuming that a missile with a proportional navigation (PN) guidance law attempts to attack an aerial target with bang-bang evasive maneuvers, a parameter identification model based on the gated recurrent unit (GRU) neural network is built in this paper. The analytic identification solutions for the guidance law parameter and the first-order lateral time constant are derived. The inputs of the identification model are available kinematic information between the aircraft and the missile, while the outputs contain the regression results of missile parameters. To increase the training speed and the identification accuracy of the Model, an output processing method called improved multiplemodel mechanism (IMMM) is proposed in this paper. The effectiveness of IMMM and the performance of the established model are demonstrated through numerical simulations under various engagement scenarios.
summary: An active defense against an incoming missile requires information of it, including a guidance law parameter and a first-order lateral time constant. To this end, assuming that a missile with a proportional navigation (PN) guidance law attempts to attack an aerial target with bang-bang evasive maneuvers, a parameter identification model based on the gated recurrent unit (GRU) neural network is built in this paper. The analytic identification solutions for the guidance law parameter and the first-order lateral time constant are derived. The inputs of the identification model are available kinematic information between the aircraft and the missile, while the outputs contain the regression results of missile parameters. To increase the training speed and the identification accuracy of the Model, an output processing method called improved multiplemodel mechanism (IMMM) is proposed in this paper. The effectiveness of IMMM and the performance of the established model are demonstrated through numerical simulations under various engagement scenarios.
abstract_zh: 对来袭导弹的主动防御需要它的信息，包括制导律参数和一阶横向时间常数。为此，假设采用比例导航（PN）制导律的导弹试图通过爆炸式规避机动攻击空中目标，本文建立了基于门控循环单元（GRU）神经网络的参数识别模型。推导了制导律参数和一阶横向时间常数的解析辨识解。识别模型的输入是飞机和导弹之间可用的运动学信息，而输出包含导弹参数的回归结果。为了提高模型的训练速度和识别精度，本文提出了一种称为改进的多模型机制（IMMM）的输出处理方法。通过各种交战场景下的数值模拟，证明了 IMMM 的有效性和所建立模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的多模型机制，用于识别比例导航（PN）制导导弹的参数，以提高主动防御系统的准确性。
AI.motivation: 拦截导弹需要准确识别其制导律参数和横向时间常数，但传统方法在复杂机动场景下存在精度不足的问题。
AI.method: 基于门控循环单元（GRU）神经网络构建参数识别模型，并提出改进的多模型机制（IMMM）优化输出处理流程。
AI.result: 通过多种交战场景的数值仿真验证，IMMM显著提升了模型的训练速度和参数识别精度。
AI.conclusion: 改进的多模型机制有效解决了PN制导导弹参数识别难题，为实时防御系统提供了可靠的技术支持。

authors_text: Zhuomin Zhang,Elizabeth C. Mansfield,Jia Li,John Russell,George S. Young,Catherine Adams,James Z. Wang
title: A Machine Learning Paradigm for Studying Pictorial Realism: Are Constable's Clouds More Real than His Contemporaries?
title_zh: 研究图像现实主义的机器学习范式：康斯特布尔的云比他同时代的人更真实吗？
comment: Supplementary materials are available from the authors or http://wang.ist.psu.edu
comments: Supplementary materials are available from the authors or http://wang.ist.psu.edu
abstract: The British landscape painter John Constable is considered foundational for the Realist movement in 19th-century European painting. Constable's painted skies, in particular, were seen as remarkably accurate by his contemporaries, an impression shared by many viewers today. Yet, assessing the accuracy of realist paintings like Constable's is subjective or intuitive, even for professional art historians, making it difficult to say with certainty what set Constable's skies apart from those of his contemporaries. Our goal is to contribute to a more objective understanding of Constable's realism. We propose a new machine-learning-based paradigm for studying pictorial realism in an explainable way. Our framework assesses realism by measuring the similarity between clouds painted by artists noted for their skies, like Constable, and photographs of clouds. The experimental results of cloud classification show that Constable approximates more consistently than his contemporaries the formal features of actual clouds in his paintings. The study, as a novel interdisciplinary approach that combines computer vision and machine learning, meteorology, and art history, is a springboard for broader and deeper analyses of pictorial realism.
summary: The British landscape painter John Constable is considered foundational for the Realist movement in 19th-century European painting. Constable's painted skies, in particular, were seen as remarkably accurate by his contemporaries, an impression shared by many viewers today. Yet, assessing the accuracy of realist paintings like Constable's is subjective or intuitive, even for professional art historians, making it difficult to say with certainty what set Constable's skies apart from those of his contemporaries. Our goal is to contribute to a more objective understanding of Constable's realism. We propose a new machine-learning-based paradigm for studying pictorial realism in an explainable way. Our framework assesses realism by measuring the similarity between clouds painted by artists noted for their skies, like Constable, and photographs of clouds. The experimental results of cloud classification show that Constable approximates more consistently than his contemporaries the formal features of actual clouds in his paintings. The study, as a novel interdisciplinary approach that combines computer vision and machine learning, meteorology, and art history, is a springboard for broader and deeper analyses of pictorial realism.
abstract_zh: 英国风景画家约翰·康斯特布尔被认为是 19 世纪欧洲绘画现实主义运动的奠基人。尤其是康斯特布尔画的天空，被他的同时代人认为非常准确，今天许多观众也有同样的印象。然而，即使对于专业艺术史学家来说，评估像康斯特布尔这样的现实主义绘画的准确性也是主观或直观的，因此很难确定康斯特布尔的天空与同时代的天空有何不同。我们的目标是帮助人们更客观地理解康斯特布尔的现实主义。我们提出了一种新的基于机器学习的范式，以可解释的方式研究图像现实主义。我们的框架通过测量康斯特布尔等以天空闻名的艺术家所画的云彩与云彩照片之间的相似性来评估现实主义。云分类的实验结果表明，康斯特布尔比他的同时代人更接近他画作中实际云的形式特征。这项研究作为一种新颖的跨学科方法，结合了计算机视觉和机器学习、气象学和艺术史，是对绘画现实主义进行更广泛和更深入分析的跳板。

AI.tldr: 提出基于机器学习的方法，研究绘画现实主义，比较康斯特布尔与同时代画家云彩的逼真度
AI.motivation: 传统评估方法主观，需客观手段确定康斯特布尔云彩的独特性
AI.method: 构建机器学习框架，通过比较绘画与真实云照片的相似性，进行云分类实验
AI.result: 实验显示康斯特布尔的云比同时代画家更符合真实云的形态特征
AI.conclusion: 跨学科方法验证了机器学习在艺术史研究中的潜力，为现实主义分析提供新视角

search_text: A Machine Learning Paradigm for Studying Pictorial Realism: Are Constable's Clouds More Real than His Contemporaries? 研究图像现实主义的机器学习范式：康斯特布尔的云比他同时代的人更真实吗？ The British landscape painter John Constable is considered foundational for the Realist movement in 19th-century European painting. Constable's painted skies, in particular, were seen as remarkably accurate by his contemporaries, an impression shared by many viewers today. Yet, assessing the accuracy of realist paintings like Constable's is subjective or intuitive, even for professional art historians, making it difficult to say with certainty what set Constable's skies apart from those of his contemporaries. Our goal is to contribute to a more objective understanding of Constable's realism. We propose a new machine-learning-based paradigm for studying pictorial realism in an explainable way. Our framework assesses realism by measuring the similarity between clouds painted by artists noted for their skies, like Constable, and photographs of clouds. The experimental results of cloud classification show that Constable approximates more consistently than his contemporaries the formal features of actual clouds in his paintings. The study, as a novel interdisciplinary approach that combines computer vision and machine learning, meteorology, and art history, is a springboard for broader and deeper analyses of pictorial realism. 英国风景画家约翰·康斯特布尔被认为是 19 世纪欧洲绘画现实主义运动的奠基人。尤其是康斯特布尔画的天空，被他的同时代人认为非常准确，今天许多观众也有同样的印象。然而，即使对于专业艺术史学家来说，评估像康斯特布尔这样的现实主义绘画的准确性也是主观或直观的，因此很难确定康斯特布尔的天空与同时代的天空有何不同。我们的目标是帮助人们更客观地理解康斯特布尔的现实主义。我们提出了一种新的基于机器学习的范式，以可解释的方式研究图像现实主义。我们的框架通过测量康斯特布尔等以天空闻名的艺术家所画的云彩与云彩照片之间的相似性来评估现实主义。云分类的实验结果表明，康斯特布尔比他的同时代人更接近他画作中实际云的形式特征。这项研究作为一种新颖的跨学科方法，结合了计算机视觉和机器学习、气象学和艺术史，是对绘画现实主义进行更广泛和更深入分析的跳板。 提出基于机器学习的方法，研究绘画现实主义，比较康斯特布尔与同时代画家云彩的逼真度 Zhuomin Zhang,Elizabeth C. Mansfield,Jia Li,John Russell,George S. Young,Catherine Adams,James Z. Wang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Vishvak Murahari,Carlos E. Jimenez,Runzhe Yang,Karthik Narasimhan
title: DataMUX: Data Multiplexing for Neural Networks
title_zh: DataMUX：神经网络的数据复用
abstract: In this paper, we introduce data multiplexing (DataMUX), a technique that enables deep neural networks to process multiple inputs simultaneously using a single compact representation. DataMUX demonstrates that neural networks are capable of generating accurate predictions over mixtures of inputs, resulting in increased throughput with minimal extra memory requirements. Our approach uses two key components -- 1) a multiplexing layer that performs a fixed linear transformation to each input before combining them to create a mixed representation of the same size as a single input, which is then processed by the base network, and 2) a demultiplexing layer that converts the base network's output back into independent representations before producing predictions for each input. We show the viability of DataMUX for different architectures (Transformers, and to a lesser extent MLPs and CNNs) across six different tasks spanning sentence classification, named entity recognition and image classification. For instance, DataMUX for Transformers can multiplex up to $20$x/$40$x inputs, achieving $11$x/$18$x increase in throughput with minimal absolute performance drops of $<2\%$ and $<4\%$ respectively on MNLI, a natural language inference task. We also provide a theoretical construction for multiplexing in self-attention networks and analyze the effect of various design elements in DataMUX.
summary: In this paper, we introduce data multiplexing (DataMUX), a technique that enables deep neural networks to process multiple inputs simultaneously using a single compact representation. DataMUX demonstrates that neural networks are capable of generating accurate predictions over mixtures of inputs, resulting in increased throughput with minimal extra memory requirements. Our approach uses two key components -- 1) a multiplexing layer that performs a fixed linear transformation to each input before combining them to create a mixed representation of the same size as a single input, which is then processed by the base network, and 2) a demultiplexing layer that converts the base network's output back into independent representations before producing predictions for each input. We show the viability of DataMUX for different architectures (Transformers, and to a lesser extent MLPs and CNNs) across six different tasks spanning sentence classification, named entity recognition and image classification. For instance, DataMUX for Transformers can multiplex up to $20$x/$40$x inputs, achieving $11$x/$18$x increase in throughput with minimal absolute performance drops of $<2\%$ and $<4\%$ respectively on MNLI, a natural language inference task. We also provide a theoretical construction for multiplexing in self-attention networks and analyze the effect of various design elements in DataMUX.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了数据复用（DataMUX），这是一种使深度神经网络能够使用单个紧凑表示同时处理多个输入的技术。 DataMUX 证明神经网络能够对输入的混合生成准确的预测，从而以最小的额外内存需求提高吞吐量。我们的方法使用两个关键组件 - 1）一个复用层，它对每个输入执行固定的线性变换，然后将它们组合起来创建与单个输入相同大小的混合表示，然后由基础网络处理；2）一个解复用层，在为每个输入生成预测之前将基础网络的输出转换回独立的表示。我们展示了 DataMUX 对于不同架构（Transformers，以及较小程度上的 MLP 和 CNN）跨越句子分类、命名实体识别和图像分类等六种不同任务的可行性。例如，DataMUX for Transformers 可以多路复用高达 $20$x/$40$x 的输入，在自然语言推理任务 MNLI 上实现 $11$x/$18$x 的吞吐量增长，而绝对性能下降分别为 $<2\%$ 和 $<4\%$。我们还提供了自注意力网络中多路复用的理论构建，并分析了 DataMUX 中各种设计元素的效果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DataMUX的数据复用技术，使神经网络能够通过单一紧凑表示同时处理多个输入，从而提高吞吐量并减少内存占用。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络处理多输入时需重复计算，导致资源浪费。本文旨在通过复用机制提升计算效率，减少内存消耗，同时保持模型性能。
AI.method: 方法包含两个核心组件：1) 复用层对每个输入进行固定线性变换后合并为混合表示；2) 解复用层将网络输出转换为独立表示以生成预测。该方法适用于Transformer、MLP和CNN等架构。
AI.result: 在六个任务（如句子分类、图像分类）中验证有效性，Transformer架构可复用20-40倍输入，吞吐量提升11-18倍，MNLI任务性能下降<2%和<4%。
AI.conclusion: DataMUX在多种架构和任务中均表现出高效性，理论分析与实验验证表明其设计元素对性能影响显著，为多输入处理提供了可行方案。

title: Unsupervised Multiple-Object Tracking with a Dynamical Variational Autoencoder
title_zh: 使用动态变分自动编码器进行无监督多对象跟踪
abstract: In this paper, we present an unsupervised probabilistic model and associated estimation algorithm for multi-object tracking (MOT) based on a dynamical variational autoencoder (DVAE), called DVAE-UMOT. The DVAE is a latent-variable deep generative model that can be seen as an extension of the variational autoencoder for the modeling of temporal sequences. It is included in DVAE-UMOT to model the objects' dynamics, after being pre-trained on an unlabeled synthetic dataset of single-object trajectories. Then the distributions and parameters of DVAE-UMOT are estimated on each multi-object sequence to track using the principles of variational inference: Definition of an approximate posterior distribution of the latent variables and maximization of the corresponding evidence lower bound of the data likehood function. DVAE-UMOT is shown experimentally to compete well with and even surpass the performance of two state-of-the-art probabilistic MOT models. Code and data are publicly available.
summary: In this paper, we present an unsupervised probabilistic model and associated estimation algorithm for multi-object tracking (MOT) based on a dynamical variational autoencoder (DVAE), called DVAE-UMOT. The DVAE is a latent-variable deep generative model that can be seen as an extension of the variational autoencoder for the modeling of temporal sequences. It is included in DVAE-UMOT to model the objects' dynamics, after being pre-trained on an unlabeled synthetic dataset of single-object trajectories. Then the distributions and parameters of DVAE-UMOT are estimated on each multi-object sequence to track using the principles of variational inference: Definition of an approximate posterior distribution of the latent variables and maximization of the corresponding evidence lower bound of the data likehood function. DVAE-UMOT is shown experimentally to compete well with and even surpass the performance of two state-of-the-art probabilistic MOT models. Code and data are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于动态变分自动编码器（DVAE）的多目标跟踪（MOT）的无监督概率模型和相关估计算法，称为DVAE-UMOT。 DVAE 是一种潜变量深度生成模型，可以看作是用于时间序列建模的变分自动编码器的扩展。在对单对象轨迹的未标记合成数据集进行预训练后，它包含在 DVAE-UMOT 中，用于对对象的动力学进行建模。然后，使用变分推理原理在每个多对象序列上估计 DVAE-UMOT 的分布和参数以进行跟踪：定义潜在变量的近似后验分布以及最大化数据似然函数的相应证据下界。实验表明，DVAE-UMOT 的性能可以与两种最先进的概率 MOT 模型相媲美甚至超越。代码和数据是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于动态变分自编码器（DVAE）的无监督多目标跟踪方法DVAE-UMOT，通过建模目标动态实现多目标轨迹估计。
AI.motivation: 传统多目标跟踪方法依赖监督数据或复杂特征工程，而DVAE-UMOT通过无监督学习解决标注数据稀缺问题，提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 采用预训练DVAE建模单目标轨迹动态，通过变分推断估计多目标序列的潜变量后验分布，并最大化证据下界优化模型参数。
AI.result: 实验表明DVAE-UMOT性能优于或与现有先进概率MOT模型相当，在公开数据集上验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 动态变分自编码器为无监督多目标跟踪提供了新思路，公开代码促进后续研究，未来可探索更复杂场景的扩展应用。

Then the distributions and parameters of DVAE-UMOT are estimated on each multi-object sequence to track using the principles of variational inference: Definition of an approximate posterior distribution of the latent variables and maximization of the corresponding evidence lower bound of the data likehood function. DVAE-UMOT is shown experimentally to compete well with and even surpass the performance of two state-of-the-art probabilistic MOT models. Code and data are publicly available. 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于动态变分自动编码器（DVAE）的多目标跟踪（MOT）的无监督概率模型和相关估计算法，称为DVAE-UMOT。 DVAE 是一种潜变量深度生成模型，可以看作是用于时间序列建模的变分自动编码器的扩展。在对单对象轨迹的未标记合成数据集进行预训练后，它包含在 DVAE-UMOT 中，用于对对象的动力学进行建模。然后，使用变分推理原理在每个多对象序列上估计 DVAE-UMOT 的分布和参数以进行跟踪：定义潜在变量的近似后验分布以及最大化数据似然函数的相应证据下界。实验表明，DVAE-UMOT 的性能可以与两种最先进的概率 MOT 模型相媲美甚至超越。代码和数据是公开的。 本文提出一种基于动态变分自编码器（DVAE）的无监督多目标跟踪方法DVAE-UMOT，通过建模目标动态实现多目标轨迹估计。 Xiaoyu Lin,Laurent Girin,Xavier Alameda-Pineda cs.LG,cs.CV

title: Learning Predictions for Algorithms with Predictions
title_zh: 通过预测来学习算法的预测
abstract: A burgeoning paradigm in algorithm design is the field of algorithms with predictions, in which algorithms can take advantage of a possibly-imperfect prediction of some aspect of the problem. While much work has focused on using predictions to improve competitive ratios, running times, or other performance measures, less effort has been devoted to the question of how to obtain the predictions themselves, especially in the critical online setting. We introduce a general design approach for algorithms that learn predictors: (1) identify a functional dependence of the performance measure on the prediction quality and (2) apply techniques from online learning to learn predictors, tune robustness-consistency trade-offs, and bound the sample complexity. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach by applying it to bipartite matching, ski-rental, page migration, and job scheduling. In several settings we improve upon multiple existing results while utilizing a much simpler analysis, while in the others we provide the first learning-theoretic guarantees.
summary: A burgeoning paradigm in algorithm design is the field of algorithms with predictions, in which algorithms can take advantage of a possibly-imperfect prediction of some aspect of the problem. While much work has focused on using predictions to improve competitive ratios, running times, or other performance measures, less effort has been devoted to the question of how to obtain the predictions themselves, especially in the critical online setting. We introduce a general design approach for algorithms that learn predictors: (1) identify a functional dependence of the performance measure on the prediction quality and (2) apply techniques from online learning to learn predictors, tune robustness-consistency trade-offs, and bound the sample complexity. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach by applying it to bipartite matching, ski-rental, page migration, and job scheduling. In several settings we improve upon multiple existing results while utilizing a much simpler analysis, while in the others we provide the first learning-theoretic guarantees.
abstract_zh: 算法设计中的一个新兴范例是预测算法领域，其中算法可以利用对问题某些方面可能不完美的预测。虽然很多工作都集中在使用预测来提高竞争率、运行时间或其他性能指标上，但很少有人致力于如何获得预测本身的问题，尤其是在关键的在线环境中。我们介绍了学习预测变量的算法的通用设计方法：（1）确定性能指标对预测质量的函数依赖性；（2）应用在线学习的技术来学习预测变量，调整鲁棒性-一致性权衡，并限制样本复杂性。我们通过将其应用于双向匹配、滑雪租赁、页面迁移和作业调度来证明我们的方法的有效性。在某些情况下，我们在利用更简单的分析的同时改进了多个现有结果，而在其他情况下，我们提供了第一个学习理论保证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用方法，使算法能够学习预测器以优化性能并降低样本复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有算法研究侧重于利用预测提升性能，但缺乏在线场景下如何有效获取预测的系统方法。
AI.method: 通过建立性能指标与预测质量的函数关系，并应用在线学习技术学习预测器、调整鲁棒性-一致性权衡及样本复杂度界。
AI.result: 在二分图匹配、滑雪租赁等场景中改进了多个现有结果，部分场景首次提供学习理论保证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为在线算法预测器设计提供新范式，兼顾性能优化与理论分析，具有广泛适用性。

title: Cyber Human Interaction
title_zh: 网络人际互动
abstract: Cyber human interaction is a broad term encompassing the range of interactions that humans can have with technology. While human interaction with fixed and mobile computers is well understood, the world is on the cusp of ubiquitous and sustained interactions between humans and robots. While robotic systems are intertwined with computing and computing technologies, the word robot here describes technologies that can physically affect and in turn be affected by their environments which includes humans. This chapter delves into issues of cyber human interaction from the perspective of humans interacting with a subset of robots known as assistive robots. Assistive robots are robots designed to assist individuals with mobility or capacity limitations in completing everyday activities, commonly called instrumental activities of daily living. These range from household chores, eating or drinking to any activity with which a user may need the daily assistance of a caregiver to complete. One common type of assistive robot is the wheelchair mounted robotic arm. This device is designed to attach to a user's wheelchair to allow him or her to complete their activities independently. In short, these devices have sensors that allow them to sense and process their environment with varying levels of autonomy to perform actions that benefit and improve the well-being of people with capability limitations or disabilities. While human robot interaction is a popular research topic, not much research has been dedicated with regard to individual with limitations. In this chapter, we provide an overview of assistive robotic devices, discuss common methods of user interaction, and the need for an adaptive compensation framework to support potential users in regaining their functional capabilities.
summary: Cyber human interaction is a broad term encompassing the range of interactions that humans can have with technology. While human interaction with fixed and mobile computers is well understood, the world is on the cusp of ubiquitous and sustained interactions between humans and robots. In short, these devices have sensors that allow them to sense and process their environment with varying levels of autonomy to perform actions that benefit and improve the well-being of people with capability limitations or disabilities. While human robot interaction is a popular research topic, not much research has been dedicated with regard to individual with limitations. In this chapter, we provide an overview of assistive robotic devices, discuss common methods of user interaction, and the need for an adaptive compensation framework to support potential users in regaining their functional capabilities.
abstract_zh: 网络人类互动是一个广泛的术语，涵盖人类与技术之间可以进行的互动范围。虽然人类与固定和移动计算机的交互已广为人知，但世界正处于人类与机器人之间无处不在且持续的交互的风口浪尖。虽然机器人系统与计算和计算技术交织在一起，但这里的“机器人”一词描述的是可以对包括人类在内的环境产生物理影响并反过来受其影响的技术。本章从人类与称为辅助机器人的机器人子集交互的角度深入探讨了网络人机交互问题。辅助机器人是旨在帮助行动不便或能力有限的个人完成日常活动（通常称为日常生活的工具性活动）的机器人。这些范围从家务、饮食到用户可能需要护理人员日常帮助才能完成的任何活动。一种常见类型的辅助机器人是安装在轮椅上的机械臂。该设备设计用于连接到用户的轮椅上，以允许他或她独立完成他们的活动。简而言之，这些设备具有传感器，使它们能够以不同程度的自主性感知和处理环境，以执行有利于和改善能力有限或残疾人福祉的行动。虽然人机交互是一个热门的研究课题，但针对有局限性的个体的研究却很少。在本章中，我们概述了辅助机器人设备，讨论了用户交互的常见方法，以及对自适应补偿框架的需求，以支持潜在用户恢复其功能能力。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了辅助机器人与人类交互的现状，重点分析了轮椅机械臂等设备的设计、用户交互方法及适应性补偿框架的需求。
AI.motivation: 随着机器人技术发展，残障人士对辅助设备的需求增加，但现有研究缺乏针对能力受限个体的适应性交互框架。
AI.method: 通过综述辅助机器人技术，分析常见用户交互方式，并提出适应性补偿框架以支持用户功能恢复。
AI.result: 总结了辅助机器人技术现状，明确了用户交互的关键问题，并提出了面向能力受限群体的适应性框架需求。
AI.conclusion: 需加强针对残障人士的机器人交互研究，适应性补偿框架是提升辅助机器人实用性的关键方向。

authors_text: Breno M. F. Viana,Leonardo T. Pereira,Claudio F. M. Toledo
title: Illuminating the Space of Dungeon Maps, Locked-door Missions and Enemy Placement Through MAP-Elites
title_zh: 通过地图精英照亮地下城地图、闭门任务和敌人布局的空间
abstract: Procedural Content Generation (PCG) methods are valuable tools to speed up the game development process. Moreover, PCG may also present in games as features, such as the procedural dungeon generation (PDG) in Moonlighter (Digital Sun, 2018). This paper introduces an extended version of an evolutionary dungeon generator by incorporating a MAP-Elites population. Our dungeon levels are discretized with rooms that may have locked-door missions and enemies within them. We encoded the dungeons through a tree structure to ensure the feasibility of missions. We performed computational and user feedback experiments to evaluate our PDG approach. They show that our approach accurately converges almost the whole MAP-Elite population for most executions. Finally, players' feedback indicates that they enjoyed the generated levels, and they could not indicate an algorithm as a level generator.
summary: Procedural Content Generation (PCG) methods are valuable tools to speed up the game development process. Moreover, PCG may also present in games as features, such as the procedural dungeon generation (PDG) in Moonlighter (Digital Sun, 2018). This paper introduces an extended version of an evolutionary dungeon generator by incorporating a MAP-Elites population. Our dungeon levels are discretized with rooms that may have locked-door missions and enemies within them. We encoded the dungeons through a tree structure to ensure the feasibility of missions. We performed computational and user feedback experiments to evaluate our PDG approach. They show that our approach accurately converges almost the whole MAP-Elite population for most executions. Finally, players' feedback indicates that they enjoyed the generated levels, and they could not indicate an algorithm as a level generator.
abstract_zh: 程序内容生成（PCG）方法是加速游戏开发过程的宝贵工具。此外，PCG还可能作为功能出现在游戏中，例如《月光少年》（Digital Sun，2018）中的程序地下城生成（PDG）。本文通过合并 MAP 精英群体，介绍了进化地牢生成器的扩展版本。我们的地牢关卡是离散的，房间内可能有锁门任务和敌人。我们通过树形结构对地下城进行编码，以保证任务的可行性。我们进行了计算和用户反馈实验来评估我们的 PDG 方法。他们表明，对于大多数处决，我们的方法准确地收敛了几乎整个 MAP-Elite 群体。最后，玩家的反馈表明他们喜欢生成的关卡，并且他们无法指示作为关卡生成器的算法。

AI.tldr: 通过MAP-Elites算法优化地牢地图生成，结合锁定任务与敌人布局
AI.motivation: 提升游戏开发效率，生成多样化且符合设计的地牢关卡
AI.method: 基于MAP-Elites的进化算法，结合树结构编码确保任务可行性，并通过实验验证
AI.result: 算法高效收敛，玩家评价高，生成内容难以察觉算法痕迹

search_text: Illuminating the Space of Dungeon Maps, Locked-door Missions and Enemy Placement Through MAP-Elites 通过地图精英照亮地下城地图、闭门任务和敌人布局的空间 Procedural Content Generation (PCG) methods are valuable tools to speed up the game development process. Moreover, PCG may also present in games as features, such as the procedural dungeon generation (PDG) in Moonlighter (Digital Sun, 2018). This paper introduces an extended version of an evolutionary dungeon generator by incorporating a MAP-Elites population. Our dungeon levels are discretized with rooms that may have locked-door missions and enemies within them. We encoded the dungeons through a tree structure to ensure the feasibility of missions. We performed computational and user feedback experiments to evaluate our PDG approach. They show that our approach accurately converges almost the whole MAP-Elite population for most executions. Finally, players' feedback indicates that they enjoyed the generated levels, and they could not indicate an algorithm as a level generator. 程序内容生成（PCG）方法是加速游戏开发过程的宝贵工具。此外，PCG还可能作为功能出现在游戏中，例如《月光少年》（Digital Sun，2018）中的程序地下城生成（PDG）。本文通过合并 MAP 精英群体，介绍了进化地牢生成器的扩展版本。我们的地牢关卡是离散的，房间内可能有锁门任务和敌人。我们通过树形结构对地下城进行编码，以保证任务的可行性。我们进行了计算和用户反馈实验来评估我们的 PDG 方法。他们表明，对于大多数处决，我们的方法准确地收敛了几乎整个 MAP-Elite 群体。最后，玩家的反馈表明他们喜欢生成的关卡，并且他们无法指示作为关卡生成器的算法。 通过MAP-Elites算法优化地牢地图生成，结合锁定任务与敌人布局 Breno M. F. Viana,Leonardo T. Pereira,Claudio F. M. Toledo cs.AI

title: Exploring Adversarially Robust Training for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 探索无监督领域适应的对抗性鲁棒训练
comment: Accepted at Asian Conference on Computer Vision (ACCV) 2022
comments: Accepted at Asian Conference on Computer Vision (ACCV) 2022
abstract: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) methods aim to transfer knowledge from a labeled source domain to an unlabeled target domain. UDA has been extensively studied in the computer vision literature. Deep networks have been shown to be vulnerable to adversarial attacks. However, very little focus is devoted to improving the adversarial robustness of deep UDA models, causing serious concerns about model reliability. Adversarial Training (AT) has been considered to be the most successful adversarial defense approach. Nevertheless, conventional AT requires ground-truth labels to generate adversarial examples and train models, which limits its effectiveness in the unlabeled target domain. In this paper, we aim to explore AT to robustify UDA models: How to enhance the unlabeled data robustness via AT while learning domain-invariant features for UDA? To answer this question, we provide a systematic study into multiple AT variants that can potentially be applied to UDA. Moreover, we propose a novel Adversarially Robust Training method for UDA accordingly, referred to as ARTUDA. Extensive experiments on multiple adversarial attacks and UDA benchmarks show that ARTUDA consistently improves the adversarial robustness of UDA models. Code is available at https://github.com/shaoyuanlo/ARTUDA
summary: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) methods aim to transfer knowledge from a labeled source domain to an unlabeled target domain. UDA has been extensively studied in the computer vision literature. Deep networks have been shown to be vulnerable to adversarial attacks. However, very little focus is devoted to improving the adversarial robustness of deep UDA models, causing serious concerns about model reliability. To answer this question, we provide a systematic study into multiple AT variants that can potentially be applied to UDA. Extensive experiments on multiple adversarial attacks and UDA benchmarks show that ARTUDA consistently improves the adversarial robustness of UDA models. Code is available at https://github.com/shaoyuanlo/ARTUDA
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应（UDA）方法旨在将知识从标记的源域转移到未标记的目标域。 UDA 在计算机视觉文献中得到了广泛的研究。深层网络已被证明容易受到对抗性攻击。然而，很少有人关注提高深度 UDA 模型的对抗鲁棒性，这引起了人们对模型可靠性的严重担忧。对抗性训练（AT）被认为是最成功的对抗性防御方法。然而，传统的 AT 需要真实标签来生成对抗性示例并训练模型，这限制了其在未标记目标领域的有效性。在本文中，我们的目标是探索 AT 来增强 UDA 模型：如何通过 AT 增强未标记数据的鲁棒性，同时学习 UDA 的域不变特征？为了回答这个问题，我们对可能应用于 UDA 的多个 AT 变体进行了系统研究。此外，我们相应地提出了一种新颖的 UDA 对抗性鲁棒训练方法，称为 ARTUDA。对多种对抗攻击和 UDA 基准的大量实验表明，ARTUDA 持续提高了 UDA 模型的对抗鲁棒性。代码可在 https://github.com/shaoyuanlo/ARTUDA 获取

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过对抗训练增强无监督域适应（UDA）模型的鲁棒性，提出了一种名为ARTUDA的新方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管UDA已被广泛研究，但现有方法在面对对抗攻击时可靠性不足，而传统对抗训练需要目标域标签，这在无监督场景中不可行。
AI.method: 系统研究多种对抗训练变体在UDA中的适用性，并提出ARTUDA方法，在无需目标域标签的情况下同时学习域不变特征和提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多个对抗攻击和UDA基准测试中，ARTUDA显著提升了UDA模型的对抗鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: ARTUDA通过有效整合对抗训练与域适应，为提升UDA模型可靠性提供了新思路。

title: System Safety and Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 系统安全与人工智能
comment: To appear in: Oxford Handbook on AI Governance (Oxford University Press, 2022 forthcoming)
comments: To appear in: Oxford Handbook on AI Governance (Oxford University Press, 2022 forthcoming)
abstract: This chapter formulates seven lessons for preventing harm in artificial intelligence (AI) systems based on insights from the field of system safety for software-based automation in safety-critical domains. New applications of AI across societal domains and public organizations and infrastructures come with new hazards, which lead to new forms of harm, both grave and pernicious. The text addresses the lack of consensus for diagnosing and eliminating new AI system hazards. For decades, the field of system safety has dealt with accidents and harm in safety-critical systems governed by varying degrees of software-based automation and decision-making. This field embraces the core assumption of systems and control that AI systems cannot be safeguarded by technical design choices on the model or algorithm alone, instead requiring an end-to-end hazard analysis and design frame that includes the context of use, impacted stakeholders and the formal and informal institutional environment in which the system operates. Safety and other values are then inherently socio-technical and emergent system properties that require design and control measures to instantiate these across the technical, social and institutional components of a system. This chapter honors system safety pioneer Nancy Leveson, by situating her core lessons for today's AI system safety challenges. For every lesson, concrete tools are offered for rethinking and reorganizing the safety management of AI systems, both in design and governance. This history tells us that effective AI safety management requires transdisciplinary approaches and a shared language that allows involvement of all levels of society.

abstract_zh: 本章根据安全关键领域基于软件的自动化系统安全领域的见解，制定了防止人工智能 (AI) 系统损害的七个教训。人工智能在社会领域、公共组织和基础设施中的新应用带来了新的危害，从而导致新形式的危害，既严重又有害。该文本解决了在诊断和消除新的人工智能系统危害方面缺乏共识的问题。几十年来，系统安全领域一直在处理由不同程度的基于软件的自动化和决策控制的安全关键系统中的事故和危害。该领域包含系统和控制的核心假设，即人工智能系统不能仅通过模型或算法的技术设计选择来保护，而是需要端到端的危害分析和设计框架，其中包括使用环境、受影响的利益相关者以及系统运行的正式和非正式制度环境。安全和其他价值本质上是社会技术和新兴系统属性，需要设计和控制措施来在系统的技术、社会和制度组成部分实例化这些属性。本章通过介绍系统安全先驱 Nancy Leveson 应对当今人工智能系统安全挑战的核心经验教训来向她致敬。每节课都提供了具体的工具，用于在设计和治理方面重新思考和重组人工智能系统的安全管理。这段历史告诉我们，有效的人工智能安全管理需要跨学科的方法和允许社会各个层面参与的共享语言。

AI.tldr: 本文基于系统安全领域的见解，提出七条防止人工智能系统危害的教训，强调需通过端到端的危险分析和跨学科方法来管理AI安全。
AI.motivation: 随着AI技术在社会各领域的应用，新型危害不断涌现，但目前缺乏针对AI系统危险的共识性诊断与消除方法，亟需系统性安全框架。
AI.method: 结合系统安全领域数十年的经验，整合使用场景、利益相关者及制度环境等因素，提出涵盖技术、社会和制度层面的综合安全设计框架。
AI.result: 形成七条AI系统安全核心教训及配套工具，强调跨学科协作与全社会治理语言的重要性，为AI设计与治理提供实践指导。
AI.conclusion: AI安全本质是社会技术属性，需通过跨学科方法和全社会参与的治理机制，实现技术、社会与制度层面的安全协同。

This chapter honors system safety pioneer Nancy Leveson, by situating her core lessons for today's AI system safety challenges. For every lesson, concrete tools are offered for rethinking and reorganizing the safety management of AI systems, both in design and governance. This history tells us that effective AI safety management requires transdisciplinary approaches and a shared language that allows involvement of all levels of society. 本章根据安全关键领域基于软件的自动化系统安全领域的见解，制定了防止人工智能 (AI) 系统损害的七个教训。人工智能在社会领域、公共组织和基础设施中的新应用带来了新的危害，从而导致新形式的危害，既严重又有害。该文本解决了在诊断和消除新的人工智能系统危害方面缺乏共识的问题。几十年来，系统安全领域一直在处理由不同程度的基于软件的自动化和决策控制的安全关键系统中的事故和危害。该领域包含系统和控制的核心假设，即人工智能系统不能仅通过模型或算法的技术设计选择来保护，而是需要端到端的危害分析和设计框架，其中包括使用环境、受影响的利益相关者以及系统运行的正式和非正式制度环境。安全和其他价值本质上是社会技术和新兴系统属性，需要设计和控制措施来在系统的技术、社会和制度组成部分实例化这些属性。本章通过介绍系统安全先驱 Nancy Leveson 应对当今人工智能系统安全挑战的核心经验教训来向她致敬。每节课都提供了具体的工具，用于在设计和治理方面重新思考和重组人工智能系统的安全管理。这段历史告诉我们，有效的人工智能安全管理需要跨学科的方法和允许社会各个层面参与的共享语言。 本文基于系统安全领域的见解，提出七条防止人工智能系统危害的教训，强调需通过端到端的危险分析和跨学科方法来管理AI安全。 Roel I. J. Dobbe eess.SY,cs.AI,cs.CY,cs.LG,cs.SE

title: Surf or sleep? Understanding the influence of bedtime patterns on campus
title_zh: 冲浪还是睡觉？了解就寝时间模式对校园的影响
abstract: Poor sleep habits may cause serious problems of mind and body, and it is a commonly observed issue for college students due to study workload as well as peer and social influence. Understanding its impact and identifying students with poor sleep habits matters a lot in educational management. Most of the current research is either based on self-reports and questionnaires, suffering from a small sample size and social desirability bias, or the methods used are not suitable for the education system. In this paper, we develop a general data-driven method for identifying students' sleep patterns according to their Internet access pattern stored in the education management system and explore its influence from various aspects. First, we design a Possion-based probabilistic mixture model to cluster students according to the distribution of bedtime and identify students who are used to staying up late. Second, we profile students from five aspects (including eight dimensions) based on campus-behavior data and build Bayesian networks to explore the relationship between behavioral characteristics and sleeping habits. Finally, we test the predictability of sleeping habits. This paper not only contributes to the understanding of student sleep from a cognitive and behavioral perspective but also presents a new approach that provides an effective framework for various educational institutions to detect the sleeping patterns of students.

Understanding its impact and identifying students with poor sleep habits matters a lot in educational management. Most of the current research is either based on self-reports and questionnaires, suffering from a small sample size and social desirability bias, or the methods used are not suitable for the education system. Finally, we test the predictability of sleeping habits. abstract_zh: 不良的睡眠习惯可能会导致严重的身心问题，由于学习工作量以及同伴和社会影响，这是大学生普遍存在的问题。了解其影响并识别睡眠习惯不良的学生对于教育管理非常重要。目前的研究大多基于自我报告和问卷调查，存在样本量小和社会期望偏差，或者所使用的方法不适合教育系统。在本文中，我们开发了一种通用的数据驱动方法，根据教育管理系统中存储的互联网访问模式来识别学生的睡眠模式，并从各个方面探讨其影响。首先，我们设计了一个基于Possion的概率混合模型，根据就寝时间的分布对学生进行聚类，并识别出习惯熬夜的学生。其次，我们根据校园行为数据从五个方面（包括八个维度）对学生进行画像，并构建贝叶斯网络来探索行为特征与睡眠习惯之间的关系。最后，我们测试睡眠习惯的可预测性。本文不仅有助于从认知和行为角度理解学生睡眠，而且提出了一种新方法，为各种教育机构检测学生睡眠模式提供了有效框架。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析校园网络使用数据，研究大学生睡眠模式的影响因素，并开发了一种数据驱动的方法来识别学生的睡眠习惯。
AI.motivation: 现有研究依赖自我报告和问卷，存在样本量小、社会期望偏差等问题，且方法难以适配教育系统。需开发更客观、可扩展的睡眠模式分析框架。
AI.method: 设计基于泊松分布的概率混合模型，根据网络访问数据聚类学生睡眠模式；从五个维度构建贝叶斯网络，分析行为特征与睡眠习惯的关系，并测试睡眠习惯的可预测性。
AI.result: 成功识别出习惯性熬夜的学生群体，建立行为特征与睡眠模式的关联模型，验证了睡眠习惯的可预测性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法从认知与行为角度深化了对学生睡眠的理解，为教育机构提供了一种有效检测学生睡眠模式的通用框架。

authors_text: Anoop Cherian,Chiori Hori,Tim K. Marks,Jonathan Le Roux
title: (2.5+1)D Spatio-Temporal Scene Graphs for Video Question Answering
title_zh: 用于视频问答的(2.5+1)D时空场景图
abstract: Spatio-temporal scene-graph approaches to video-based reasoning tasks, such as video question-answering (QA), typically construct such graphs for every video frame. These approaches often ignore the fact that videos are essentially sequences of 2D "views" of events happening in a 3D space, and that the semantics of the 3D scene can thus be carried over from frame to frame. Leveraging this insight, we propose a (2.5+1)D scene graph representation to better capture the spatio-temporal information flows inside the videos. Specifically, we first create a 2.5D (pseudo-3D) scene graph by transforming every 2D frame to have an inferred 3D structure using an off-the-shelf 2D-to-3D transformation module, following which we register the video frames into a shared (2.5+1)D spatio-temporal space and ground each 2D scene graph within it. Such a (2.5+1)D graph is then segregated into a static sub-graph and a dynamic sub-graph, corresponding to whether the objects within them usually move in the world. The nodes in the dynamic graph are enriched with motion features capturing their interactions with other graph nodes. Next, for the video QA task, we present a novel transformer-based reasoning pipeline that embeds the (2.5+1)D graph into a spatio-temporal hierarchical latent space, where the sub-graphs and their interactions are captured at varied granularity. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, we present experiments on the NExT-QA and AVSD-QA datasets. Our results show that our proposed (2.5+1)D representation leads to faster training and inference, while our hierarchical model showcases superior performance on the video QA task versus the state of the art.
summary: Spatio-temporal scene-graph approaches to video-based reasoning tasks, such as video question-answering (QA), typically construct such graphs for every video frame. These approaches often ignore the fact that videos are essentially sequences of 2D "views" of events happening in a 3D space, and that the semantics of the 3D scene can thus be carried over from frame to frame. Leveraging this insight, we propose a (2.5+1)D scene graph representation to better capture the spatio-temporal information flows inside the videos. Specifically, we first create a 2.5D (pseudo-3D) scene graph by transforming every 2D frame to have an inferred 3D structure using an off-the-shelf 2D-to-3D transformation module, following which we register the video frames into a shared (2.5+1)D spatio-temporal space and ground each 2D scene graph within it. Such a (2.5+1)D graph is then segregated into a static sub-graph and a dynamic sub-graph, corresponding to whether the objects within them usually move in the world. The nodes in the dynamic graph are enriched with motion features capturing their interactions with other graph nodes. Next, for the video QA task, we present a novel transformer-based reasoning pipeline that embeds the (2.5+1)D graph into a spatio-temporal hierarchical latent space, where the sub-graphs and their interactions are captured at varied granularity. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, we present experiments on the NExT-QA and AVSD-QA datasets. Our results show that our proposed (2.5+1)D representation leads to faster training and inference, while our hierarchical model showcases superior performance on the video QA task versus the state of the art.
abstract_zh: 用于基于视频的推理任务（例如视频问答（QA））的时空场景图方法通常为每个视频帧构建这样的图。这些方法常常忽略这样一个事实：视频本质上是 3D 空间中发生的事件的 2D“视图”序列，因此 3D 场景的语义可以在帧之间延续。利用这种洞察力，我们提出了一种 (2.5+1)D 场景图表示，以更好地捕获视频内的时空信息流。具体来说，我们首先使用现成的 2D 到 3D 转换模块将每个 2D 帧转换为推断的 3D 结构，从而创建 2.5D（伪 3D）场景图，然后将视频帧注册到共享的 (2.5+1)D 时空空间中，并将每个 2D 场景图放置在其中。然后，这样的(2.5+1)D图被分成静态子图和动态子图，对应于其中的对象通常在世界中是否移动。动态图中的节点富含运动特征，捕获它们与其他图节点的交互。接下来，对于视频 QA 任务，我们提出了一种新颖的基于 Transformer 的推理管道，它将 (2.5+1)D 图嵌入到时空分层潜在空间中，其中子图及其交互以不同的粒度捕获。为了证明我们方法的有效性，我们在 NExT-QA 和 AVSD-QA 数据集上进行了实验。我们的结果表明，我们提出的 (2.5+1)D 表示可以加快训练和推理速度，而我们的分层模型在视频 QA 任务上展示了与现有技术相比的卓越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种(2.5+1)D时空场景图表示方法，用于改进视频问答任务中的时空信息建模。
AI.motivation: 现有视频问答方法通常独立处理每一帧的2D场景图，忽略了视频作为3D场景连续视图的特性，导致时空语义信息未能有效延续。
AI.method: 通过2D到3D转换模块生成伪3D场景图，将其注册到共享的(2.5+1)D时空空间中；分离静态子图与动态子图，动态节点注入运动特征，并设计分层Transformer推理框架进行多粒度交互建模。
AI.result: 在NExT-QA和AVSD-QA数据集上实现更快的训练/推理速度，且在视频问答任务中优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: (2.5+1)D场景图有效捕捉了视频的时空连续性，通过分层建模显著提升了视频问答的性能与效率。
