Next, for the video QA task, we present a novel transformer-based reasoning pipeline that embeds the (2.5+1)D graph into a spatio-temporal hierarchical latent space, where the sub-graphs and their interactions are captured at varied granularity. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, we present experiments on the NExT-QA and AVSD-QA datasets. Our results show that our proposed (2.5+1)D representation leads to faster training and inference, while our hierarchical model showcases superior performance on the video QA task versus the state of the art. 用于基于视频的推理任务（例如视频问答（QA））的时空场景图方法通常为每个视频帧构建这样的图。这些方法常常忽略这样一个事实：视频本质上是 3D 空间中发生的事件的 2D“视图”序列，因此 3D 场景的语义可以在帧之间延续。利用这种洞察力，我们提出了一种 (2.5+1)D 场景图表示，以更好地捕获视频内的时空信息流。具体来说，我们首先使用现成的 2D 到 3D 转换模块将每个 2D 帧转换为推断的 3D 结构，从而创建 2.5D（伪 3D）场景图，然后将视频帧注册到共享的 (2.5+1)D 时空空间中，并将每个 2D 场景图放置在其中。然后，这样的(2.5+1)D图被分成静态子图和动态子图，对应于其中的对象通常在世界中是否移动。动态图中的节点富含运动特征，捕获它们与其他图节点的交互。接下来，对于视频 QA 任务，我们提出了一种新颖的基于 Transformer 的推理管道，它将 (2.5+1)D 图嵌入到时空分层潜在空间中，其中子图及其交互以不同的粒度捕获。为了证明我们方法的有效性，我们在 NExT-QA 和 AVSD-QA 数据集上进行了实验。我们的结果表明，我们提出的 (2.5+1)D 表示可以加快训练和推理速度，而我们的分层模型在视频 QA 任务上展示了与现有技术相比的卓越性能。 本文提出一种(2.5+1)D时空场景图表示方法，用于改进视频问答任务中的时空信息建模。 Anoop Cherian,Chiori Hori,Tim K. Marks,Jonathan Le Roux cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Vahid Partovi Nia,Alireza Ghaffari,Mahdi Zolnouri,Yvon Savaria
title: Rethinking Pareto Frontier for Performance Evaluation of Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 重新思考深度神经网络性能评估的帕累托前沿
abstract: Performance optimization of deep learning models is conducted either manually or through automatic architecture search, or a combination of both. On the other hand, their performance strongly depends on the target hardware and how successfully the models were trained. We propose to use a multi-dimensional Pareto frontier to re-define the efficiency measure of candidate deep learning models, where several variables such as training cost, inference latency, and accuracy play a relative role in defining a dominant model. Furthermore, a random version of the multi-dimensional Pareto frontier is introduced to mitigate the uncertainty of accuracy, latency, and throughput of deep learning models in different experimental setups. These two complementary methods can be combined to perform objective benchmarking of deep learning models. Our proposed method is applied to a wide range of deep image classification models trained on ImageNet data. Our method combines competing variables with stochastic nature in a single relative efficiency measure. This allows ranking deep learning models that run efficiently on different hardware, and combining inference efficiency with training efficiency objectively.
summary: Performance optimization of deep learning models is conducted either manually or through automatic architecture search, or a combination of both. On the other hand, their performance strongly depends on the target hardware and how successfully the models were trained. We propose to use a multi-dimensional Pareto frontier to re-define the efficiency measure of candidate deep learning models, where several variables such as training cost, inference latency, and accuracy play a relative role in defining a dominant model. Furthermore, a random version of the multi-dimensional Pareto frontier is introduced to mitigate the uncertainty of accuracy, latency, and throughput of deep learning models in different experimental setups. These two complementary methods can be combined to perform objective benchmarking of deep learning models. Our proposed method is applied to a wide range of deep image classification models trained on ImageNet data. Our method combines competing variables with stochastic nature in a single relative efficiency measure. This allows ranking deep learning models that run efficiently on different hardware, and combining inference efficiency with training efficiency objectively.
abstract_zh: 深度学习模型的性能优化可以手动或通过自动架构搜索或两者的组合进行。另一方面，它们的性能很大程度上取决于目标硬件以及模型训练的成功程度。我们建议使用多维帕累托前沿来重新定义候选深度学习模型的效率度量，其中训练成本、推理延迟和准确性等几个变量在定义主导模型中发挥相对作用。此外，引入了多维帕累托前沿的随机版本，以减轻不同实验设置中深度学习模型的准确性、延迟和吞吐量的不确定性。这两种互补的方法可以结合起来对深度学习模型进行客观的基准测试。我们提出的方法适用于在 ImageNet 数据上训练的各种深度图像分类模型。我们的方法将竞争变量与随机性质结合在一个相对效率度量中。这使得可以对在不同硬件上高效运行的深度学习模型进行排名，并将推理效率与训练效率客观地结合起来。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用多维帕累托前沿重新定义深度神经网络候选模型的效率评估方法，结合训练成本、推理延迟和准确率等变量进行客观基准测试。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型优化方法未能充分考虑硬件差异和训练不确定性，传统单一指标评估无法全面反映模型效率。
AI.method: 引入多维帕累托前沿框架，结合随机版本以应对准确性、延迟和吞吐量的不确定性，通过相对效率度量综合评估模型。
AI.result: 方法应用于ImageNet图像分类模型，成功将竞争性变量整合为单一效率指标，实现跨硬件的模型效率排名。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多维度变量综合评估，为深度学习模型在不同硬件上的客观选择提供了有效工具。
